CreateTsCall(*mappingItem*, *generateInterface=True*, *callMode='CALL'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsCall "Link to this definition")  
Creates a call test step.

You can pass `~ApiClient.None` for `mappingItem` if you set `generateInterface` to `~ApiClient.False`. Otherwise, the mappingItem must be one of [`DiagRoutineMappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.DiagRoutineMappingItem "ApiClient.DiagRoutineMappingItem"), [`DiagDidMappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.DiagDidMappingItem "ApiClient.DiagDidMappingItem"), or [`ServiceMappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.ServiceMappingItem "ApiClient.ServiceMappingItem").

Parameters:  - **mappingItem** ([`CallableMappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.CallableMappingItem "ApiClient.CallableMappingItem")) – Optional. A mappingItem to assign to the test step

- **generateInterface** (*boolean*) – populate the parameters and return values from the mapping item

- **callMode** (*str*) –

  Have the test step use this call method. Possible values are:

  - ’CALL’ - actively call the target function (default value, not supported by [`DiagDidMappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.DiagDidMappingItem "ApiClient.DiagDidMappingItem"))

  - ’READ_PARAMS’ - listen to someone else calling the target function and read the input parameters of that call (only supported for [`ServiceMappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.ServiceMappingItem "ApiClient.ServiceMappingItem"))

  - ’READ_RETURNS’ - listen to someone else calling the target function and read the return values of that call (only supported for [`ServiceMappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.ServiceMappingItem "ApiClient.ServiceMappingItem"))

  - ’READ_EVENT’ - read the parameters of the target event for the last time it was sent (only supported for [`ServiceMappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.ServiceMappingItem "ApiClient.ServiceMappingItem"))

  - ’SEND_EVENT’ - send the target event with the specified paramters (only supported for [`ServiceMappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.ServiceMappingItem "ApiClient.ServiceMappingItem"))

  - ’[KWP\_]SHORT_TERM_ADJUSTMENT’ - temporarily adjust the value of a DID (only supported for [`DiagDidMappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.DiagDidMappingItem "ApiClient.DiagDidMappingItem"))

  - ’KWP_LONG_TERM_ADJUSTMENT’ - adjust the value of a DID (only for KWP2000) (only supported for [`DiagDidMappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.DiagDidMappingItem "ApiClient.DiagDidMappingItem"))

  - ’[KWP\_]FREEZE_CURRENT_STATE’ - freeze the current value of a DID (only supported for [`DiagDidMappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.DiagDidMappingItem "ApiClient.DiagDidMappingItem"))

  - ’[KWP\_]RESET_TO_DEFAULT’ - reset the value of a DID to its default (only supported for [`DiagDidMappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.DiagDidMappingItem "ApiClient.DiagDidMappingItem"))

  - ’[KWP\_]RETURN_CONTROL_TO_ECU’ - release control over the DID value (only supported for [`DiagDidMappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.DiagDidMappingItem "ApiClient.DiagDidMappingItem"))

  - ’KWP_REPORT_CURRENT_STATE’ - Read the DID value (only for KWP2000) (only supported for [`DiagDidMappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.DiagDidMappingItem "ApiClient.DiagDidMappingItem"))

  - ’DIAG_SERVICE’ - Call generic Diag Service (only supported for [`DiagServiceMappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.DiagServiceMappingItem "ApiClient.DiagServiceMappingItem"))

  - ’READ’ - read the DID value (only supported for [`DiagDidMappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.DiagDidMappingItem "ApiClient.DiagDidMappingItem"))

  - ’WRITE’ - write the DID value (only supported for [`DiagDidMappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.DiagDidMappingItem "ApiClient.DiagDidMappingItem"))

  *Please note:* Some Diag teststeps support UDS as well as KWP2000. To select the KWP2000 option make sure to use the *KWP\_* prefix.

Returns:  New call test step

Return type:  [`TsCall`](#ApiClient.TsCall "ApiClient.TsCall")

CreateTsReadFaultMemory(*mappingItem*, *subfunction='ReportDTCByStatusMask'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsReadFaultMemory "Link to this definition")  
Creates a new read fault memory test step.

Supported Subfunctions:

> - ReportDTCByStatusMask
>
> - ReportMirrorMemoryDTCByStatusMask
>
> - ReportEmissionsOBDDTCByStatusMask
>
> - ReportUserDefMemoryDTCByStatusMask
>
> - ReportSupportedDTCs
>
> - ReportFirstTestFailedDTC
>
> - ReportFirstConfirmedDTC
>
> - ReportMostRecentTestFailedDTC
>
> - ReportMostRecentConfirmedDTC
>
> - ReportDTCWithPermanentStatus

Parameters:  - **mappingItem** ([`DiagFaultMemoryMappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.DiagFaultMemoryMappingItem "ApiClient.DiagFaultMemoryMappingItem")) – The mapping item pointing to the desired test quantity

- **subfunction** (*str*) – Optional. The subfunction that should be executed.

Returns:  New read fault memory test step

Return type:  [`TsReadFaultMemory`](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory "ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory")

Creates a switchdef-case test step.

Returns:  New switchdef-case test step

Return type:  [`TsSwitchDefCase`](#ApiClient.TsSwitchDefCase "ApiClient.TsSwitchDefCase")

CreateTsSynchronousRttPackageCall(*mappingItem*)[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsSynchronousRttPackageCall "Link to this definition")  
Creates a package call test step that executes the package referenced in the given mappingItem.

Parameters:  **mappingItem** ([`PackageMappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.PackageMappingItem "ApiClient.PackageMappingItem")) – The mapping item referencing the package

Returns:  New package test step

Return type:  [`TsRttPackageCall`](#ApiClient.TsRttPackageCall "ApiClient.TsRttPackageCall")

CreateTsToDo()[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsToDo "Link to this definition")  
Creates a ToDo test step that can be used to mark that something is still to do here.

Returns:  New ToDo test step

Return type:  [`TsTodo`](#ApiClient.TsTodo "ApiClient.TsTodo")

CreateTsTouchInput(*mappingItem*)[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsTouchInput "Link to this definition")  
Create a test step to perform a touch input on the test quantity referenced by the mapping item.

Parameters:  **mappingItem** ([`MappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.MappingItem "ApiClient.MappingItem")) – The mapping item pointing to the desired test quantity

Returns:  New touch input test step

Return type:  [`TsTouchInput`](#ApiClient.TsTouchInput "ApiClient.TsTouchInput")

CreateTsTraceStepResult()[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsTraceStepResult "Link to this definition")  
Creates a trace step result test step.

Returns:  New trace step result test step

Return type:  [`TsTraceStepResult`](#ApiClient.TsTraceStepResult "ApiClient.TsTraceStepResult")

CreateTsWait()[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsWait "Link to this definition")  
Creates a wait test step.

Returns:  New wait test step

Return type:  [`TsWait`](#ApiClient.TsWait "ApiClient.TsWait")

CreateTsWaitForUser()[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsWaitForUser "Link to this definition")  
Creates a wait for user test step.

Returns:  New wait for user test step

Return type:  [`TsWaitForUser`](#ApiClient.TsWaitForUser "ApiClient.TsWaitForUser")

CreateTsWrite(*mappingItem*)[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsWrite "Link to this definition")  
Creates a write test step to write values in the test quantity that is mapped to the mapping item.

Parameters:  **mappingItem** ([`MappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.MappingItem "ApiClient.MappingItem")) – The mapping item pointing to the desired test quantity

Returns:  New write test step

Return type:  [`TsWrite`](#ApiClient.TsWrite "ApiClient.TsWrite")

CreateTsWriteAudio(*mappingItem*)[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsWriteAudio "Link to this definition")  
Create a test step to write audio on the test quantity that is referenced by the mapping item.

Parameters:  **mappingItem** ([`MappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.MappingItem "ApiClient.MappingItem")) – The mapping item pointing to the desired test quantity

Returns:  New write audio test step

Return type:  [`TsWriteAudio`](#ApiClient.TsWriteAudio "ApiClient.TsWriteAudio")

CreateTsWriteBusSignalGroup(*mappingItem*, *generateInterface=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsWriteBusSignalGroup "Link to this definition")  
Creates a new bus signal group write test step.

Parameters:  - **mappingItem** ([`BusSignalGroupMappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.BusSignalGroupMappingItem "ApiClient.BusSignalGroupMappingItem")) – The mapping item pointing to the desired test quantity

- **generateInterface** (*boolean*) – True if parameters and return should be added automatically based on the current testbench configuration

Returns:  New bus signal group write test step

Return type:  [`TsWriteBusSignalGroup`](#ApiClient.TsWriteBusSignalGroup "ApiClient.TsWriteBusSignalGroup")

CreateTsWriteBusSignalGroupCyclic(*mappingItem*, *generateInterface=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsWriteBusSignalGroupCyclic "Link to this definition")  
Creates a new bus signal group write cyclic test step.

Parameters:  - **mappingItem** ([`BusSignalGroupMappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.BusSignalGroupMappingItem "ApiClient.BusSignalGroupMappingItem")) – The mapping item pointing to the desired test quantity

- **generateInterface** (*boolean*) – True if parameters and return should be added automatically based on the current testbench configuration

Returns:  New bus signal group write cyclic test step

Return type:  [`TsWriteBusSignalGroupCyclic`](#ApiClient.TsWriteBusSignalGroupCyclic "ApiClient.TsWriteBusSignalGroupCyclic")

CreateTsPackage(*pkgPath*, *packageLibraryAlias=None*, *libraryNamespace=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsPackage "Link to this definition")  
Creates a package call test step that executes the referenced package.

Parameters:  - **pkgPath** (*string*) – Relative path of the package to be called.

- **packageLibraryAlias** (*string*) – Package library alias, if applicable

- **libraryNamespace** (*string*) – Workspace library namespace, if applicable

Returns:  New package test step

Return type:  [`TsPackage`](#ApiClient.TsPackage "ApiClient.TsPackage")

Deprecated since version 2023.3: Please use `CreateTsPackageCall` instead. See [`MappingApi.CreatePackageMappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.MappingApi.CreatePackageMappingItem "ApiClient.MappingApi.CreatePackageMappingItem") for creating a package mapping item.

CreateTsParallelPackage(*pkgPath*, *packageLibraryAlias=None*, *libraryNamespace=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsParallelPackage "Link to this definition")  
Creates a parallel package call test step that executes the referenced package in parallel.

Parameters:  - **pkgPath** (*string*) – Relative path of the package to be called.

- **packageLibraryAlias** (*string*) – Package library alias, if applicable

- **libraryNamespace** (*string*) – Workspace library namespace, if applicable

Returns:  New parallel package test step

Return type:  [`TsParallelPackage`](#ApiClient.TsParallelPackage "ApiClient.TsParallelPackage")

Deprecated since version 2023.3: Please use `CreateTsParallelPackageCall` instead. See [`MappingApi.CreatePackageMappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.MappingApi.CreatePackageMappingItem "ApiClient.MappingApi.CreatePackageMappingItem") for creating a package mapping item.

CreateTsParallelRttPackage(*pkgPath*, *packageLibraryAlias=None*, *libraryNamespace=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsParallelRttPackage "Link to this definition")  
Creates a parallel real-time package call test step that executes the referenced package in parallel on a real-time platform.

Parameters:  - **pkgPath** (*string*) – Relative path of the package to be called.

- **packageLibraryAlias** (*string*) – Package library alias, if applicable

- **libraryNamespace** (*string*) – Workspace library namespace, if applicable

Returns:  New RTT package test step

Return type:  [`TsParallelRttPackage`](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage "ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage")

Deprecated since version 2023.3: Please use `CreateTsParallelRttPackageCall` instead. See [`MappingApi.CreatePackageMappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.MappingApi.CreatePackageMappingItem "ApiClient.MappingApi.CreatePackageMappingItem") for creating a package mapping item.

CreateTsRttPackage(*pkgPath*, *packageLibraryAlias=None*, *libraryNamespace=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsRttPackage "Link to this definition")  
Creates a parallel real-time package call test step that executes the referenced package in parallel on a real-time platform.

Parameters:  - **pkgPath** (*string*) – Relative path of the package to be called.

- **packageLibraryAlias** (*string*) – Package library alias, if applicable

- **libraryNamespace** (*string*) – Workspace library namespace, if applicable

Returns:  New RTT package test step

Return type:  [`TsParallelRttPackage`](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage "ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage")

Deprecated since version 2021.4: Please use `CreateTsParallelRttPackageCall` instead. See [`MappingApi.CreatePackageMappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.MappingApi.CreatePackageMappingItem "ApiClient.MappingApi.CreatePackageMappingItem") for creating a package mapping item.

CreateTsSynchronousRttPackage(*pkgPath*, *packageLibraryAlias=None*, *libraryNamespace=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsSynchronousRttPackage "Link to this definition")  
Creates a synchronous real-time package call test step that executes the referenced package on a real-time platform.

Parameters:  - **pkgPath** (*string*) – Relative path of the package to be called.

- **packageLibraryAlias** (*string*) – Package library alias, if applicable

- **libraryNamespace** (*string*) – Workspace library namespace, if applicable

Returns:  New RTT package test step

Return type:  [`TsRttPackage`](#ApiClient.TsRttPackage "ApiClient.TsRttPackage")

Deprecated since version 2023.3: Please use `CreateTsSynchronousRttPackageCall` instead. See [`MappingApi.CreatePackageMappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.MappingApi.CreatePackageMappingItem "ApiClient.MappingApi.CreatePackageMappingItem") for creating a package mapping item.

## TsAddTrace[¶](#tsaddtrace "Link to this heading")

*class* TsAddTrace[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace "Link to this definition")  
Base class

[`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

Returned by

- [`TestStepApi.CreateTsAddTrace`](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsAddTrace "ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsAddTrace")

AddTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.AddTag "Link to this definition")  
Add a specific tag to this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be set

Clone()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.Clone "Link to this definition")  
Call this method if you want to use API-objects in multiple contexts, e.g. if you want to insert a specific test step in multiple blocks.

Returns:  A copy of this object

Return type:  [`TsAddTrace`](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace "ApiClient.TsAddTrace")

DeleteTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.DeleteTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Deletes a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

GetActionColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.GetActionColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “action” column.

Returns:  Action column text

Return type:  str

GetComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.GetComment "Link to this definition")  
Returns the comment of the test step in the current test case language.

Returns:  Comment text as shown in the comment tab

Return type:  str

GetCommentColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.GetCommentColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column.

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetCopyTraceFile()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.GetCopyTraceFile "Link to this definition")  
Returns whether the trace file should be copied into the report directory.

Returns:  True (default) if the trace file should be copied else False

Return type:  boolean

GetDeviceExpression()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.GetDeviceExpression "Link to this definition")  
Returns the device that should be used from the file.

Returns:  The device expression

Return type:  str

GetError()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.GetError "Link to this definition")  
Returns a list of errors. Note that the error messages depend on the program language ecu.test is set to. Because of that we do not recommend to check against exact error messages, unless you are certain about the respective program language.

Returns:  List of errors

Return type:  list[str]

GetFormatDetailsExpression()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.GetFormatDetailsExpression "Link to this definition")  
Returns the format details expression.

Returns:  The format details expression

Return type:  str

GetLineNo()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.GetLineNo "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test steps line number within its test case.

Returns:  Line number

Return type:  int

GetParameterColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.GetParameterColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “parameter” column.

Returns:  Parameter column text

Return type:  str

GetParent()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.GetParent "Link to this definition")  
Returns the parent test step.

Returns:  The parent test step or None if it is a top level test step.

Return type:  [`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

GetPathExpression()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.GetPathExpression "Link to this definition")  
Returns the path expression of the trace file.

Returns:  The path expression

Return type:  str

GetRecordingGroup()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.GetRecordingGroup "Link to this definition")  
Returns the recording group set for this test step.

Returns:  The recording group. Returns None if no recording group is assigned.

Return type:  [`RecordingGroup`](SignalRecordingApi.md#ApiClient.RecordingGroup "ApiClient.RecordingGroup")

GetTags()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.GetTags "Link to this definition")  
Returns the tags set for this step.

Returns:  A (sorted) list of tags

Return type:  list[str]

GetTestManagementId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.GetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test management id of the test step.

Returns:  Test step id.

Return type:  str

GetTestStepId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.GetTestStepId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test step id.

Returns:  test step id

Return type:  str

GetTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.GetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the requested text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.GetType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the type (class name) of the test step, e.g.

> - “TsPreconditionBlock”
>
> - “TsWait”
>
> - “TsIfThenElse”
>
> - “TsSwitchCase”
>
> - “TsCaseNode”

Returns:  Type (class name) of the test step

Return type:  str

GetValueColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.GetValueColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “value” column in your current test case language.

Returns:  Value column text

Return type:  str

IsBreakpoint()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.IsBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is a break point.

Returns:  True if test step is a break point, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsContainer()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.IsContainer "Link to this definition")  
Returns True, if the test step supports calling GetChildren as well as manipulating the structure of its children. (e. g. via inserting or deleting sub test steps).

Returns:  True if it can contain test steps, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsDeviceRegularExpression()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.IsDeviceRegularExpression "Link to this definition")  
Returns whether the device expression will be interpreted as regular expression.

Returns:  True if it is interpreted as regular expression else False

Return type:  boolean

IsEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.IsEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns the state of the test step.

Returns:  True if test step is enabled, otherwise False

Return type:  bool

IsInPostcondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.IsInPostcondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a postcondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a postcondition, else Flase

Return type:  bool

IsInPrecondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.IsInPrecondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a precondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a precondition, else False

Return type:  bool

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.IsVisible "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is visible. This depends on the test step itself or a parent test step being disabled.

Returns:  True if test step is visible, else False

Return type:  boolean

RemoveTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.RemoveTag "Link to this definition")  
Remove a specific tag from this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be removed

SetBreakpoint(*enable*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.SetBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Sets or unsets the test step to act as a break point.

Parameters:  **enable** (*boolean*) – True if test step is a break point, else False

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the current test case language.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

SetCopyTraceFile(*value*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.SetCopyTraceFile "Link to this definition")  
Sets whether the trace file should be copied into the report directory.

Parameters:  **value** (*boolean*) – True if the trace file should be copied else False.

SetDeviceAsRegularExpression(*expression*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.SetDeviceAsRegularExpression "Link to this definition")  
Set the device that should be used from the file.

Parameters:  **expression** (*str*) – The device expression

SetDeviceExpression(*expression*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.SetDeviceExpression "Link to this definition")  
Set the device that should be used from the file.

Parameters:  **expression** (*str*) – The device expression

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetFormatDetailsExpression(*expression*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.SetFormatDetailsExpression "Link to this definition")  
Sets the format details expression.

Parameters:  **expression** (*str*) – The format details expression

SetPathExpression(*expression*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.SetPathExpression "Link to this definition")  
Sets the path expression of the trace file.

Parameters:  **expression** (*str*) – The path expression

SetRecordingGroup(*recordingGroup*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.SetRecordingGroup "Link to this definition")  
Sets the recording group that will be started by this test step.

Parameters:  **recordingGroup** ([`RecordingGroup`](SignalRecordingApi.md#ApiClient.RecordingGroup "ApiClient.RecordingGroup")) – The recording group

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.SetTags "Link to this definition")  
Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAddTrace.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

AddTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TestStep.AddTag "Link to this definition")  
Add a specific tag to this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be set

Clone()[¶](#ApiClient.TestStep.Clone "Link to this definition")  
Call this method if you want to use API-objects in multiple contexts, e.g. if you want to insert a specific test step in multiple blocks.

Returns:  A copy of this object

Return type:  [`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

DeleteTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TestStep.DeleteTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Deletes a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

GetActionColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TestStep.GetActionColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “action” column.

Returns:  Action column text

Return type:  str

GetComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TestStep.GetComment "Link to this definition")  
Returns the comment of the test step in the current test case language.

Returns:  Comment text as shown in the comment tab

Return type:  str

GetCommentColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TestStep.GetCommentColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column.

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetError()[¶](#ApiClient.TestStep.GetError "Link to this definition")  
Returns a list of errors. Note that the error messages depend on the program language ecu.test is set to. Because of that we do not recommend to check against exact error messages, unless you are certain about the respective program language.

Returns:  List of errors

Return type:  list[str]

GetLineNo()[¶](#ApiClient.TestStep.GetLineNo "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test steps line number within its test case.

Returns:  Line number

Return type:  int

GetParameterColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TestStep.GetParameterColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “parameter” column.

Returns:  Parameter column text

Return type:  str

GetParent()[¶](#ApiClient.TestStep.GetParent "Link to this definition")  
Returns the parent test step.

Returns:  The parent test step or None if it is a top level test step.

Return type:  [`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

GetTags()[¶](#ApiClient.TestStep.GetTags "Link to this definition")  
Returns the tags set for this step.

Returns:  A (sorted) list of tags

Return type:  list[str]

GetTestManagementId()[¶](#ApiClient.TestStep.GetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test management id of the test step.

Returns:  Test step id.

Return type:  str

GetTestStepId()[¶](#ApiClient.TestStep.GetTestStepId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test step id.

Returns:  test step id

Return type:  str

GetTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TestStep.GetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the requested text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetType()[¶](#ApiClient.TestStep.GetType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the type (class name) of the test step, e.g.

> - “TsPreconditionBlock”
>
> - “TsWait”
>
> - “TsIfThenElse”
>
> - “TsSwitchCase”
>
> - “TsCaseNode”

Returns:  Type (class name) of the test step

Return type:  str

GetValueColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TestStep.GetValueColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “value” column in your current test case language.

Returns:  Value column text

Return type:  str

IsBreakpoint()[¶](#ApiClient.TestStep.IsBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is a break point.

Returns:  True if test step is a break point, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsContainer()[¶](#ApiClient.TestStep.IsContainer "Link to this definition")  
Returns True, if the test step supports calling GetChildren as well as manipulating the structure of its children. (e. g. via inserting or deleting sub test steps).

Returns:  True if it can contain test steps, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TestStep.IsEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns the state of the test step.

Returns:  True if test step is enabled, otherwise False

Return type:  bool

IsInPostcondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TestStep.IsInPostcondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a postcondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a postcondition, else Flase

Return type:  bool

IsInPrecondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TestStep.IsInPrecondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a precondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a precondition, else False

Return type:  bool

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.TestStep.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.TestStep.IsVisible "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is visible. This depends on the test step itself or a parent test step being disabled.

Returns:  True if test step is visible, else False

Return type:  boolean

RemoveTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TestStep.RemoveTag "Link to this definition")  
Remove a specific tag from this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be removed

SetBreakpoint(*enable*)[¶](#ApiClient.TestStep.SetBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Sets or unsets the test step to act as a break point.

Parameters:  **enable** (*boolean*) – True if test step is a break point, else False

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TestStep.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the current test case language.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TestStep.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.TestStep.SetTags "Link to this definition")  
Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TestStep.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TestStep.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

## TsJob[¶](#tsjob "Link to this heading")

*class* TsJob[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob "Link to this definition")  
Base class

[`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

Returned by

- [`TestStepApi.CreateTsJob`](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsJob "ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsJob")

AddParameter(*name*, *value=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.AddParameter "Link to this definition")  
Adds a parameter to a job test step.

Parameters:  - **name** (*str*) – Name of the parameter which should be added

- **value** (*str*) – Value of the parameter which should be added

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If the parameter name is already in use

AddTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.AddTag "Link to this definition")  
Add a specific tag to this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be set

Clone()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.Clone "Link to this definition")  
Call this method if you want to use API-objects in multiple contexts, e.g. if you want to insert a specific test step in multiple blocks.

Returns:  A copy of this object

Return type:  [`TsJob`](#ApiClient.TsJob "ApiClient.TsJob")

DeactivateExpectation()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.DeactivateExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the expectation so that the result will not be evaluated.

DeactivateSaveIn()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.DeactivateSaveIn "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the test step’s save in property, so the value will not be stored in a package variable.

DeactivateTimeOption()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.DeactivateTimeOption "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates any time option set on the test step. This is equivalent to selecting the option “none” in the test step’s time options menu.

DeleteTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.DeleteTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Deletes a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

GetActionColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.GetActionColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “action” column.

Returns:  Action column text

Return type:  str

GetActiveTimeOptionType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.GetActiveTimeOptionType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the type of the currently active time option.

Returns:  Type of active time option (“Timeless”, “Finally”, “TrueForWithin”, “Generally”, “SyncOnly”, “PollingCycleMultiplier”)

Return type:  string

GetComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.GetComment "Link to this definition")  
Returns the comment of the test step in the current test case language.

Returns:  Comment text as shown in the comment tab

Return type:  str

GetCommentColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.GetCommentColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column.

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetError()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.GetError "Link to this definition")  
Returns a list of errors. Note that the error messages depend on the program language ecu.test is set to. Because of that we do not recommend to check against exact error messages, unless you are certain about the respective program language.

Returns:  List of errors

Return type:  list[str]

GetExpectation()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.GetExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Returns the expectation expression from the evaluation of the test step, or None, if no expectation was defined.

Returns:  The expectation

Return type:  [`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")

GetExpectationExpression()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.GetExpectationExpression "Link to this definition")  
Returns the expectation expression from the evaluation of the test step, or None, if no expectation was defined.

Returns:  The expectation

Return type:  string

GetLineNo()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.GetLineNo "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test steps line number within its test case.

Returns:  Line number

Return type:  int

GetMappingItemReferenceName()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.GetMappingItemReferenceName "Link to this definition")  
Returns the unique reference name of the mapping item used by this test step.

Returns:  Reference name of used mapping item

Return type:  str

GetMinimumDuration()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.GetMinimumDuration "Link to this definition")  
Returns the minimum duration of the test step’s time option, if a corresponding option has been set.

Returns:  The minimum duration, else None

Return type:  string

GetMinimumDurationUnit()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.GetMinimumDurationUnit "Link to this definition")  
Returns the unit of the minimum duration of the test step’s time option, if a corresponding option has been set.

Returns:  The unit of the minimum duration, else None

Return type:  string

GetParameterColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.GetParameterColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “parameter” column.

Returns:  Parameter column text

Return type:  str

GetParameters()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.GetParameters "Link to this definition")  
Returns parameters of a job test step.

Returns:  Parameters of a job

Return type:  dict[str, str]

GetParent()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.GetParent "Link to this definition")  
Returns the parent test step.

Returns:  The parent test step or None if it is a top level test step.

Return type:  [`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

GetPollingCycle()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.GetPollingCycle "Link to this definition")

GetSaveInVariableName()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.GetSaveInVariableName "Link to this definition")  
Returns the currently selected variable to save the data.

Returns:  The variable’s name

Return type:  string

GetTags()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.GetTags "Link to this definition")  
Returns the tags set for this step.

Returns:  A (sorted) list of tags

Return type:  list[str]

GetTestManagementId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.GetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test management id of the test step.

Returns:  Test step id.

Return type:  str

GetTestStepId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.GetTestStepId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test step id.

Returns:  test step id

Return type:  str

GetTimeout()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.GetTimeout "Link to this definition")  
Returns the timeout of the test step’s time option, if a corresponding option has been set.

Returns:  The timeout else None

Return type:  string

GetTimeoutUnit()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.GetTimeoutUnit "Link to this definition")  
Returns the unit of the timeout of the test step’s time option, if a corresponding option has been set.

Returns:  The unit of the timeout else None

Return type:  string

GetTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.GetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the requested text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.GetType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the type (class name) of the test step, e.g.

> - “TsPreconditionBlock”
>
> - “TsWait”
>
> - “TsIfThenElse”
>
> - “TsSwitchCase”
>
> - “TsCaseNode”

Returns:  Type (class name) of the test step

Return type:  str

GetValueColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.GetValueColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “value” column in your current test case language.

Returns:  Value column text

Return type:  str

IsBreakpoint()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.IsBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is a break point.

Returns:  True if test step is a break point, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsContainer()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.IsContainer "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether this test step can contain test steps

Returns:  True if it can contain test steps, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.IsEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns the state of the test step.

Returns:  True if test step is enabled, otherwise False

Return type:  bool

IsInPostcondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.IsInPostcondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a postcondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a postcondition, else Flase

Return type:  bool

IsInPrecondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.IsInPrecondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a precondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a precondition, else False

Return type:  bool

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.IsVisible "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is visible. This depends on the test step itself or a parent test step being disabled.

Returns:  True if test step is visible, else False

Return type:  boolean

RemoveParameter(*name*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.RemoveParameter "Link to this definition")  
Removes a parameter from a job test step.

Parameters:  **name** (*str*) – Name of the parameter which should be removed

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If there is no parameter that matches name

RemoveTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.RemoveTag "Link to this definition")  
Remove a specific tag from this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be removed

SetBreakpoint(*enable*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.SetBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Sets or unsets the test step to act as a break point.

Parameters:  **enable** (*boolean*) – True if test step is a break point, else False

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the current test case language.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetExpectation(*expectation*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.SetExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Sets the expectation in the evaluation of the test step. The expectation will be activated if it was not enabled previously.

Parameters:  **expectation** ([`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")) – The expectation

SetExpectationExpression(*expectation*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.SetExpectationExpression "Link to this definition")  
Shortcut to set an expectation for an unspecific type in the evaluation of the test step. The expectation will be activated if it was not enabled previously.

Parameters:  **expectation** (*string*) – The expectation

SetParameter(*name*, *value=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.SetParameter "Link to this definition")  
Sets a value of an existing parameter.

Parameters:  - **name** (*str*) – Name of the parameter which should be set.

- **value** (*str*) – Value of the parameter which should be changed.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If there is no parameter that matches name

SetSaveInVariableName(*variableName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.SetSaveInVariableName "Link to this definition")  
Sets the name of the variable used for storing data by the test step. The variable will be created automatically if it does not already exist in the package where the test step is placed in. This method must not be called, if the test step has not been added to a package previously.

Parameters:  **variableName** (*string*) – The variable’s name. Must not be None or an empty string.

Raises:  
**ApiError** –

- If SaveIn was called before the test step was added to a package.

- If variableName is None or an empty string

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.SetTags "Link to this definition")  
Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTimeOptionOnlySynchronization(*timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.SetTimeOptionOnlySynchronization "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “only synchronization”.

Parameters:  - **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout in ms to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – The polling cycle in ms or s or min or h or d. Might be left out.

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h, or d)

SetTimeOptionPollingCycleMultiplier(*pollingCycleMultiplier*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.SetTimeOptionPollingCycleMultiplier "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “polling cycle multiplier”. This option must only be used when inserting the test step into a Multi-Check!

Parameters:  **pollingCycleMultiplier** (*string*) – The polling cycle multiplier to be used.

SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeast(*minimumDuration*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeast "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “true for at least”.

Parameters:  - **minimumDuration** (*string*) – The minimum duration to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h, or d)

SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeastWithin(*minimumDuration*, *timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeastWithin "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “true for at least … within …”.

Parameters:  - **minimumDuration** (*string*) – The minimum duration in ms to be used

- **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h, or d)

SetTimeOptionWaitUntilTrue(*timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.SetTimeOptionWaitUntilTrue "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “wait until true”.

Parameters:  - **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used.

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h, or d).

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsJob.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Add a specific tag to this step.

Clone()[¶](#ApiClient.TsRead.Clone "Link to this definition")  
Call this method if you want to use API-objects in multiple contexts, e.g. if you want to insert a specific test step in multiple blocks.

Returns:  A copy of this object

Return type:  [`TsRead`](#ApiClient.TsRead "ApiClient.TsRead")

DeactivateExpectation()[¶](#ApiClient.TsRead.DeactivateExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the expectation so that the result will not be evaluated.

Deactivates the test step’s save in property, so the value will not be stored in a package variable.

DeactivateTimeOption()[¶](#ApiClient.TsRead.DeactivateTimeOption "Link to this definition")

SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeastWithin(*minimumDuration*, *timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsRead.SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeastWithin "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “true for at least … within …”.

Parameters:  - **minimumDuration** (*string*) – The minimum duration in ms to be used

- **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h, or d)

SetTimeOptionWaitUntilTrue(*timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsRead.SetTimeOptionWaitUntilTrue "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “wait until true”.

Parameters:  - **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used.

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h, or d).

Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

SetUnit(*unit*, *axis='z'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsRead.SetUnit "Link to this definition")  
Sets the unit of a certain axis of the accessed test quantity.

Add a specific tag to this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be set

Clone()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBusFirstSignalCheck.Clone "Link to this definition")  
Call this method if you want to use API-objects in multiple contexts, e.g. if you want to insert a specific test step in multiple blocks.

Returns:  A copy of this object

Return type:  [`TsBusFirstSignalCheck`](#ApiClient.TsBusFirstSignalCheck "ApiClient.TsBusFirstSignalCheck")

DeactivateExpectation()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBusFirstSignalCheck.DeactivateExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the expectation so that the result will not be evaluated.

DeactivateSaveIn()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBusFirstSignalCheck.DeactivateSaveIn "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the test step’s save in property, so the value will not be stored in a package variable.

DeactivateTimeOption()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBusFirstSignalCheck.DeactivateTimeOption "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates any time option set on the test step. This is equivalent to selecting the option “none” in the test step’s time options menu.

DeleteTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBusFirstSignalCheck.DeleteTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Deletes a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

GetActionColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBusFirstSignalCheck.GetActionColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “action” column.

Returns:  Action column text

Return type:  str

GetActiveTimeOptionType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBusFirstSignalCheck.GetActiveTimeOptionType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the type of the currently active time option.

Returns:  Type of active time option (“Timeless”, “Finally”, “TrueForWithin”, “Generally”, “SyncOnly”, “PollingCycleMultiplier”)

Return type:  string

GetComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBusFirstSignalCheck.GetComment "Link to this definition")  
Returns the comment of the test step in the current test case language.

Returns:  Comment text as shown in the comment tab

GetCommentColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBusFirstSignalCheck.GetCommentColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column.

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetError()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBusFirstSignalCheck.GetError "Link to this definition")  
Returns a list of errors. Note that the error messages depend on the program language ecu.test is set to. Because of that we do not recommend to check against exact error messages, unless you are certain about the respective program language.

Returns:  List of errors

Return type:  list[str]

GetExpectation()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBusFirstSignalCheck.GetExpectation "Link to this definition")

Returns:  The expectation

Return type:  string

GetMappingItemReferenceName()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBusFirstSignalCheck.GetMappingItemReferenceName "Link to this definition")

>

Checks whether the test step is a break point.

Returns:  True if test step is a break point, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsContainer()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBusFirstSignalCheck.IsContainer "Link to this definition")  
Returns True, if the test step supports calling GetChildren as well as manipulating the structure of its children. (e. g. via inserting or deleting sub test steps).

Returns:  True if it can contain test steps, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBusFirstSignalCheck.IsEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns the state of the test step.

Returns:  True if test step is enabled, otherwise False

Return type:  bool

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBusFirstSignalCheck.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBusFirstSignalCheck.IsVisible "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is visible. This depends on the test step itself or a parent test step being disabled.

Returns:  True if test step is visible, else False

Return type:  boolean

Enable or disable the test step.

SetExpectation(*expectation*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBusFirstSignalCheck.SetExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Sets the expectation in the evaluation of the test step. The expectation will be activated if it was not enabled previously.

Parameters:  **expectation** ([`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")) – The expectation

SetExpectationExpression(*expectation*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBusFirstSignalCheck.SetExpectationExpression "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  **expectation** (*string*) – The expectation

SetRepresentation(*representation='PHYS'*, *axis='z'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBusFirstSignalCheck.SetRepresentation "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  - **representation** (*str*) – Representation for axis (PHYS, TEXT, RAW, BITS)

- **axis** (*str*) – Axis to set representation for (x, y, z)

SetSaveInVariableName(*variableName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBusFirstSignalCheck.SetSaveInVariableName "Link to this definition")  
Sets the name of the variable used for storing data by the test step. The variable will be created automatically if it does not already exist in the package where the test step is placed in. This method must not be called, if the test step has not been added to a package previously.

Parameters:  **variableName** (*string*) – The variable’s name. Must not be None or an empty string.

Raises:  
**ApiError** –

- If SaveIn was called before the test step was added to a package.

- If variableName is None or an empty string

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBusFirstSignalCheck.SetTags "Link to this definition")  
Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBusFirstSignalCheck.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")

Sets the test step’s time option to “only synchronization”.

Parameters:  - **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout in ms to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – The polling cycle in ms or s or min or h or d. Might be left out.

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h, or d)

SetTimeOptionPollingCycleMultiplier(*pollingCycleMultiplier*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBusFirstSignalCheck.SetTimeOptionPollingCycleMultiplier "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “polling cycle multiplier”. This option must only be used when inserting the test step into a Multi-Check!

Parameters:  **pollingCycleMultiplier** (*string*) – The polling cycle multiplier to be used.

SetSaveInVariableName(*variableName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadAudio.SetSaveInVariableName "Link to this definition")  
Sets the name of the variable used for storing data by the test step. The variable will be created automatically if it does not already exist in the package where the test step is placed in. This method must not be called, if the test step has not been added to a package previously.

Parameters:  **variableName** (*string*) – The variable’s name. Must not be None or an empty string.

Raises:  
**ApiError** –

- If SaveIn was called before the test step was added to a package.

- If variableName is None or an empty string

IsInPrecondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsWriteAudio.IsInPrecondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a precondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a precondition, else False

Return type:  bool

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.TsWriteAudio.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

Checks whether the test step is visible. This depends on the test step itself or a parent test step being disabled.

Returns:  True if test step is visible, else False

Return type:  boolean

RemoveTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsWriteAudio.RemoveTag "Link to this definition")  
Remove a specific tag from this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be removed

SetBreakpoint(*enable*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsWriteAudio.SetBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Sets or unsets the test step to act as a break point.

Parameters:  **enable** (*boolean*) – True if test step is a break point, else False

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsWriteAudio.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the current test case language.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsWriteAudio.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetFileReferenceValue(*path*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsWriteAudio.SetFileReferenceValue "Link to this definition")  
Sets file reference for playback from file.

Parameters:  **path** (*str*) – Path for file reference

SetObjectValue(*expression*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsWriteAudio.SetObjectValue "Link to this definition")  
Sets the expression if a python object is configured for playback.

Parameters:  **expression** (*str*) – Python expression resulting in an AudioBlock object

SetRepresentation(*representation='PHYS'*, *axis='z'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsWriteAudio.SetRepresentation "Link to this definition")  
Sets the representation of a certain axis of the accessed test quantity.

Parameters:  - **representation** (*str*) – Representation for axis (PHYS, TEXT, RAW, BITS)

- **axis** (*str*) – Axis to set representation for (x, y, z)

SetTTSValue(*text*, *serviceId=None*, *voiceName=None*, *voiceLanguage=None*, *voiceGender=None*, *pitch='0.0'*, *speed='1.0'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsWriteAudio.SetTTSValue "Link to this definition")  
Sets audio source to text-to-speech with specified parameters. If service or voice parameters are set to None, the setting from the test configuration is used. A list of available voices on the current system can be retrieved using the internal API’s MultimediaApi.GetAvailableTTSVoices(). Expression parameters need to be entered as strings representing python expressions. For example, the text parameter may be a simple sentence such as ‘“Hello.”’ but can also contain a test case variable testerName as ‘“Hello “ + testerName’.

Parameters:  - **text** (*str*) – Text to be transformed to speech as expression.

- **serviceId** (*str*) – ID of text-to-speech service.

- **voiceName** (*str*) – Name of the voice. Has to be available for specified serviceId.

- **voiceLanguage** (*str*) – Language of voice as language code, e.g. ‘en’, ‘de’

- **voiceGender** (*str*) – Gender of voice (‘MALE’, ‘FEMALE’, ‘OTHER’, ‘UNDEFINED’)

- **pitch** (*str*) – Pitch of speech as expression.

- **speed** (*str*) – Speed of speech as expression. Evaluated value must be larger than 0.

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsWriteAudio.SetTags "Link to this definition")  
Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsWriteAudio.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsWriteAudio.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

SetUnit(*unit*, *axis='z'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsWriteAudio.SetUnit "Link to this definition")  
Sets the unit of a certain axis of the accessed test quantity.

Parameters:  - **unit** (*str*) – Unit for axis

- **axis** (*str*) – Axis to set unit for (x, y, z)

- [`TestStepApi.CreateTsReadImage`](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsReadImage "ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsReadImage")

AddTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadImage.AddTag "Link to this definition")  
Add a specific tag to this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be set

AppendFilter(*modulePath*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadImage.AppendFilter "Link to this definition")  
Creates a new filter from the given module and appends it to the list of filters. Returns the newly created filter.

Parameters:  **modulePath** (*str*) – The path to the filter module. See `GetAvailableFilterModules()` for a list of valid paths.

Returns:  The created image filter

Return type:  [`ImageFilter`](#ApiClient.ImageFilter "ApiClient.ImageFilter")

ClearFilters()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadImage.ClearFilters "Link to this definition")  
Deletes all image filters that are configured on this test step.

Clone()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadImage.Clone "Link to this definition")  
Call this method if you want to use API-objects in multiple contexts, e.g. if you want to insert a specific test step in multiple blocks.

Returns:  A copy of this object

Return type:  [`TsReadImage`](#ApiClient.TsReadImage "ApiClient.TsReadImage")

DeactivateExpectation()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadImage.DeactivateExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the expectation so that the result will not be evaluated.

DeactivateSaveIn()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadImage.DeactivateSaveIn "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the test step’s save in property, so the value will not be stored in a package variable.

DeactivateTimeOption()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadImage.DeactivateTimeOption "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates any time option set on the test step. This is equivalent to selecting the option “none” in the test step’s time options menu.

DeleteTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadImage.DeleteTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Deletes a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

GetActionColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadImage.GetActionColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “action” column.

Returns:  Action column text

Return type:  str

GetActiveTimeOptionType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadImage.GetActiveTimeOptionType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the type of the currently active time option.

Returns:  Type of active time option (“Timeless”, “Finally”, “TrueForWithin”, “Generally”, “SyncOnly”, “PollingCycleMultiplier”)

Return type:  string

GetApplyFiltersToReferenceImage()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadImage.GetApplyFiltersToReferenceImage "Link to this definition")  
Returns whether to apply the filters to the reference image as well.

Returns:  True, if filters are applied to the reference image

Return type:  bool

GetAvailableFilterModules()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadImage.GetAvailableFilterModules "Link to this definition")  
Returns paths for all image filter modules that were found in the current workspace.

Returns:  A list of paths to modules that implement an image filter

Return type:  list[str]

GetComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadImage.GetComment "Link to this definition")  
Returns the comment of the test step in the current test case language.

Returns:  Comment text as shown in the comment tab

Return type:  str

GetCommentColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadImage.GetCommentColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column.

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetError()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadImage.GetError "Link to this definition")  
Returns a list of errors. Note that the error messages depend on the program language ecu.test is set to. Because of that we do not recommend to check against exact error messages, unless you are certain about the respective program language.

Returns:  List of errors

Return type:  list[str]

GetExpectation()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadImage.GetExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Returns the expectation expression from the evaluation of the test step, or None, if no expectation was defined.

Returns:  The expectation

Return type:  [`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")

GetExpectationExpression()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadImage.GetExpectationExpression "Link to this definition")  
Returns the expectation expression from the evaluation of the test step, or None, if no expectation was defined.

Returns:  The expectation

Return type:  string

GetFilter(*position*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadImage.GetFilter "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  **position** (*int*) – The position in the list of filters

Returns:  The image filter

Return type:  [`ImageFilter`](#ApiClient.ImageFilter "ApiClient.ImageFilter")

Returns:  The list of filters

GetMappingItemReferenceName()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadImage.GetMappingItemReferenceName "Link to this definition")

Sets the expectation in the evaluation of the test step. The expectation will be activated if it was not enabled previously.

Parameters:  **expectation** ([`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")) – The expectation

SetExpectationExpression(*expectation*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadImage.SetExpectationExpression "Link to this definition")  
Shortcut to set an expectation for an unspecific type in the evaluation of the test step. The expectation will be activated if it was not enabled previously.

Parameters:  **expectation** (*string*) – The expectation

SetRepresentation(*representation='PHYS'*, *axis='z'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadImage.SetRepresentation "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  - **representation** (*str*) – Representation for axis (PHYS, TEXT, RAW, BITS)

- **axis** (*str*) – Axis to set representation for (x, y, z)

SetSaveInVariableName(*variableName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadImage.SetSaveInVariableName "Link to this definition")  
Sets the name of the variable used for storing data by the test step. The variable will be created automatically if it does not already exist in the package where the test step is placed in. This method must not be called, if the test step has not been added to a package previously.

Parameters:  **variableName** (*string*) – The variable’s name. Must not be None or an empty string.

Raises:  
**ApiError** –

- If SaveIn was called before the test step was added to a package.

- If variableName is None or an empty string

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadImage.SetTags "Link to this definition")  
Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTimeOptionOnlySynchronization(*timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadImage.SetTimeOptionOnlySynchronization "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “only synchronization”.

Parameters:  - **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout in ms to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – The polling cycle in ms or s or min or h or d. Might be left out.

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h, or d)

SetTimeOptionPollingCycleMultiplier(*pollingCycleMultiplier*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadImage.SetTimeOptionPollingCycleMultiplier "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “polling cycle multiplier”. This option must only be used when inserting the test step into a Multi-Check!

Parameters:  **pollingCycleMultiplier** (*string*) – The polling cycle multiplier to be used.

SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeast(*minimumDuration*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadImage.SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeast "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “true for at least”.

Parameters:  - **minimumDuration** (*string*) – The minimum duration to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h, or d)

SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeastWithin(*minimumDuration*, *timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadImage.SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeastWithin "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “true for at least … within …”.

Parameters:  - **minimumDuration** (*string*) – The minimum duration in ms to be used

- **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h, or d)

SetTimeOptionWaitUntilTrue(*timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadImage.SetTimeOptionWaitUntilTrue "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “wait until true”.

Parameters:  - **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used.

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h, or d).

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadImage.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Parameters:  - **unit** (*str*) – Unit for axis

- **axis** (*str*) – Axis to set unit for (x, y, z)

Note:  
The syntax for the expression is the same as used within the dialog of the stimulate test step. E.g.: ‘ConstantSegment(duration=3.5, value=2.0)’

**ApiError** – If the given expression is no valid segment

Returns the text value of the “comment” column.

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetError()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStimulate.GetError "Link to this definition")  
Returns a list of errors. Note that the error messages depend on the program language ecu.test is set to. Because of that we do not recommend to check against exact error messages, unless you are certain about the respective program language.

Returns:  List of errors

Return type:  list[str]

GetLineNo()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStimulate.GetLineNo "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test steps line number within its test case.

Returns:  Line number

Return type:  int

GetMappingItemReferenceName()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStimulate.GetMappingItemReferenceName "Link to this definition")  
Returns the unique reference name of the mapping item used by this test step.

Returns:  Reference name of used mapping item

Return type:  str

GetOperation()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStimulate.GetOperation "Link to this definition")  
Get the operation method used for stimulation.

> - ‘direct’: Directly stimulate the defined stimulus to model signal
>
> - ‘add’: Overlay model signal by adding the defined stimulus
>
> - ‘multiply’: Overlay model signal by multiplying the defined stimulus

Returns:  The operation

Return type:  str

GetParameterColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStimulate.GetParameterColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “parameter” column.

Returns:  Parameter column text

Parameters:  **index** (*int*) – The position (zero-based)

Returns:  The signal segment expression

Return type:  str

GetSegments()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStimulate.GetSegments "Link to this definition")  
Returns a list of all signal segment expressions.

Returns:  The signal segment expressions

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the requested text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Returns the type (class name) of the test step, e.g.

> - “TsPreconditionBlock”
>
> - “TsWait”
>
> - “TsIfThenElse”
>
> - “TsSwitchCase”
>
> - “TsCaseNode”

Returns:  Unit for axis
