GetValueColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStimulate.GetValueColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “value” column in your current test case language.

Returns:  Value column text

Return type:  str

InsertSegment(*expression*, *index*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStimulate.InsertSegment "Link to this definition")  
Inserts a signal segment at the specified position.

Note:  
The syntax for the expression is the same as used within the dialog of the stimulate test step. E.g.: ‘ConstantSegment(duration=3.5, value=2.0)’

Parameters:  - **expression** (*str*) – The signal segment expression

- **index** (*int*) – The position (zero-based)

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If the given expression is no valid segment

IsAutoStopStimulation()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStimulate.IsAutoStopStimulation "Link to this definition")  
Returns the actual state of auto stop stimulation.

Returns:  The stimulus playback is stopped automatically when it has finished

Return type:  boolean

IsBreakpoint()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStimulate.IsBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is a break point.

Returns:  True if test step is a break point, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsContainer()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStimulate.IsContainer "Link to this definition")  
Returns True, if the test step supports calling GetChildren as well as manipulating the structure of its children. (e. g. via inserting or deleting sub test steps).

Returns:  True if it can contain test steps, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStimulate.IsEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns the state of the test step.

Returns:  True if test step is enabled, otherwise False

Return type:  bool

IsInPostcondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStimulate.IsInPostcondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a postcondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a postcondition, else Flase

Return type:  bool

IsInPrecondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStimulate.IsInPrecondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a precondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a precondition, else False

Return type:  bool

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStimulate.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsSynchronousExecution()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStimulate.IsSynchronousExecution "Link to this definition")  
Returns the actual state for the synchronous execution option.

Returns:  The test step waits until the stimulus playback has finished

Return type:  boolean

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStimulate.IsVisible "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is visible. This depends on the test step itself or a parent test step being disabled.

Returns:  True if test step is visible, else False

Return type:  boolean

RemoveSegment(*index*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStimulate.RemoveSegment "Link to this definition")  
Removes a signal segment at the specified position.

Parameters:  **index** (*int*) – The position (zero-based)

RemoveTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStimulate.RemoveTag "Link to this definition")  
Remove a specific tag from this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be removed

SetAutoStopStimulation(*state*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStimulate.SetAutoStopStimulation "Link to this definition")  
Sets whether the stimulus playback shall be stopped automatically when it has finished. Auto stop stimulation only works for enabled synchronous execution.

Parameters:  **state** (*boolean*) – Set auto stop stimulus playback

SetBreakpoint(*enable*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStimulate.SetBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Sets or unsets the test step to act as a break point.

Parameters:  **enable** (*boolean*) – True if test step is a break point, else False

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStimulate.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the current test case language.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStimulate.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetOperation(*operation*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStimulate.SetOperation "Link to this definition")  
Set the operation method used for stimulation.

> - ‘direct’: Directly stimulate the defined stimulus to model signal
>
> - ‘add’: Overlay model signal by adding the defined stimulus
>
> - ‘multiply’: Overlay model signal by multiplying the defined stimulus

Parameters:  **operation** (*str*) – The operation. Possible values: “direct”, “add” or “multiply”

Raises:  
**ValueError** – If the given operation is not any of “direct”, “add” or “multiply”.

SetRepresentation(*representation='PHYS'*, *axis='z'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStimulate.SetRepresentation "Link to this definition")  
Sets the representation of a certain axis of the accessed test quantity.

Parameters:  - **representation** (*str*) – Representation for axis (PHYS, TEXT, RAW, BITS)

- **axis** (*str*) – Axis to set representation for (x, y, z)

SetSaveInVariableName(*variableName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStimulate.SetSaveInVariableName "Link to this definition")  
Sets the name of the variable used for storing data by the test step. The variable will be created automatically if it does not already exist in the package where the test step is placed in. This method must not be called, if the test step has not been added to a package previously.

Parameters:  **variableName** (*string*) – The variable’s name. Must not be None or an empty string.

Raises:  
**ApiError** –

- If SaveIn was called before the test step was added to a package.

- If variableName is None or an empty string

SetSynchronousExecution(*state*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStimulate.SetSynchronousExecution "Link to this definition")  
Sets the state for the synchronous execution option and. This determines whether the test step waits until the stimulus playback has finished.

Parameters:  **state** (*boolean*) – True to activate, False to deactivate synchronous execution

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStimulate.SetTags "Link to this definition")  
Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStimulate.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStimulate.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

SetUnit(*unit*, *axis='z'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStimulate.SetUnit "Link to this definition")  
Sets the unit of a certain axis of the accessed test quantity.

Parameters:  - **unit** (*str*) – Unit for axis

- **axis** (*str*) – Axis to set unit for (x, y, z)

GetTestSteps(*skipDisabledSteps=True*, *recursive=False*, *whiteList=None*, *blackList=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.MappingTestStepContainer.GetTestSteps "Link to this definition")  
Returns the children of the test step.

Parameters:  - **skipDisabledSteps** (*boolean*) – Defines whether disabled test steps should be excluded.

- **recursive** (*boolean*) – Specifies whether only the direct children of the test step or recursively all test steps from the complete test step tree should be returned.

- **whiteList** (*list[str]*) – If specified, only those test steps whose class name is on this list are returned.

- **blackList** (*list[str]*) – If specified, only those test steps whose class name is not on this list are returned.

Returns:  List with all children test steps

Return type:  list[[`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")]

GetTestSteps(*skipDisabledSteps=True*, *recursive=False*, *whiteList=None*, *blackList=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadBusSignalGroup.GetTestSteps "Link to this definition")  
Returns the children of the test step.

Parameters:  - **skipDisabledSteps** (*boolean*) – Defines whether disabled test steps should be excluded.

- **recursive** (*boolean*) – Specifies whether only the direct children of the test step or recursively all test steps from the complete test step tree should be returned.

- **whiteList** (*list[str]*) – If specified, only those test steps whose class name is on this list are returned.

- **blackList** (*list[str]*) – If specified, only those test steps whose class name is not on this list are returned.

Returns:  List with all children test steps

Return type:  list[[`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")]

>

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsClearFrameAndSignalBuffers.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsClearFrameAndSignalBuffers.SetTags "Link to this definition")  
Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsClearFrameAndSignalBuffers.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsClearFrameAndSignalBuffers.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

AddTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.AddTag "Link to this definition")

Call this method if you want to use API-objects in multiple contexts, e.g. if you want to insert a specific test step in multiple blocks.

Returns:  A copy of this object

Return type:  [`TsEdiabas`](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas "ApiClient.TsEdiabas")

DeactivateSaveAllIn()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.DeactivateSaveAllIn "Link to this definition")

DeleteTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.DeleteTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")

GetActionColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.GetActionColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “action” column.

GetArguments()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.GetArguments "Link to this definition")

Returns:  List of Ediabas arguments

GetComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.GetComment "Link to this definition")  
Returns the comment of the test step in the current test case language.

Returns:  Comment text as shown in the comment tab

Return type:  str

GetCommentColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.GetCommentColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column.

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetError()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.GetError "Link to this definition")  
Returns a list of errors. Note that the error messages depend on the program language ecu.test is set to. Because of that we do not recommend to check against exact error messages, unless you are certain about the respective program language.

Returns:  List of errors

Return type:  list[str]

GetLineNo()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.GetLineNo "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test steps line number within its test case.

Returns:  Line number

Return type:  int

GetMappingItemReferenceName()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.GetMappingItemReferenceName "Link to this definition")  
Returns the unique reference name of the mapping item used by this test step.

Returns:  Reference name of used mapping item

Return type:  str

GetParameterColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.GetParameterColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “parameter” column.

Returns:  Parameter column text

Return type:  str

GetParent()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.GetParent "Link to this definition")  
Returns the parent test step.

Returns:  The parent test step or None if it is a top level test step.

Return type:  [`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

GetResponseExpectation()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.GetResponseExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Returns the expected response from the ECU.

GetResults()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.GetResults "Link to this definition")

GetSaveAllInVariableName()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.GetSaveAllInVariableName "Link to this definition")  
Returns the save all in variable name.

Returns:  Variable name

Return type:  str

GetTags()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.GetTags "Link to this definition")  
Returns the tags set for this step.

Returns:  A (sorted) list of tags

Return type:  list[str]

GetTestManagementId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.GetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test management id of the test step.

Returns:  Test step id.

Return type:  str

GetTestStepId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.GetTestStepId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test step id.

Returns:  test step id

Return type:  str

GetTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.GetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the requested text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.GetType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the type (class name) of the test step, e.g.

> - “TsPreconditionBlock”
>
> - “TsWait”
>
> - “TsIfThenElse”
>
> - “TsSwitchCase”
>
> - “TsCaseNode”

Returns:  Type (class name) of the test step

Return type:  str

GetValueColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.GetValueColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “value” column in your current test case language.

Returns:  Value column text

Return type:  str

IsBreakpoint()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.IsBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is a break point.

Returns:  True if test step is a break point, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsContainer()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.IsContainer "Link to this definition")  
Returns True, if the test step supports calling GetChildren as well as manipulating the structure of its children. (e. g. via inserting or deleting sub test steps).

Returns:  True if it can contain test steps, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.IsEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns the state of the test step.

Returns:  True if test step is enabled, otherwise False

Return type:  bool

IsInPostcondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.IsInPostcondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a postcondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a postcondition, else Flase

Return type:  bool

IsInPrecondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.IsInPrecondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a precondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a precondition, else False

Return type:  bool

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsReportAllEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.IsReportAllEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns whether the report all option is enabled.

Returns:  Whether report all is enabled or not.

Return type:  boolean

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.IsVisible "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is visible. This depends on the test step itself or a parent test step being disabled.

Returns:  True if test step is visible, else False

Return type:  boolean

RemoveResult(*name*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.RemoveResult "Link to this definition")  
Removes a self defined result from the result list.

Parameters:  **name** (*str*) – Name of the result

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If the test step has no self defined result with the given name

RemoveTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.RemoveTag "Link to this definition")  
Remove a specific tag from this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be removed

SetBreakpoint(*enable*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.SetBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Sets or unsets the test step to act as a break point.

Parameters:  **enable** (*boolean*) – True if test step is a break point, else False

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the current test case language.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetReportAll(*reportAll=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.SetReportAll "Link to this definition")  
Sets whether the report all option is enabled.

Parameters:  **reportAll** (*boolean*) – Whether report all is enabled or not. (optional, defaults to True)

Raises:  
ApiError: Is the parameter reportAll is not of type boolean.

SetResponseExpectation(*respExp*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.SetResponseExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Sets the expected response from the ECU.

Parameters:  **respExp** (*str*) – Expected response. Must be one of [u’EXPECTED’, u’OPTIONAL’, u’NOT_EXPECTED’]

Raises:  
ApiError: When the expected response parameter is invalid.

SetSaveAllInVariableName(*varName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.SetSaveAllInVariableName "Link to this definition")  
Sets the save all in variable name.

Parameters:  **varName** (*str*) – Variable name

Raises:  
ApiError: - If the parameter varName is not of type str - The test step is not added to a package

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.SetTags "Link to this definition")  
Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")

## EdiabasResult[¶](#ediabasresult "Link to this heading")

*class* EdiabasResult[¶](#ApiClient.EdiabasResult "Link to this definition")  
Returned by

- [`TsEdiabas.AddResult`](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.AddResult "ApiClient.TsEdiabas.AddResult")

- [`TsEdiabas.GetResults`](#ApiClient.TsEdiabas.GetResults "ApiClient.TsEdiabas.GetResults")

Clone()[¶](#ApiClient.EdiabasResult.Clone "Link to this definition")  
Call this method if you want to use API-objects in multiple contexts, e.g. if you want to insert a specific test step in multiple blocks.

Returns:  A copy of this object

Return type:  [`EdiabasResult`](#ApiClient.EdiabasResult "ApiClient.EdiabasResult")

DeactivateEdiabasOption()[¶](#ApiClient.EdiabasResult.DeactivateEdiabasOption "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the ediabas option.

DeactivateSaveIn()[¶](#ApiClient.EdiabasResult.DeactivateSaveIn "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the save in variable option.

GetComment()[¶](#ApiClient.EdiabasResult.GetComment "Link to this definition")  
Returns the comment of the result.

Returns:  Comment of the result

Return type:  str

GetExpectation()[¶](#ApiClient.EdiabasResult.GetExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Returns the expectation of the result.

Returns:  Expectation of the result

Return type:  [`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")

GetName()[¶](#ApiClient.EdiabasResult.GetName "Link to this definition")  
Returns the name of the result.

Returns:  Name of the result

Return type:  str

GetOptionHighlightGroup()[¶](#ApiClient.EdiabasResult.GetOptionHighlightGroup "Link to this definition")  
Returns the highlight group option of the ‘GROUP’ option type.

Returns:  Whether the group of the result set will be highlighted when successful.

Return type:  boolean

GetOptionResultSet()[¶](#ApiClient.EdiabasResult.GetOptionResultSet "Link to this definition")  
Returns the result set of the ‘CHOICE’ option type. That result set must fulfill the expectation.

Returns:  Result set

Return type:  integer

GetOptionType()[¶](#ApiClient.EdiabasResult.GetOptionType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the option type of the result.

Returns:  Option type. One of [u’ALL’, u’EXIST’, u’CHOICE’, u’GROUP’]. ‘ALL’: Must be fulfilled in every result set ‘EXIST’: Must be fulfilled in at least one result set ‘CHOICE’: Must be fulfilled in the selected result set ‘GROUP’: Must be fulfilled together with other results

Return type:  str

GetSaveInVariableName()[¶](#ApiClient.EdiabasResult.GetSaveInVariableName "Link to this definition")  
Returns the save in variable name.

Returns:  Variable name

Return type:  str

GetType()[¶](#ApiClient.EdiabasResult.GetType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the type of the result.

Returns:  Type of the result

Return type:  str

IsCheckTypeEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.EdiabasResult.IsCheckTypeEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns whether the type will be checked or not.

Returns:  Whether the type will be checked or not. Returns None if no ediabas option is set.

Return type:  boolean

IsChecked()[¶](#ApiClient.EdiabasResult.IsChecked "Link to this definition")  
Returns whether the result is checked or not.

Returns:  Whether the result is checked or not (optional, defaults to True)

Return type:  boolean

IsDynamic()[¶](#ApiClient.EdiabasResult.IsDynamic "Link to this definition")  
Returns whether the result is dynamic or not.

Returns:  Whether the result is dynamic or not.

Return type:  boolean

IsSelfDefined()[¶](#ApiClient.EdiabasResult.IsSelfDefined "Link to this definition")  
Returns whether the result is self defined or not.

Returns:  Whether the result is self defined or not.

Return type:  boolean

SetCheckType(*checkType=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.EdiabasResult.SetCheckType "Link to this definition")  
Sets whether the type will be checked or not.

Parameters:  **checkType** (*boolean*) – Whether the type will be checked or not. Optional, defaults to True.

Raises:  
ApiError: The EDIABAS option is not defined

SetChecked(*checked=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.EdiabasResult.SetChecked "Link to this definition")  
Sets whether the result is checked or not.

Parameters:  **checked** (*boolean*) – Whether the result is checked or not (optional, defaults to True)

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.EdiabasResult.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets the comment of the result. This can only be used with self defined results. Use IsSelfDefined to check whether a result is self defined.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Result comment

Raises:  
ApiError: If called on a result that is not self defined.

SetExpectation(*exp*)[¶](#ApiClient.EdiabasResult.SetExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Sets the expectation of the result.

Parameters:  **exp** ([`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")) – Expectation of the result

Raises:  
ApiError: If the parameter exp is not if type Expectation.

SetOptionHighlightGroup(*highlight=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.EdiabasResult.SetOptionHighlightGroup "Link to this definition")  
Sets the highlight group option of the ‘GROUP’ option type. The option type will be set to ‘GROUP’ if it is not already.

Parameters:  **highlight** (*boolean*) – Whether the group of the result set will be highlighted when successful.

SetOptionResultSet(*resultSet*)[¶](#ApiClient.EdiabasResult.SetOptionResultSet "Link to this definition")  
Sets the result set of the ‘CHOICE’ option type. That result set must fulfill the expectation. The option type will be set to ‘CHOICE’ if it is not already.

Parameters:  **resultSet** (*integer*) – Result set

Raises:  
ApiError: If the parameter resultSet is not \>=0.

SetOptionType(*optionType*)[¶](#ApiClient.EdiabasResult.SetOptionType "Link to this definition")  
Sets the option type of the result. Existing option settings like the expression and type checking will be kept. The Ediabas option will be activated if it is not already.

Parameters:  **optionType** (*str*) – Option type. Must be one of [u’ALL’, u’EXIST’, u’CHOICE’, u’GROUP’]. ‘ALL’: Must be fulfilled in every result set ‘EXIST’: Must be fulfilled in at least one result set ‘CHOICE’: Must be fulfilled in the selected result set ‘GROUP’: Must be fulfilled together with other results

Raises:  
ApiError: If the parameter optionType is not one of [u’ALL’, u’EXIST’, u’CHOICE’, u’GROUP’].

SetSaveInVariableName(*varName*)[¶](#ApiClient.EdiabasResult.SetSaveInVariableName "Link to this definition")  
Sets the save in variable name.

Parameters:  **varName** (*str*) – Variable name

Raises:  
ApiError: If the test step is not added to a package.

SetType(*resType*)[¶](#ApiClient.EdiabasResult.SetType "Link to this definition")  
Sets the type of the result. This can only be used with self defined results. Use IsSelfDefined to check whether a result is self defined.

Parameters:  **resType** (*str*) – Result type. Must be one of [u’binary’, u’string’, u’char’, u’unsigned char’, u’int’, u’unsigned int’, u’long’, u’unsigned long’, u’real’]

Raises:  
ApiError: - When the result is not a self defined result. - When the result type is invalid.

## EdiabasArgument[¶](#ediabasargument "Link to this heading")

GetType()[¶](#ApiClient.EdiabasArgument.GetType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the type of the argument.

SetParameterExpression(*expr*)[¶](#ApiClient.EdiabasArgument.SetParameterExpression "Link to this definition")  
Sets the parameter expression of the argument. Mind that by changing parameters of arguments the result list may change as well. Make sure you are working with the latest result list by calling GetResults after all arguments are set.

## TsReadFaultMemory[¶](#tsreadfaultmemory "Link to this heading")

*class* TsReadFaultMemory[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory "Link to this definition")  
Teststep for reading the fault memory of an ECU and examining the returned DTC list.

Base classes

- [`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

- [`MappingTestStep`](#ApiClient.MappingTestStep "ApiClient.MappingTestStep")

Returned by

- [`TestStepApi.CreateTsReadFaultMemory`](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsReadFaultMemory "ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsReadFaultMemory")

AddTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.AddTag "Link to this definition")  
Add a specific tag to this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be set

AllowedSubfunctions()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.AllowedSubfunctions "Link to this definition")  
Returns a list of subfunctions which can be passed to SetSubfunction().

Returns:  allowed subfunction names

Return type:  list[str]

Clone()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.Clone "Link to this definition")  
Call this method if you want to use API-objects in multiple contexts, e.g. if you want to insert a specific test step in multiple blocks.

Returns:  A copy of this object

Return type:  [`TsReadFaultMemory`](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory "ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory")

DeactivateExpectation()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.DeactivateExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the expectation so that the result will not be evaluated.

DeactivateSaveIn()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.DeactivateSaveIn "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the test step’s save in property, so the value will not be stored in a package variable.

DeactivateTimeOption()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.DeactivateTimeOption "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates any time option set on the test step. This is equivalent to selecting the option “none” in the test step’s time options menu.

DeleteTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.DeleteTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Deletes a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

GetActionColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.GetActionColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “action” column.

Returns:  Action column text

Return type:  str

GetActiveTimeOptionType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.GetActiveTimeOptionType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the type of the currently active time option.

Returns:  Type of active time option (“Timeless”, “Finally”, “TrueForWithin”, “Generally”, “SyncOnly”, “PollingCycleMultiplier”)

Return type:  string

GetComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.GetComment "Link to this definition")  
Returns the comment of the test step in the current test case language.

Returns:  Comment text as shown in the comment tab

Return type:  str

GetCommentColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.GetCommentColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column.

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetError()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.GetError "Link to this definition")  
Returns a list of errors. Note that the error messages depend on the program language ecu.test is set to. Because of that we do not recommend to check against exact error messages, unless you are certain about the respective program language.

Returns:  List of errors

Return type:  list[str]

GetExpectation()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.GetExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Returns the expectation expression from the evaluation of the test step, or None, if no expectation was defined.

Returns:  The expectation

Return type:  [`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")

GetLineNo()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.GetLineNo "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test steps line number within its test case.

Returns:  Line number

Return type:  int

GetMappingItemReferenceName()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.GetMappingItemReferenceName "Link to this definition")  
Returns the unique reference name of the mapping item used by this test step.

Returns:  Reference name of used mapping item

Return type:  str

GetMemorySelectionExpression()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.GetMemorySelectionExpression "Link to this definition")  
Returns the hexadecimal representation of memorySelection as a string. Can only be used with subfunction 0x17: ReportUserDefMemoryDTCByStatusMask

Returns:  memorySelection

Return type:  str

GetMinimumDuration()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.GetMinimumDuration "Link to this definition")  
Returns the minimum duration of the test step’s time option, if a corresponding option has been set.

Returns:  The minimum duration, else None

Return type:  string

GetMinimumDurationUnit()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.GetMinimumDurationUnit "Link to this definition")  
Returns the unit of the minimum duration of the test step’s time option, if a corresponding option has been set.

Returns:  The unit of the minimum duration, else None

Return type:  string

GetParameterColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.GetParameterColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “parameter” column.

Returns:  Parameter column text

Return type:  str

GetParent()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.GetParent "Link to this definition")  
Returns the parent test step.

Returns:  The parent test step or None if it is a top level test step.

Return type:  [`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

GetPollingCycle()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.GetPollingCycle "Link to this definition")  
Returns the polling cycle of the test step’s time option, if a corresponding option has been set.

Returns:  The polling cycle, else None

Return type:  string

GetPollingCycleUnit()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.GetPollingCycleUnit "Link to this definition")  
Returns the unit of the polling cycle of the test step’s time option, if a corresponding option has been set.

Returns:  The unit of the polling cycle, else None

Return type:  string

GetSaveInVariableName()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.GetSaveInVariableName "Link to this definition")  
Returns the currently selected variable to save the data.

Returns:  The variable’s name

Return type:  string

GetStatusMaskExpression()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.GetStatusMaskExpression "Link to this definition")  
Returns the status mask which will be used in subfunctions that need one, i.e. the subfunction name ends with “ByStatusMask”.

Returns:  statusMask

Return type:  str

GetSubfunction()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.GetSubfunction "Link to this definition")  
Returns the subfunction used to read the fault memory.

Returns:  subfunction name or empty string if it has not yet been set

Return type:  str

GetTags()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.GetTags "Link to this definition")  
Returns the tags set for this step.

Returns:  A (sorted) list of tags

Return type:  list[str]

GetTestManagementId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.GetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test management id of the test step.

Returns:  Test step id.

Return type:  str

GetTestStepId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.GetTestStepId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test step id.

Returns:  test step id

Return type:  str

GetTimeout()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.GetTimeout "Link to this definition")  
Returns the timeout of the test step’s time option, if a corresponding option has been set.

Returns:  The timeout else None

Return type:  string

Remove a specific tag from this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be removed

Sets or unsets the test step to act as a break point.

Parameters:  **enable** (*boolean*) – True if test step is a break point, else False

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the current test case language.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetExpectation(*expectation*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.SetExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Sets the expectation in the evaluation of the test step. The expectation will be activated if it was not enabled previously.

Parameters:  **expectation** ([`DTCListExpectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.DTCListExpectation "ApiClient.DTCListExpectation")) – The expectation

SetMemorySelectionExpression(*memorySelection*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.SetMemorySelectionExpression "Link to this definition")  
Sets the memory selection for subfunction 0x17: ReportUserDefMemoryDTCByStatusMask.

Parameters:  **memorySelection** (*str*) – hexadecimal value, 1 byte, e.g. 0xAB

SetSaveInVariableName(*variableName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.SetSaveInVariableName "Link to this definition")  
Sets the name of the variable used for storing data by the test step. The variable will be created automatically if it does not already exist in the package where the test step is placed in. This method must not be called, if the test step has not been added to a package previously.

Parameters:  **variableName** (*string*) – The variable’s name. Must not be None or an empty string.

Raises:  
**ApiError** –

- If SaveIn was called before the test step was added to a package.

- If variableName is None or an empty string

SetStatusMaskByBits(*testFailed*, *testFailedThisOperationCycle*, *pendingDTC*, *confirmedDTC*, *testNotCompletedSinceLastClear*, *testFailedSinceLastClear*, *testNotCompletedThisOpeartionCycle*, *warningIndicatorRequested*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.SetStatusMaskByBits "Link to this definition")  
Sets the status mask for a subfunction that needs one, i.e. the subfunction name ends with “ByStatusMask”.

Parameters:  - **testFailed** (*bool*) – set bit \#0 ‘testFailed’

- **testFailedThisOperationCycle** (*bool*) – set bit \#1 ‘testFailedThisOperationCycle’

- **pendingDTC** (*bool*) – set bit \#2 ‘pendingDTC’

- **confirmedDTC** (*bool*) – set bit \#3 ‘confirmedDTC’

- **testNotCompletedSinceLastClear** (*bool*) – set bit \#4 ‘testNotCompletedSinceLastClear’

- **testFailedSinceLastClear** (*bool*) – set bit \#5 ‘testFailedSinceLastClear’

- **testNotCompletedThisOpeartionCycle** (*bool*) – set bit \#6 ‘testNotCompletedThisOpeartionCycle’

- **warningIndicatorRequested** (*bool*) – set bit \#7 ‘warningIndicatorRequested’

SetStatusMaskExpression(*statusMask*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.SetStatusMaskExpression "Link to this definition")  
Sets the status mask for a subfunction that needs one, i.e. the subfunction name ends with “ByStatusMask”.

Parameters:  **statusMask** (*str*) – status mask, e.g. ‘0x8F’ or ‘variable’

SetSubfunction(*subfunctionName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.SetSubfunction "Link to this definition")  
Selects the subfunction used to read the fault memory. Use the ‘AllowedSubfunctions’ method to get the available subfunctions.

Parameters:  **subfunctionName** (*str*) – name of the subfunction that should be executed

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.SetTags "Link to this definition")  
Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTimeOptionOnlySynchronization(*timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.SetTimeOptionOnlySynchronization "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “only synchronization”.

Parameters:  - **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout in ms to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – The polling cycle in ms or s or min or h or d. Might be left out.

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h, or d)

SetTimeOptionPollingCycleMultiplier(*pollingCycleMultiplier*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.SetTimeOptionPollingCycleMultiplier "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “polling cycle multiplier”. This option must only be used when inserting the test step into a Multi-Check!

Parameters:  **pollingCycleMultiplier** (*string*) – The polling cycle multiplier to be used.

SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeast(*minimumDuration*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeast "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “true for at least”.

Parameters:  - **minimumDuration** (*string*) – The minimum duration to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h, or d)

SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeastWithin(*minimumDuration*, *timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeastWithin "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “true for at least … within …”.

Parameters:  - **minimumDuration** (*string*) – The minimum duration in ms to be used

- **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h, or d)

SetTimeOptionWaitUntilTrue(*timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.SetTimeOptionWaitUntilTrue "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “wait until true”.

Parameters:  - **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used.

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h, or d).

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReadFaultMemory.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

GetTestSteps(*skipDisabledSteps=True*, *recursive=False*, *whiteList=None*, *blackList=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepContainer.GetTestSteps "Link to this definition")  
Returns the children of the test step.

Parameters:  - **skipDisabledSteps** (*boolean*) – Defines whether disabled test steps should be excluded.

- **recursive** (*boolean*) – Specifies whether only the direct children of the test step or recursively all test steps from the complete test step tree should be returned.

- **whiteList** (*list[str]*) – If specified, only those test steps whose class name is on this list are returned.

- **blackList** (*list[str]*) – If specified, only those test steps whose class name is not on this list are returned.

Returns:  List with all children test steps

Return type:  list[[`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")]

InsertTestStep(*testStep*, *position*)[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepContainer.InsertTestStep "Link to this definition")  
Adds a test step at a certain position of the container.

Parameters:  - **testStep** ([`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")) – Test step to be added

- **position** (*integer*) – Target index of child beginning with 0

IsBreakpoint()[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepContainer.IsBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is a break point.

Returns:  True if test step is a break point, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsContainer()[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepContainer.IsContainer "Link to this definition")  
Returns True, if the test step supports calling GetChildren as well as manipulating the structure of its children. (e. g. via inserting or deleting sub test steps).

Returns:  True if it can contain test steps, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepContainer.IsEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns the state of the test step.

Returns:  True if test step is enabled, otherwise False

Return type:  bool

IsInPostcondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepContainer.IsInPostcondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a postcondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a postcondition, else Flase

Return type:  bool

IsInPrecondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepContainer.IsInPrecondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a precondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a precondition, else False

Return type:  bool

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepContainer.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsReportingDisabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepContainer.IsReportingDisabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns whether reporting of this test step is disabled.

Returns:  True if reporting is disabled

Return type:  boolean

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepContainer.IsVisible "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is visible. This depends on the test step itself or a parent test step being disabled.

Returns:  True if test step is visible, else False

Return type:  boolean

RemoveTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepContainer.RemoveTag "Link to this definition")  
Remove a specific tag from this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be removed

RemoveTestStep(*testStep*)[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepContainer.RemoveTestStep "Link to this definition")  
Removes a test step from the container.

Parameters:  **testStep** ([`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")) – Test step to be added

Raises:  
ApiError: - When the test step is not a direct child of the container - When the test step is not editable

SetBreakpoint(*enable*)[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepContainer.SetBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Sets or unsets the test step to act as a break point.

Parameters:  **enable** (*boolean*) – True if test step is a break point, else False

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepContainer.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the current test case language.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepContainer.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepContainer.SetTags "Link to this definition")  
Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepContainer.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TestStepContainer.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

DisableReporting(*disable=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsIfDef.DisableReporting "Link to this definition")

DisableReportingFor(*results*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsIfDef.DisableReportingFor "Link to this definition")  
Sets for which results reporting of the test step is disabled.

GetActionColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsIfDef.GetActionColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “action” column.

GetComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsIfDef.GetComment "Link to this definition")

Returns the text value of the “comment” column.

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetCondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsIfDef.GetCondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns the condition of the IfDef test step.

Returns:  Condition of the IfDef test step

Return type:  str

GetError()[¶](#ApiClient.TsIfDef.GetError "Link to this definition")  
Returns a list of errors. Note that the error messages depend on the program language ecu.test is set to. Because of that we do not recommend to check against exact error messages, unless you are certain about the respective program language.

Returns:  List of errors

Return type:  list[str]

GetLineNo()[¶](#ApiClient.TsIfDef.GetLineNo "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test steps line number within its test case.

GetParameterColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsIfDef.GetParameterColumnText "Link to this definition")

Returns:  Parameter column text

Return type:  str

GetParent()[¶](#ApiClient.TsIfDef.GetParent "Link to this definition")

Returns:  The parent test step or None if it is a top level test step.

GetReportDisablingResults()[¶](#ApiClient.TsIfDef.GetReportDisablingResults "Link to this definition")  
Returns for which results reporting of the test step is disabled.

Returns:  List of results for which the test step will not be reported

Return type:  list[str]

GetTags()[¶](#ApiClient.TsIfDef.GetTags "Link to this definition")  
Returns the tags set for this step.

Returns:  A (sorted) list of tags

Return type:  list[str]

GetTestManagementId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsIfDef.GetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")

GetTestStepId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsIfDef.GetTestStepId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test step id.

Returns:  test step id

Return type:  str

GetTestSteps(*skipDisabledSteps=True*, *recursive=False*, *whiteList=None*, *blackList=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsIfDef.GetTestSteps "Link to this definition")  
Returns the children of the test step.

Parameters:  - **skipDisabledSteps** (*boolean*) – Defines whether disabled test steps should be excluded.

- **recursive** (*boolean*) – Specifies whether only the direct children of the test step or recursively all test steps from the complete test step tree should be returned.

- **whiteList** (*list[str]*) – If specified, only those test steps whose class name is on this list are returned.

- **blackList** (*list[str]*) – If specified, only those test steps whose class name is not on this list are returned.

Returns:  List with all children test steps

Return type:  list[[`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")]

GetTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsIfDef.GetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the requested text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsIfDef.GetType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the type (class name) of the test step, e.g.

> - “TsPreconditionBlock”
>
> - “TsWait”
>
> - “TsIfThenElse”
>
> - “TsSwitchCase”
>
> - “TsCaseNode”

Returns:  Type (class name) of the test step

Return type:  str

GetValueColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsIfDef.GetValueColumnText "Link to this definition")

Returns:  Value column text

Return type:  str

- **position** (*integer*) – Target index of child beginning with 0

GetTestSteps(*skipDisabledSteps=True*, *recursive=False*, *whiteList=None*, *blackList=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.Node.GetTestSteps "Link to this definition")  
Returns the children of the test step.

Parameters:  - **skipDisabledSteps** (*boolean*) – Defines whether disabled test steps should be excluded.

- **recursive** (*boolean*) – Specifies whether only the direct children of the test step or recursively all test steps from the complete test step tree should be returned.

- **whiteList** (*list[str]*) – If specified, only those test steps whose class name is on this list are returned.

- **blackList** (*list[str]*) – If specified, only those test steps whose class name is not on this list are returned.

Returns:  List with all children test steps

Return type:  list[[`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")]

> - “TsPreconditionBlock”
>
> - “TsWait”
>
> - “TsIfThenElse”
>
> - “TsSwitchCase”
>
> - “TsCaseNode”

Returns:  Type (class name) of the test step

GetValueColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.Node.GetValueColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “value” column in your current test case language.

Returns:  Value column text

Return type:  str

Parameters:  - **testStep** ([`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")) – Test step to be added

- **position** (*integer*) – Target index of child beginning with 0

IsBreakpoint()[¶](#ApiClient.Node.IsBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is a break point.

Returns:  True if test step is a break point, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsContainer()[¶](#ApiClient.Node.IsContainer "Link to this definition")  
Returns True, if the test step supports calling GetChildren as well as manipulating the structure of its children. (e. g. via inserting or deleting sub test steps).

Returns:  True if it can contain test steps, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.Node.IsEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns the state of the test step.

Returns:  True if test step is enabled, otherwise False

Return type:  bool

IsInPostcondition()[¶](#ApiClient.Node.IsInPostcondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a postcondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a postcondition, else Flase

IsInPrecondition()[¶](#ApiClient.Node.IsInPrecondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a precondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a precondition, else False

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.Node.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsReportingDisabled()[¶](#ApiClient.Node.IsReportingDisabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns whether reporting of this test step is disabled.

Returns:  True if reporting is disabled

Return type:  boolean

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.Node.IsVisible "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is visible. This depends on the test step itself or a parent test step being disabled.

Returns:  True if test step is visible, else False

Return type:  boolean

RemoveTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.Node.RemoveTag "Link to this definition")  
Remove a specific tag from this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be removed

RemoveTestStep(*testStep*)[¶](#ApiClient.Node.RemoveTestStep "Link to this definition")

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.Node.SetTags "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetSaveInVariableName(*variableName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsLoop.SetSaveInVariableName "Link to this definition")  
Sets the name of the variable used for storing the current loop counter value. The variable will be created automatically if it does not already exist in the package where the test step is placed in. This method must not be called, if the test step has not been added to a package previously.

Parameters:  **variableName** (*string*) – The variable’s name. Must not be None or an empty string.

Raises:  
**ApiError** –

- If SaveIn was called before the test step was added to a package.

- If variableName is None or an empty string

SetStartCondition(*condition*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsLoop.SetStartCondition "Link to this definition")  
Sets the start condition of the loop test step. deletes a potentially existing stop condition.

Parameters:  **condition** (*str*) – Start condition

SetStopCondition(*condition*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsLoop.SetStopCondition "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

IsBreakpoint()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReactOn.IsBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is a break point.

Returns:  True if test step is a break point, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsContainer()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReactOn.IsContainer "Link to this definition")  
Returns True, if the test step supports calling GetChildren as well as manipulating the structure of its children. (e. g. via inserting or deleting sub test steps).

Returns:  True if it can contain test steps, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReactOn.IsEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns the state of the test step.

Returns:  True if test step is enabled, otherwise False

Return type:  bool

IsInPostcondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReactOn.IsInPostcondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a postcondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a postcondition, else Flase

Return type:  bool

IsInPrecondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReactOn.IsInPrecondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a precondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a precondition, else False

Return type:  bool

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReactOn.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsReportingDisabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReactOn.IsReportingDisabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns whether reporting of this test step is disabled.

Returns:  True if reporting is disabled

Return type:  boolean

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReactOn.IsVisible "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is visible. This depends on the test step itself or a parent test step being disabled.

Returns:  True if test step is visible, else False

Return type:  boolean

RemoveNode(*node*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReactOn.RemoveNode "Link to this definition")  
Removes one node.

Parameters:  **node** ([`TsReactOnNode`](#ApiClient.TsReactOnNode "ApiClient.TsReactOnNode")) – The note to be removed

RemoveNodeByIndex(*idx*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReactOn.RemoveNodeByIndex "Link to this definition")  
Removes one node by index.

Parameters:  **idx** (*int*) – Index of the node

RemoveTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReactOn.RemoveTag "Link to this definition")  
Remove a specific tag from this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be removed

RemoveTestStep(*testStep*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReactOn.RemoveTestStep "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  **testStep** ([`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")) – Test step to be added

ApiError: - When the test step is not a direct child of the container - When the test step is not editable

SetBreakpoint(*enable*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReactOn.SetBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Sets or unsets the test step to act as a break point.

Parameters:  **enable** (*boolean*) – True if test step is a break point, else False

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReactOn.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the current test case language.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReactOn.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReactOn.SetTags "Link to this definition")  
Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReactOn.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")

DisableReportingFor(*results*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReactOnNode.DisableReportingFor "Link to this definition")  
Sets for which results reporting of the test step is disabled.

Parameters:  **results** (*list[str]*) – List of results for which the test step will not be reported. Valid results are: u’NONE’, u’SUCCESS’, u’INCONCLUSIVE’, u’FAILED’, u’ERROR’

GetActionColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReactOnNode.GetActionColumnText "Link to this definition")

Returns the text value of the “comment” column.

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetError()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReactOnNode.GetError "Link to this definition")  
Returns a list of errors. Note that the error messages depend on the program language ecu.test is set to. Because of that we do not recommend to check against exact error messages, unless you are certain about the respective program language.

Returns:  List of errors

Return type:  list[str]

GetLabel()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReactOnNode.GetLabel "Link to this definition")  
Returns the label of the node.

Returns:  label

GetLineNo()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReactOnNode.GetLineNo "Link to this definition")

GetName()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReactOnNode.GetName "Link to this definition")

Returns:  Parameter column text

GetTestSteps(*skipDisabledSteps=True*, *recursive=False*, *whiteList=None*, *blackList=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReactOnNode.GetTestSteps "Link to this definition")  
Returns the children of the test step.

Parameters:  - **skipDisabledSteps** (*boolean*) – Defines whether disabled test steps should be excluded.

- **recursive** (*boolean*) – Specifies whether only the direct children of the test step or recursively all test steps from the complete test step tree should be returned.

- **whiteList** (*list[str]*) – If specified, only those test steps whose class name is on this list are returned.

- **blackList** (*list[str]*) – If specified, only those test steps whose class name is not on this list are returned.

Returns:  List with all children test steps

Return type:  list[[`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")]

GetTestSteps(*skipDisabledSteps=True*, *recursive=False*, *whiteList=None*, *blackList=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCaseNode.GetTestSteps "Link to this definition")  
Returns the children of the test step.

Parameters:  - **skipDisabledSteps** (*boolean*) – Defines whether disabled test steps should be excluded.

- **recursive** (*boolean*) – Specifies whether only the direct children of the test step or recursively all test steps from the complete test step tree should be returned.

- **whiteList** (*list[str]*) – If specified, only those test steps whose class name is on this list are returned.

- **blackList** (*list[str]*) – If specified, only those test steps whose class name is not on this list are returned.

Returns:  List with all children test steps

Return type:  list[[`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")]

GetTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCaseNode.GetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the requested text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCaseNode.GetType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the type (class name) of the test step, e.g.

> - “TsPreconditionBlock”
>
> - “TsWait”
>
> - “TsIfThenElse”
>
> - “TsSwitchCase”
>
> - “TsCaseNode”

Returns:  Type (class name) of the test step

Return type:  str

GetValueColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCaseNode.GetValueColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “value” column in your current test case language.

Returns:  Value column text

Return type:  str

InsertTestStep(*testStep*, *position*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCaseNode.InsertTestStep "Link to this definition")  
Adds a test step at a certain position of the container.

Parameters:  - **testStep** ([`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")) – Test step to be added

- **position** (*integer*) – Target index of child beginning with 0

IsBreakpoint()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCaseNode.IsBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is a break point.

Returns:  True if test step is a break point, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsContainer()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCaseNode.IsContainer "Link to this definition")  
Returns True, if the test step supports calling GetChildren as well as manipulating the structure of its children. (e. g. via inserting or deleting sub test steps).

Returns:  True if it can contain test steps, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsDefaultNode()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCaseNode.IsDefaultNode "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if this is the default node.

Returns:  If default node

Return type:  bool

IsEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCaseNode.IsEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns the state of the test step.

Returns:  True if test step is enabled, otherwise False

Return type:  bool

IsInPostcondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCaseNode.IsInPostcondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a postcondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a postcondition, else Flase

Return type:  bool

IsInPrecondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCaseNode.IsInPrecondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a precondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a precondition, else False

Return type:  bool

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCaseNode.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsReportingDisabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCaseNode.IsReportingDisabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns whether reporting of this test step is disabled.

Returns:  True if reporting is disabled

Return type:  boolean

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCaseNode.IsVisible "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is visible. For CaseNode test steps this depends solely on a parent test step being disabled, since they can not be disabled themselves.

Returns:  True if test step is visible, else False

Return type:  boolean

RemoveTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCaseNode.RemoveTag "Link to this definition")  
Remove a specific tag from this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be removed

RemoveTestStep(*testStep*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCaseNode.RemoveTestStep "Link to this definition")  
Removes a test step from the container.

Parameters:  **testStep** ([`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")) – Test step to be added

Raises:  
ApiError: - When the test step is not a direct child of the container - When the test step is not editable

SetBreakpoint(*enable*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCaseNode.SetBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Sets or unsets the test step to act as a break point.

Parameters:  **enable** (*boolean*) – True if test step is a break point, else False

SetCaseValue(*caseValue='0'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCaseNode.SetCaseValue "Link to this definition")  
Sets the value of the case node.

Parameters:  **caseValue** (*str*) – Case value

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCaseNode.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the current test case language.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCaseNode.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCaseNode.SetTags "Link to this definition")  
Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCaseNode.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCaseNode.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

>

>

>

Checks whether the test step is a break point.

Returns True, if the test step supports calling GetChildren as well as manipulating the structure of its children. (e. g. via inserting or deleting sub test steps).

Returns the behavior of the default case.

Returns:  truth value of the current state

Returns:  True if test step is enabled, otherwise False

IsInPostcondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsSwitchDefCase.IsInPostcondition "Link to this definition")

IsInPrecondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsSwitchDefCase.IsInPrecondition "Link to this definition")

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.TsSwitchDefCase.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

IsReportingDisabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsSwitchDefCase.IsReportingDisabled "Link to this definition")

Returns:  True if reporting is disabled

Return type:  boolean

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.TsSwitchDefCase.IsVisible "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is visible. This depends on the test step itself or a parent test step being disabled.

SetDefaultError(*defaultError*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsSwitchDefCase.SetDefaultError "Link to this definition")  
Sets state of the default case behavior.

Parameters:  **defaultError** (*boolean*) – If set to True, entering the default case will result in an error at runtime.

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsSwitchDefCase.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetSwitchValue(*switchValue='0'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsSwitchDefCase.SetSwitchValue "Link to this definition")

Returns the text value of the “comment” column.

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetError()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCaseDefNode.GetError "Link to this definition")  
Returns a list of errors. Note that the error messages depend on the program language ecu.test is set to. Because of that we do not recommend to check against exact error messages, unless you are certain about the respective program language.

GetReportDisablingResults()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCaseDefNode.GetReportDisablingResults "Link to this definition")

GetTestSteps(*skipDisabledSteps=True*, *recursive=False*, *whiteList=None*, *blackList=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCaseDefNode.GetTestSteps "Link to this definition")  
Returns the children of the test step.

Parameters:  - **skipDisabledSteps** (*boolean*) – Defines whether disabled test steps should be excluded.

- **recursive** (*boolean*) – Specifies whether only the direct children of the test step or recursively all test steps from the complete test step tree should be returned.

- **whiteList** (*list[str]*) – If specified, only those test steps whose class name is on this list are returned.

- **blackList** (*list[str]*) – If specified, only those test steps whose class name is not on this list are returned.

Returns:  List with all children test steps

Return type:  list[[`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")]

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Returns the children of the test step.

Parameters:  - **skipDisabledSteps** (*boolean*) – Defines whether disabled test steps should be excluded.

- **recursive** (*boolean*) – Specifies whether only the direct children of the test step or recursively all test steps from the complete test step tree should be returned.

- **whiteList** (*list[str]*) – If specified, only those test steps whose class name is on this list are returned.

>
> - “TsWait”
>
> - “TsIfThenElse”
>

IsContainer()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesErrorSet.IsContainer "Link to this definition")  
Returns True, if the test step supports calling GetChildren as well as manipulating the structure of its children. (e. g. via inserting or deleting sub test steps).

Returns:  True if it can contain test steps, else False

IsEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesErrorSet.IsEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns the state of the test step.

Returns:  True if test step is enabled, otherwise False

IsInPostcondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesErrorSet.IsInPostcondition "Link to this definition")

IsInPrecondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesErrorSet.IsInPrecondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a precondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a precondition, else False

Return type:  bool

IsKeepErrorsEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesErrorSet.IsKeepErrorsEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns whether currently active errors are merged with the ones configured in the set. Otherwise, existing errors will be reset and only the errors defined in the set will be active.

Returns:  True if errors are merged, False if active errors are reset

Return type:  boolean

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesErrorSet.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsReportingDisabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesErrorSet.IsReportingDisabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns whether reporting of this test step is disabled.

Returns:  True if reporting is disabled

Return type:  boolean

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesErrorSet.IsVisible "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is visible. This depends on the test step itself or a parent test step being disabled.

Returns:  True if test step is visible, else False

Return type:  boolean

SetKeepErrors(*state*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesErrorSet.SetKeepErrors "Link to this definition")

> - ‘INCONCLUSIVE’
>
> - ‘FAILED’
>
> - ‘ERROR’

A list of these values is also possible.

Returns:  The expected verdict

Return type:  str

GetLineNo()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAssertion.GetLineNo "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test steps line number within its test case.

Returns:  Line number

Return type:  int

>
> - ‘d’

>

>
> - ‘h’
>
> - ‘d’

Returns the expression the OUT-Log is checked against.

Returns the text value of the “parameter” column.

Returns:  Parameter column text

Returns the parent test step.

Returns:  The parent test step or None if it is a top level test step.

GetReportDisablingResults()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAssertion.GetReportDisablingResults "Link to this definition")  
Returns for which results reporting of the test step is disabled.

GetTags()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAssertion.GetTags "Link to this definition")  
Returns the tags set for this step.

GetTestManagementId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAssertion.GetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")

GetTestStepId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAssertion.GetTestStepId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test step id.

Returns:  test step id

GetTestSteps(*skipDisabledSteps=True*, *recursive=False*, *whiteList=None*, *blackList=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAssertion.GetTestSteps "Link to this definition")  
Returns the children of the test step.

Parameters:  - **skipDisabledSteps** (*boolean*) – Defines whether disabled test steps should be excluded.

- **recursive** (*boolean*) – Specifies whether only the direct children of the test step or recursively all test steps from the complete test step tree should be returned.

- **whiteList** (*list[str]*) – If specified, only those test steps whose class name is on this list are returned.

- **blackList** (*list[str]*) – If specified, only those test steps whose class name is not on this list are returned.

Returns:  List with all children test steps

Return type:  list[[`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")]

GetTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAssertion.GetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the requested text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAssertion.GetType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the type (class name) of the test step, e.g.

> - “TsPreconditionBlock”
>
> - “TsWait”
>
> - “TsIfThenElse”
>
> - “TsSwitchCase”
>
> - “TsCaseNode”

Returns:  Type (class name) of the test step

Return type:  str

GetValueColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAssertion.GetValueColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “value” column in your current test case language.

Returns:  Value column text

Return type:  str

Parameters:  - **testStep** ([`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")) – Test step to be added

- **position** (*integer*) – Target index of child beginning with 0

IsBreakpoint()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAssertion.IsBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is a break point.

Returns:  True if test step is a break point, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsContainer()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAssertion.IsContainer "Link to this definition")  
Returns True, if the test step supports calling GetChildren as well as manipulating the structure of its children. (e. g. via inserting or deleting sub test steps).

Returns:  True if it can contain test steps, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAssertion.IsEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns the state of the test step.

Returns:  True if test step is enabled, otherwise False

Return type:  bool

IsInPostcondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAssertion.IsInPostcondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a postcondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a postcondition, else Flase

Return type:  bool

IsInPrecondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAssertion.IsInPrecondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a precondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a precondition, else False

Return type:  bool

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAssertion.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsReportingDisabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAssertion.IsReportingDisabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns whether reporting of this test step is disabled.

Returns:  True if reporting is disabled

Return type:  boolean

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAssertion.IsVisible "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is visible. This depends on the test step itself or a parent test step being disabled.

Returns:  True if test step is visible, else False

Return type:  boolean

>

>

## TsMultiCheck[¶](#tsmulticheck "Link to this heading")

*class* TsMultiCheck[¶](#ApiClient.TsMultiCheck "Link to this definition")  
Base classes

- [`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

- [`TestStepContainer`](#ApiClient.TestStepContainer "ApiClient.TestStepContainer")

Returned by

- [`TestStepApi.CreateTsMultiCheck`](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsMultiCheck "ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsMultiCheck")

AddTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsMultiCheck.AddTag "Link to this definition")  
Add a specific tag to this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be set

AppendTestStep(*testStep*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsMultiCheck.AppendTestStep "Link to this definition")  
Adds a test step at the end of the Multi-Check test step.

Parameters:  **testStep** ([`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")) – Test step to be added, either calculation or read test step

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If the test step to be appended is not calculation or read

Clone()[¶](#ApiClient.TsMultiCheck.Clone "Link to this definition")  
Call this method if you want to use API-objects in multiple contexts, e.g. if you want to insert a specific test step in multiple blocks.

Returns:  A copy of this object

Return type:  [`TsMultiCheck`](#ApiClient.TsMultiCheck "ApiClient.TsMultiCheck")

DeactivateTimeOption()[¶](#ApiClient.TsMultiCheck.DeactivateTimeOption "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates any time option set on the test step. This is equivalent to selecting the option “none” in the test step’s time options menu.

DeleteTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsMultiCheck.DeleteTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Deletes a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

DisableReporting(*disable=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsMultiCheck.DisableReporting "Link to this definition")
