Parameters:  **disable** (*boolean*) – If True the result of this test step will not be reported (optional)

DisableReportingFor(*results*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsMultiCheck.DisableReportingFor "Link to this definition")  
Sets for which results reporting of the test step is disabled.

Parameters:  **results** (*list[str]*) – List of results for which the test step will not be reported. Valid results are: u’NONE’, u’SUCCESS’, u’INCONCLUSIVE’, u’FAILED’, u’ERROR’

GetActionColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsMultiCheck.GetActionColumnText "Link to this definition")

Returns:  Action column text

GetActiveTimeOptionType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsMultiCheck.GetActiveTimeOptionType "Link to this definition")

GetComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsMultiCheck.GetComment "Link to this definition")

Return type:  str

GetCommentColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsMultiCheck.GetCommentColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column.

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetError()[¶](#ApiClient.TsMultiCheck.GetError "Link to this definition")  
Returns a list of errors. Note that the error messages depend on the program language ecu.test is set to. Because of that we do not recommend to check against exact error messages, unless you are certain about the respective program language.

Returns:  List of errors

Return type:  list[str]

GetLineNo()[¶](#ApiClient.TsMultiCheck.GetLineNo "Link to this definition")

SetFullFilledForEach(*value*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsMultiCheck.SetFullFilledForEach "Link to this definition")  
Sets the expectation, the Multi-Check is fulfilled for. If value is True, the expectation will be set to “each test step”, else it will be “least one test step”

Parameters:  **value** (*boolean*) – True, for “each test step”, False for “least one test step”

SetTimeOptionOnlySynchronization(*timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsMultiCheck.SetTimeOptionOnlySynchronization "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “only synchronization”.

Parameters:  - **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout in ms to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – The polling cycle in ms or s or min or h or d. Might be left out.

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h, or d)

SetTimeOptionPollingCycleMultiplier(*pollingCycleMultiplier*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsMultiCheck.SetTimeOptionPollingCycleMultiplier "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “polling cycle multiplier”. This option must only be used when inserting the test step into a Multi-Check!

Parameters:  **pollingCycleMultiplier** (*string*) – The polling cycle multiplier to be used.

SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeast(*minimumDuration*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsMultiCheck.SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeast "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “true for at least”.

Parameters:  - **minimumDuration** (*string*) – The minimum duration to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h, or d)

SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeastWithin(*minimumDuration*, *timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsMultiCheck.SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeastWithin "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “true for at least … within …”.

Parameters:  - **minimumDuration** (*string*) – The minimum duration in ms to be used

- **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h, or d)

SetTimeOptionWaitUntilTrue(*timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsMultiCheck.SetTimeOptionWaitUntilTrue "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “wait until true”.

Parameters:  - **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used.

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h, or d).

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsMultiCheck.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

## TsBlock[¶](#tsblock "Link to this heading")

*class* TsBlock[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock "Link to this definition")

Adds a test step at the end of the container.

Parameters:  **testStep** ([`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")) – Test step to be added

Clone()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.Clone "Link to this definition")  
Call this method if you want to use API-objects in multiple contexts, e.g. if you want to insert a specific test step in multiple blocks.

Returns:  A copy of this object

Return type:  [`TsBlock`](#ApiClient.TsBlock "ApiClient.TsBlock")

DeleteTranslatedActionColumnText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.DeleteTranslatedActionColumnText "Link to this definition")

DeleteTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.DeleteTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Deletes a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

DeleteTranslatedParameterColumnText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.DeleteTranslatedParameterColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Deletes the text value to be displayed in the parameter column of the test case editor in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

DeleteTranslatedValueColumnText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.DeleteTranslatedValueColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Deletes the text value to be displayed in the value column of the test case editor in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

DisableReporting(*disable=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.DisableReporting "Link to this definition")  
Disables or enables the reporting this test step.

Parameters:  **disable** (*boolean*) – If True the result of this test step will not be reported (optional)

DisableReportingFor(*results*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.DisableReportingFor "Link to this definition")  
Sets for which results reporting of the test step is disabled.

Parameters:  **results** (*list[str]*) – List of results for which the test step will not be reported. Valid results are: u’NONE’, u’SUCCESS’, u’INCONCLUSIVE’, u’FAILED’, u’ERROR’

GetAbortCode()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.GetAbortCode "Link to this definition")  
Returns the abort code of the block.

Returns:  Abort code

Return type:  str

GetAbortComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.GetAbortComment "Link to this definition")  
Returns the abort comment of the block.

Returns:  Abort comment

Return type:  str

GetAbortCondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.GetAbortCondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns the abort condition of the block.

Returns:  one of [‘ERROR’, ‘ERROR_OR_FAILED’, ‘ERROR_OR_FAILED_OR_INCONCLUSIVE’]

Return type:  str

GetActionColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.GetActionColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “action” column in your current test case language.

Returns:  Action column text

Return type:  str

GetComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.GetComment "Link to this definition")  
Returns the comment of the test step in the current test case language.

Returns:  Comment text as shown in the comment tab

Return type:  str

GetCommentColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.GetCommentColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column.

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetError()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.GetError "Link to this definition")  
Returns a list of errors. Note that the error messages depend on the program language ecu.test is set to. Because of that we do not recommend to check against exact error messages, unless you are certain about the respective program language.

Returns:  List of errors

Return type:  list[str]

GetLineNo()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.GetLineNo "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test steps line number within its test case.

Returns:  Line number

Return type:  int

GetParameterColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.GetParameterColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “parameter” column.

Returns:  Parameter column text

Return type:  str

GetParent()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.GetParent "Link to this definition")  
Returns the parent test step.

Returns:  The parent test step or None if it is a top level test step.

Return type:  [`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

GetReportDisablingResults()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.GetReportDisablingResults "Link to this definition")  
Returns for which results reporting of the test step is disabled.

Returns:  List of results for which the test step will not be reported

Return type:  list[str]

GetTags()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.GetTags "Link to this definition")  
Returns the tags set for this step.

Returns:  A (sorted) list of tags

Return type:  list[str]

GetTestManagementId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.GetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test management id of the test step.

Returns:  Test step id.

Return type:  str

GetTestStepId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.GetTestStepId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test step id.

Returns:  test step id

Return type:  str

GetTestSteps(*skipDisabledSteps=True*, *recursive=False*, *whiteList=None*, *blackList=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.GetTestSteps "Link to this definition")  
Returns the children of the test step.

Parameters:  - **skipDisabledSteps** (*boolean*) – Defines whether disabled test steps should be excluded.

- **recursive** (*boolean*) – Specifies whether only the direct children of the test step or recursively all test steps from the complete test step tree should be returned.

- **whiteList** (*list[str]*) – If specified, only those test steps whose class name is on this list are returned.

- **blackList** (*list[str]*) – If specified, only those test steps whose class name is not on this list are returned.

Returns:  List with all children test steps

Return type:  list[[`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")]

GetTranslatedActionColumnText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.GetTranslatedActionColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “action” column in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the requested text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Returns:  Action column text

Return type:  str

GetTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.GetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the requested text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetTranslatedParameterColumnText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.GetTranslatedParameterColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “parameter” column in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the requested text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Returns:  Value column text

Return type:  str

GetTranslatedValueColumnText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.GetTranslatedValueColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “value” column in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the requested text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Returns:  Value column text

Return type:  str

GetType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.GetType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the type (class name) of the test step, e.g.

> - “TsPreconditionBlock”
>
> - “TsWait”
>
> - “TsIfThenElse”
>
> - “TsSwitchCase”
>
> - “TsCaseNode”

Returns:  Type (class name) of the test step

Return type:  str

GetValueColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.GetValueColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “value” column in your current test case language.

Returns:  Value column text

Return type:  str

InsertTestStep(*testStep*, *position*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.InsertTestStep "Link to this definition")  
Adds a test step at a certain position of the container.

Parameters:  - **testStep** ([`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")) – Test step to be added

- **position** (*integer*) – Target index of child beginning with 0

IsBreakpoint()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.IsBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is a break point.

Returns:  True if test step is a break point, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsConditionalAbortEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.IsConditionalAbortEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns if the conditional abort of the block test step is enabled.

Returns:  Conditional abort enabled

Return type:  boolean

IsContainer()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.IsContainer "Link to this definition")  
Returns True, if the test step supports calling GetChildren as well as manipulating the structure of its children. (e. g. via inserting or deleting sub test steps).

Returns:  True if it can contain test steps, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.IsEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns the state of the test step.

Returns:  True if test step is enabled, otherwise False

Return type:  bool

IsInPostcondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.IsInPostcondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a postcondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a postcondition, else Flase

Return type:  bool

IsInPrecondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.IsInPrecondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a precondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a precondition, else False

Return type:  bool

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsOverrideAbortInfoEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.IsOverrideAbortInfoEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns if the block override abort information of underlying test steps.

Returns:  Conditional abort enabled

Return type:  boolean

IsReportingDisabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.IsReportingDisabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns whether reporting of this test step is disabled.

Returns:  True if reporting is disabled

Return type:  boolean

IsUserInteractionEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.IsUserInteractionEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns if the block is set to be a user interaction.

Returns:  User interaction status

Return type:  boolean

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.IsVisible "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is visible. This depends on the test step itself or a parent test step being disabled.

Returns:  True if test step is visible, else False

Return type:  boolean

RemoveTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.RemoveTag "Link to this definition")  
Remove a specific tag from this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be removed

RemoveTestStep(*testStep*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.RemoveTestStep "Link to this definition")  
Removes a test step from the container.

Parameters:  **testStep** ([`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")) – Test step to be added

Raises:  
ApiError: - When the test step is not a direct child of the container - When the test step is not editable

SetAbortCode(*code*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.SetAbortCode "Link to this definition")  
Sets the abort code of the block.

Parameters:  **code** (*str*) – Abort code

SetAbortComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.SetAbortComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets the abort comment of the block.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Abort comment

SetAbortCondition(*condition*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.SetAbortCondition "Link to this definition")  
Sets the abort condition of the block. Must be one of [‘ERROR’, ‘ERROR_OR_FAILED’, ‘ERROR_OR_FAILED_OR_INCONCLUSIVE’], otherwise the command raises an error.

Parameters:  **condition** (*str*) – Abort condition

SetActionColumnText(*text*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.SetActionColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Sets the text value to be displayed in the action column of the test case editor in your current test case language.

Parameters:  **text** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

SetBreakpoint(*enable*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.SetBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Sets or unsets the test step to act as a break point.

Parameters:  **enable** (*boolean*) – True if test step is a break point, else False

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the current test case language.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

SetConditionalAbort(*abort=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.SetConditionalAbort "Link to this definition")  
Sets the conditional abort status of the block.

Parameters:  **abort** (*boolean*) – Conditional abort status

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetOverrideAbortInfo(*override*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.SetOverrideAbortInfo "Link to this definition")  
Sets the override abort information status.

Parameters:  **override** (*boolean*) – Override abort information status

SetParameterColumnText(*text*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.SetParameterColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Sets the text value to be displayed in the parameter column of the test case editor.

Parameters:  **text** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.SetTags "Link to this definition")  
Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTranslatedActionColumnText(*text*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.SetTranslatedActionColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Sets the text value for the action column of the test case editor in the given language.

Parameters:  - **text** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

SetTranslatedParameterColumnText(*text*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.SetTranslatedParameterColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Sets the text value to be displayed in the parameter column of the test case editor in the given language.

Parameters:  - **text** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

SetTranslatedValueColumnText(*text*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.SetTranslatedValueColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Sets the text value to be displayed in the value column of the test case editor in the given language.

Parameters:  - **text** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

SetUserInteraction(*interactive=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.SetUserInteraction "Link to this definition")  
Sets if the block is user interactive.

Parameters:  **interactive** (*boolean*) – User interaction status

SetValueColumnText(*text*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsBlock.SetValueColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Sets the text value to be displayed in the value column of the test case editor in your current test case language.

Parameters:  **text** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

Sets or unsets the test step to act as a break point.

DisableReportingFor(*results*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.DisableReportingFor "Link to this definition")

GetActionColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.GetActionColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “action” column in your current test case language.

GetComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.GetComment "Link to this definition")  
Returns the comment of the test step in the current test case language.

Returns:  Comment text as shown in the comment tab

GetCommentColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.GetCommentColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column.

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetError()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.GetError "Link to this definition")  
Returns a list of errors. Note that the error messages depend on the program language ecu.test is set to. Because of that we do not recommend to check against exact error messages, unless you are certain about the respective program language.

Returns:  List of errors

Return type:  list[str]

GetLineNo()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.GetLineNo "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test steps line number within its test case.

Returns:  Line number

Return type:  int

GetParameterColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.GetParameterColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “parameter” column.

Returns:  Parameter column text

Return type:  str

GetParent()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.GetParent "Link to this definition")  
Returns the parent test step.

Returns:  The parent test step or None if it is a top level test step.

Return type:  [`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

GetReportDisablingResults()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.GetReportDisablingResults "Link to this definition")  
Returns for which results reporting of the test step is disabled.

Returns:  List of results for which the test step will not be reported

Return type:  list[str]

GetTags()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.GetTags "Link to this definition")  
Returns the tags set for this step.

Returns:  A (sorted) list of tags

Return type:  list[str]

GetTestManagementId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.GetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test management id of the test step.

Returns:  Test step id.

Return type:  str

GetTestStepId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.GetTestStepId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test step id.

Returns:  test step id

Return type:  str

GetTestSteps(*skipDisabledSteps=True*, *recursive=False*, *whiteList=None*, *blackList=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.GetTestSteps "Link to this definition")  
Returns the children of the test step.

Parameters:  - **skipDisabledSteps** (*boolean*) – Defines whether disabled test steps should be excluded.

- **recursive** (*boolean*) – Specifies whether only the direct children of the test step or recursively all test steps from the complete test step tree should be returned.

- **whiteList** (*list[str]*) – If specified, only those test steps whose class name is on this list are returned.

- **blackList** (*list[str]*) – If specified, only those test steps whose class name is not on this list are returned.

Returns:  List with all children test steps

Return type:  list[[`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")]

GetTranslatedActionColumnText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.GetTranslatedActionColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “action” column in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the requested text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Returns:  Action column text

Return type:  str

GetTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.GetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the requested text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetTranslatedParameterColumnText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.GetTranslatedParameterColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “parameter” column in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the requested text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Returns:  Value column text

Return type:  str

GetTranslatedValueColumnText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.GetTranslatedValueColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “value” column in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the requested text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Returns:  Value column text

Return type:  str

GetType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.GetType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the type (class name) of the test step, e.g.

> - “TsPreconditionBlock”
>
> - “TsWait”
>
> - “TsIfThenElse”
>
> - “TsSwitchCase”
>
> - “TsCaseNode”

Returns:  Type (class name) of the test step

Return type:  str

GetValueColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.GetValueColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “value” column in your current test case language.

Returns:  Value column text

Return type:  str

InsertTestStep(*testStep*, *position*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.InsertTestStep "Link to this definition")  
Adds a test step at a certain position of the container.

Parameters:  - **testStep** ([`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")) – Test step to be added

- **position** (*integer*) – Target index of child beginning with 0

IsBreakpoint()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.IsBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is a break point.

Returns:  True if test step is a break point, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsContainer()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.IsContainer "Link to this definition")  
Returns True, if the test step supports calling GetChildren as well as manipulating the structure of its children. (e. g. via inserting or deleting sub test steps).

Returns:  True if it can contain test steps, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsEffectTestResultEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.IsEffectTestResultEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns if the verdict of the post condition block effects the global result.

Returns:  Effect test result

Return type:  boolean

IsEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.IsEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns the state of the test step.

Returns:  True if test step is enabled, otherwise False

Return type:  bool

IsExecuteIfAbortedEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.IsExecuteIfAbortedEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns if the post condition block is executed even if the action block is aborted.

Returns:  Execute if aborted

Return type:  boolean

IsInPostcondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.IsInPostcondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a postcondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a postcondition, else Flase

Return type:  bool

IsInPrecondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.IsInPrecondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a precondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a precondition, else False

Return type:  bool

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsOverrideResultEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.IsOverrideResultEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns if the block overrides the result of underlying test steps.

Returns:  Override result enabled

Return type:  boolean

IsReportingDisabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.IsReportingDisabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns whether reporting of this test step is disabled.

Returns:  True if reporting is disabled

Return type:  boolean

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.IsVisible "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is visible. This depends on the test step itself or a parent test step being disabled.

Returns:  True if test step is visible, else False

Return type:  boolean

RemoveTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.RemoveTag "Link to this definition")  
Remove a specific tag from this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be removed

RemoveTestStep(*testStep*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.RemoveTestStep "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  **effect** (*boolean*) – Effect test result

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetExecuteIfAborted(*execute=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.SetExecuteIfAborted "Link to this definition")  
Sets the execution of the post condition block even if the action block is aborted.

Parameters:  **execute** (*boolean*) – Execute if aborted

SetOverrideResult(*override*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.SetOverrideResult "Link to this definition")  
Sets whether the block overrides the result of underlying test steps: NONE and SUCCESS becomes NONE, everything else becomes ERROR.

Parameters:  **override** (*boolean*) – Override result enabled

Sets the text value to be displayed in the parameter column of the test case editor.

Parameters:  **text** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPostconditionBlock.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

Return type:  boolean

IsContainer()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPreconditionBlock.IsContainer "Link to this definition")  
Returns True, if the test step supports calling GetChildren as well as manipulating the structure of its children. (e. g. via inserting or deleting sub test steps).

Returns:  True if it can contain test steps, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPreconditionBlock.IsEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns the state of the test step.

Returns:  True if test step is enabled, otherwise False

Return type:  bool

IsInPostcondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPreconditionBlock.IsInPostcondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a postcondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a postcondition, else Flase

Return type:  bool

IsInPrecondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPreconditionBlock.IsInPrecondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a precondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a precondition, else False

Return type:  bool

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPreconditionBlock.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsOverrideAbortInfoEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPreconditionBlock.IsOverrideAbortInfoEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns if the block override abort information of underlying test steps.

Returns:  Conditional abort enabled

Return type:  boolean

IsReportingDisabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPreconditionBlock.IsReportingDisabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns whether reporting of this test step is disabled.

Returns:  True if reporting is disabled

Return type:  boolean

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPreconditionBlock.IsVisible "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is visible. This depends on the test step itself or a parent test step being disabled.

Returns:  True if test step is visible, else False

Return type:  boolean

RemoveTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPreconditionBlock.RemoveTag "Link to this definition")  
Remove a specific tag from this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be removed

RemoveTestStep(*testStep*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPreconditionBlock.RemoveTestStep "Link to this definition")  
Removes a test step from the container.

Parameters:  **testStep** ([`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")) – Test step to be added

Raises:  
ApiError: - When the test step is not a direct child of the container - When the test step is not editable

SetAbortCode(*code*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPreconditionBlock.SetAbortCode "Link to this definition")  
Sets the abort code of the block.

Parameters:  **code** (*str*) – Abort code

SetAbortComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPreconditionBlock.SetAbortComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets the abort comment of the block.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Abort comment

SetAbortCondition(*condition*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPreconditionBlock.SetAbortCondition "Link to this definition")  
Sets the abort condition of the block. Must be one of ‘ERROR_OR_FAILED’, ‘ERROR_OR_FAILED_OR_INCONCLUSIVE’ otherwise the command raises an error.

Parameters:  **condition** (*str*) – Abort condition

SetBreakpoint(*enable*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPreconditionBlock.SetBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Sets or unsets the test step to act as a break point.

Parameters:  **enable** (*boolean*) – True if test step is a break point, else False

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPreconditionBlock.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the current test case language.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPreconditionBlock.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetOverrideAbortInfo(*override*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPreconditionBlock.SetOverrideAbortInfo "Link to this definition")  
Sets the override abort information status.

Parameters:  **override** (*boolean*) – Override abort information status

SetOverrideResultOption(*option*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPreconditionBlock.SetOverrideResultOption "Link to this definition")  
Specifies which results should be overridden. By default the results INCONCLUSIVE and FAILED will be overridden to ERROR (option ‘INCONCLUSIVE_FAILED_TO_ERROR’). Alternatively INCONCLUSIVE results can be preserved with the option ‘FAILED_TO_ERROR’. Result overriding can be disabled by using the option ‘NO_CHANGE’.

Parameters:  **option** (*str*) – Which results should be overridden. Valid options are ‘INCONCLUSIVE_FAILED_TO_ERROR’, ‘FAILED_TO_ERROR’, ‘NO_CHANGE’.

SetParameterColumnText(*text*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPreconditionBlock.SetParameterColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Sets the text value to be displayed in the parameter column of the test case editor.

Parameters:  **text** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPreconditionBlock.SetTags "Link to this definition")  
Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPreconditionBlock.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPreconditionBlock.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

SetTranslatedParameterColumnText(*text*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPreconditionBlock.SetTranslatedParameterColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Sets the text value to be displayed in the parameter column of the test case editor in the given language.

Parameters:  - **text** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

SetTranslatedValueColumnText(*text*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPreconditionBlock.SetTranslatedValueColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Sets the text value to be displayed in the value column of the test case editor in the given language.

Parameters:  - **text** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

SetValueColumnText(*text*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPreconditionBlock.SetValueColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Sets the text value to be displayed in the value column of the test case editor in your current test case language.

Parameters:  **text** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

IsOverrideResultEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPreconditionBlock.IsOverrideResultEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns if the block overrides the result of underlying test steps.

Returns:  Override result enabled

Return type:  boolean

Deprecated since version 2022.1.0: Use [`GetOverrideResultOption()`](#ApiClient.TsPreconditionBlock.GetOverrideResultOption "ApiClient.TsPreconditionBlock.GetOverrideResultOption") instead.

SetOverrideResult(*override*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPreconditionBlock.SetOverrideResult "Link to this definition")  
Sets whether the block overrides the result of underlying test steps: NONE and SUCCESS becomes NONE, everything else becomes ERROR.

Parameters:  **override** (*boolean*) – Override result enabled

Deprecated since version 2022.1.0: Use [`SetOverrideResultOption()`](#ApiClient.TsPreconditionBlock.SetOverrideResultOption "ApiClient.TsPreconditionBlock.SetOverrideResultOption") instead.

## TsInfoBlock[¶](#tsinfoblock "Link to this heading")

AllowTestAbort(*allow=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInfoBlock.AllowTestAbort "Link to this definition")  
Sets whether the whole test can be aborted. If True, the dialog will contain a button to abort the test.

Clone()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInfoBlock.Clone "Link to this definition")  
Call this method if you want to use API-objects in multiple contexts, e.g. if you want to insert a specific test step in multiple blocks.

Returns:  A copy of this object

Return type:  [`TsInfoBlock`](#ApiClient.TsInfoBlock "ApiClient.TsInfoBlock")

DeactivateTimeOutExpression()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInfoBlock.DeactivateTimeOutExpression "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the time out option.

DeleteTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInfoBlock.DeleteTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")

DisableReporting(*disable=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInfoBlock.DisableReporting "Link to this definition")

DisableReportingFor(*results*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInfoBlock.DisableReportingFor "Link to this definition")  
Sets for which results reporting of the test step is disabled.

Parameters:  **results** (*list[str]*) – List of results for which the test step will not be reported. Valid results are: u’NONE’, u’SUCCESS’, u’INCONCLUSIVE’, u’FAILED’, u’ERROR’

GetActionColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInfoBlock.GetActionColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “action” column.

Returns:  Action column text

Return type:  str

GetBlockAbortTimeOutExpression()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInfoBlock.GetBlockAbortTimeOutExpression "Link to this definition")  
Returns the time out expression that defines that maximum user input time in seconds. If the user exceeds this time the test step will be aborted.

Returns:  Time out expression

Return type:  str

GetComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInfoBlock.GetComment "Link to this definition")  
Returns the comment of the test step in the current test case language.

Returns:  Comment text as shown in the comment tab

Return type:  str

GetCommentColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInfoBlock.GetCommentColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column.

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetDialogHeightExpression()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInfoBlock.GetDialogHeightExpression "Link to this definition")

GetDialogWidthExpression()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInfoBlock.GetDialogWidthExpression "Link to this definition")  
Returns the width expression of the dialog.

Returns:  Width expression

Return type:  str

GetDisplayText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInfoBlock.GetDisplayText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the display text of the dialog.

Returns:  Display text

Return type:  str

GetError()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInfoBlock.GetError "Link to this definition")  
Returns a list of errors. Note that the error messages depend on the program language ecu.test is set to. Because of that we do not recommend to check against exact error messages, unless you are certain about the respective program language.

Returns:  List of errors

Return type:  list[str]

GetLineNo()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInfoBlock.GetLineNo "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test steps line number within its test case.

Returns:  Line number

GetName()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInfoBlock.GetName "Link to this definition")  
Returns the name of the info block dialog.

Returns:  Name of the dialog

GetParameterColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInfoBlock.GetParameterColumnText "Link to this definition")

Returns:  Parameter column text

GetReportDisablingResults()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInfoBlock.GetReportDisablingResults "Link to this definition")  
Returns for which results reporting of the test step is disabled.

Returns:  List of results for which the test step will not be reported

Return type:  list[str]

GetTags()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInfoBlock.GetTags "Link to this definition")  
Returns the tags set for this step.

Returns:  A (sorted) list of tags

Return type:  list[str]

GetTestManagementId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInfoBlock.GetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test management id of the test step.

Returns:  Test step id.

Return type:  str

GetTestStepId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInfoBlock.GetTestStepId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test step id.

Return type:  str

GetTestSteps(*skipDisabledSteps=True*, *recursive=False*, *whiteList=None*, *blackList=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInfoBlock.GetTestSteps "Link to this definition")  
Returns the children of the test step.

Parameters:  - **skipDisabledSteps** (*boolean*) – Defines whether disabled test steps should be excluded.

- **recursive** (*boolean*) – Specifies whether only the direct children of the test step or recursively all test steps from the complete test step tree should be returned.

- **whiteList** (*list[str]*) – If specified, only those test steps whose class name is on this list are returned.

- **blackList** (*list[str]*) – If specified, only those test steps whose class name is not on this list are returned.

Returns:  List with all children test steps

Return type:  list[[`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")]

GetTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInfoBlock.GetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInfoBlock.GetType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the type (class name) of the test step, e.g.

> - “TsPreconditionBlock”
>
> - “TsWait”
>
> - “TsIfThenElse”
>
> - “TsSwitchCase”
>
> - “TsCaseNode”

Returns:  Type (class name) of the test step

Return type:  str

GetValueColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInfoBlock.GetValueColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “value” column in your current test case language.

Returns:  Value column text

Return type:  str

- **position** (*integer*) – Target index of child beginning with 0

SetBlockAbortTimeOutExpression(*timeoutExpr*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInfoBlock.SetBlockAbortTimeOutExpression "Link to this definition")  
Sets the time out expression that defines the maximum user input time in seconds. If the user exceeds this time the test step will be aborted. This option will not have any effect if block abort is not allowed.

GetTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.Testcase.GetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the requested text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetType()[¶](#ApiClient.Testcase.GetType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the type (class name) of the test step, e.g.

> - “TsPreconditionBlock”
>
> - “TsWait”
>
> - “TsIfThenElse”
>
> - “TsSwitchCase”
>
> - “TsCaseNode”

Returns:  Type (class name) of the test step

Return type:  str

GetValueColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.Testcase.GetValueColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “value” column in your current test case language.

Returns:  Value column text

Return type:  str

InsertTestStep(*testStep*, *position*)[¶](#ApiClient.Testcase.InsertTestStep "Link to this definition")  
Adds a test step at a certain position of the container.

Parameters:  - **testStep** ([`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")) – Test step to be added

- **position** (*integer*) – Target index of child beginning with 0

IsBreakpoint()[¶](#ApiClient.Testcase.IsBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is a break point.

Returns:  True if test step is a break point, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsContainer()[¶](#ApiClient.Testcase.IsContainer "Link to this definition")  
Returns True, if the test step supports calling GetChildren as well as manipulating the structure of its children. (e. g. via inserting or deleting sub test steps).

Returns:  True if it can contain test steps, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.Testcase.IsEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns the state of the test step.

Returns:  True if test step is enabled, otherwise False

Return type:  bool

IsInPostcondition()[¶](#ApiClient.Testcase.IsInPostcondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a postcondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a postcondition, else Flase

Return type:  bool

IsInPrecondition()[¶](#ApiClient.Testcase.IsInPrecondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a precondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a precondition, else False

Return type:  bool

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.Testcase.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsReportingDisabled()[¶](#ApiClient.Testcase.IsReportingDisabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns whether reporting of this test step is disabled.

Returns:  True if reporting is disabled

Return type:  boolean

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.Testcase.IsVisible "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is visible. This depends on the test step itself or a parent test step being disabled.

Returns:  True if test step is visible, else False

Return type:  boolean

RemoveTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.Testcase.RemoveTag "Link to this definition")  
Remove a specific tag from this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be removed

RemoveTestStep(*testStep*)[¶](#ApiClient.Testcase.RemoveTestStep "Link to this definition")  
Removes a test step from the container.

Parameters:  **testStep** ([`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")) – Test step to be added

Raises:  
ApiError: - When the test step is not a direct child of the container - When the test step is not editable

SetBreakpoint(*enable*)[¶](#ApiClient.Testcase.SetBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Sets or unsets the test step to act as a break point.

Parameters:  **enable** (*boolean*) – True if test step is a break point, else False

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.Testcase.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the current test case language.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.Testcase.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.Testcase.SetTags "Link to this definition")  
Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.Testcase.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.Testcase.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

## TsPackageCall[¶](#tspackagecall "Link to this heading")

*class* TsPackageCall[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall "Link to this definition")  
Base class

[`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

Returned by

- [`TestStepApi.CreateTsPackageCall`](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsPackageCall "ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsPackageCall")

Subclasses

- [`TsParallelPackageCall`](#ApiClient.TsParallelPackageCall "ApiClient.TsParallelPackageCall")

- [`TsParallelRttPackageCall`](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackageCall "ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackageCall")

- [`TsRttPackageCall`](#ApiClient.TsRttPackageCall "ApiClient.TsRttPackageCall")

AddTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.AddTag "Link to this definition")  
Add a specific tag to this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be set

Clone()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.Clone "Link to this definition")  
Call this method if you want to use API-objects in multiple contexts, e.g. if you want to insert a specific test step in multiple blocks.

Returns:  A copy of this object

Return type:  [`TsPackageCall`](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall "ApiClient.TsPackageCall")

DeleteTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.DeleteTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Deletes a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

DisableReporting(*disable=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.DisableReporting "Link to this definition")  
Disables or enables the reporting of this test step.

Parameters:  **disable** (*boolean*) – If True the result of this test step will not be reported (optional)

DisableReportingFor(*results*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.DisableReportingFor "Link to this definition")  
Sets results for which reporting of the test step is to be disabled.

Parameters:  **results** (*list[str]*) – List of results for which the test step will not be reported. Valid results are: u’NONE’, u’SUCCESS’, u’INCONCLUSIVE’, u’FAILED’, u’ERROR’.

GetAbsolutePath()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.GetAbsolutePath "Link to this definition")  
Returns the absolute file path of the referenced package.

Returns:  Absolute file path of the package to be called. None if there is no path to a referenced package.

Return type:  str

GetActionColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.GetActionColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “action” column.

Returns:  Action column text

Return type:  str

GetComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.GetComment "Link to this definition")  
Returns the comment of the test step in the current test case language.

Returns:  Comment text as shown in the comment tab

Return type:  str

GetCommentColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.GetCommentColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column.

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetError()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.GetError "Link to this definition")  
Returns a list of errors. Note that the error messages depend on the program language ecu.test is set to. Because of that we do not recommend to check against exact error messages, unless you are certain about the respective program language.

Returns:  List of errors

Return type:  list[str]

GetLineNo()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.GetLineNo "Link to this definition")  
Returns the line number of the test step inside the test case.

Returns:  Line number of the test step

Return type:  int

GetMappingNames()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.GetMappingNames "Link to this definition")  
Returns the names of all mapping items mapped in the test step. Unmapped generic mappings of the called package are not returned. For the mapping item that defines the referenced package, see [`GetReferencedPackageMappingName()`](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.GetReferencedPackageMappingName "ApiClient.TsPackageCall.GetReferencedPackageMappingName").

Returns:  List of mapping names

Return type:  list[str]

GetMappingTarget(*name*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.GetMappingTarget "Link to this definition")  
Returns the target path of the mapping item of the parameterized mapping of the package call.

Parameters:  **name** (*str*) – Name of the mapping item

Returns:  Target path of the mapping item

Return type:  str

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If there is no mapping item with the given name

GetPackageParameter(*paramName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.GetPackageParameter "Link to this definition")  
Retrieves the expression assigned to a package parameter.

Parameters:  **paramName** (*str*) – Name of the parameter

Returns:  Expression assigned to the parameter

Return type:  str

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If paramName does not exist.

GetPackageParameters()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.GetPackageParameters "Link to this definition")  
Retrieves all package parameters with its expressions.

Returns:  Dictionary of \<parameter name, expression\> items

Return type:  dict[str, str]

GetPackageReturn(*varInternal*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.GetPackageReturn "Link to this definition")  
Retrieves the variable name assigned to a package return variable name of the referenced package.

Parameters:  **varInternal** (*str*) – Name of the return variable of the referenced package

Returns:  Assigned variable of the calling package. Empty string if there is not any variable assigned.

Return type:  str

GetPackageReturns()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.GetPackageReturns "Link to this definition")  
Retrieves all return variable assignments.

Returns:  Dictionary of \<return variable name of the referenced package, variable name of the calling package\> items

Return type:  dict[str, str]

GetParameterColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.GetParameterColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “parameter” column.

Returns:  Parameter column text

Return type:  str

GetParent()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.GetParent "Link to this definition")  
Returns the parent test step.

Returns:  The parent test step or None if it is a top level test step.

Return type:  [`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

GetPath()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.GetPath "Link to this definition")  
Returns the path of the package referenced in the package mapping item used for this package call. For local packages and packages in referenced library workspaces this path has ‘\<namespace.packages\>’ notation. For generic package calls this path is ‘PACKAGE’. Any other calls are regarded to be external - the absolute package path is returned.

Returns:  Target path of the package to be called. None if there is no path to a referenced package.

Return type:  str

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If there is no local package mapping in the package

GetReferencedPackage()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.GetReferencedPackage "Link to this definition")  
Returns the referenced package. If the path contains global constants, their current values are used.

Returns:  The referenced package. None if there is no path to a referenced package.

Return type:  [`Package`](PackageApi.md#ApiClient.Package "ApiClient.Package")

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If the referenced package does not exist.

GetReferencedPackageMappingName()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.GetReferencedPackageMappingName "Link to this definition")  
Returns the reference name of the package mapping item used by this test step. For the mapping items used by the called package, see [`GetMappingNames()`](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.GetMappingNames "ApiClient.TsPackageCall.GetMappingNames").

Returns:  Reference name of the used mapping item.

Return type:  str

GetReportDisablingResults()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.GetReportDisablingResults "Link to this definition")  
Returns all results for which reporting of the test step is disabled.

Returns:  List of results for which the test step will not be reported

Return type:  list[str]

GetTags()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.GetTags "Link to this definition")  
Returns the tags set for this step.

Returns:  A (sorted) list of tags

Return type:  list[str]

GetTestManagementId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.GetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test management id of the test step.

Returns:  Test step id.

Return type:  str

GetTestStepId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.GetTestStepId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test step id.

Returns:  test step id

Return type:  str

GetTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.GetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the requested text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.GetType "Link to this definition")

> - “TsPreconditionBlock”
>
> - “TsWait”
>
> - “TsIfThenElse”
>
> - “TsSwitchCase”
>
> - “TsCaseNode”

Returns:  Type (class name) of the test step

Returns the text value of the “value” column in your current test case language.

Returns:  Value column text

Return type:  str

Checks whether the test step is a break point.

Returns:  True if test step is a break point, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsContainer()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.IsContainer "Link to this definition")  
Returns True, if the test step supports calling GetChildren as well as manipulating the structure of its children. (e. g. via inserting or deleting sub test steps).

Returns:  True if it can contain test steps, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.IsEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns the state of the test step.

Returns:  True if test step is enabled, otherwise False

Return type:  bool

IsInPostcondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.IsInPostcondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a postcondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a postcondition, else Flase

Return type:  bool

IsInPrecondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.IsInPrecondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a precondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a precondition, else False

Return type:  bool

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsReportingDisabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.IsReportingDisabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns whether reporting of this test step is disabled.

Returns:  True if reporting is disabled

Return type:  boolean

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.IsVisible "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is visible. This depends on the test step itself or a parent test step being disabled.

Returns:  True if test step is visible, else False

Return type:  boolean

RemoveTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.RemoveTag "Link to this definition")  
Remove a specific tag from this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be removed

SetBreakpoint(*enable*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.SetBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Sets or unsets the test step to act as a break point.

Parameters:  **enable** (*boolean*) – True if test step is a break point, else False

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the current test case language.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetMappingTarget(*name*, *target*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.SetMappingTarget "Link to this definition")  
For the referenced package, sets the target path of the parameterized mapping item with the given name. There is no check whether a mapping item with the given name exists within the referenced package. If a check is required, the referenced package can be examined separately using the PackageApi.

Parameters:  - **name** (*str*) – Name of the mapping item in the referenced package.

- **target** (*str*) – Non-empty target path of the mapping item

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If an empty target path or None was given

SetPackageParameter(*paramName*, *paramValue*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.SetPackageParameter "Link to this definition")  
Assigns a value to a package parameter. If there is no parameter with the given name yet, an additional entry is added.

Parameters:  - **paramName** (*str*) – Name of the parameter

- **paramValue** (*str*) – Value to assign to the parameter (can be an expression)

SetPackageParameters(*paramDict*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.SetPackageParameters "Link to this definition")  
Replaces all package parameters by the given paramDict.

Parameters:  **paramDict** (*dict[str,* *str]*) – Dictionary of \<parameter name, expression\> items

SetPackageReturn(*varInternal*, *varExternal*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.SetPackageReturn "Link to this definition")  
Assigns a variable name of the calling package to a return variable name of the referenced package.

Parameters:  - **varInternal** (*str*) – Return variable name of the referenced package

- **varExternal** (*str*) – Variable name of the calling package to assign the return variable name to.

SetPackageReturns(*returnDict*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.SetPackageReturns "Link to this definition")  
Replaces package returns by the given returnDict.

Parameters:  **returnDict** (*dict[str,* *str]*) – Dictionary of \<return variable name of the referenced package, variable name of the calling package\> items

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.SetTags "Link to this definition")  
Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

UnsetPackageReturn(*varInternal*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackageCall.UnsetPackageReturn "Link to this definition")  
Removes an assignment of a variable name of the calling package to a return variable name of the referenced package.

Parameters:  **varInternal** (*str*) – Return variable name of the referenced package

IsInPostcondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelPackageCall.IsInPostcondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a postcondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a postcondition, else Flase

Return type:  bool

IsInPrecondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelPackageCall.IsInPrecondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a precondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a precondition, else False

Return type:  bool

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelPackageCall.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsReportingDisabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelPackageCall.IsReportingDisabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns whether reporting of this test step is disabled.

Returns:  True if reporting is disabled

Return type:  boolean

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelPackageCall.IsVisible "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is visible. This depends on the test step itself or a parent test step being disabled.

Returns:  True if test step is visible, else False

Return type:  boolean

RemoveTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelPackageCall.RemoveTag "Link to this definition")  
Remove a specific tag from this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be removed

SetBreakpoint(*enable*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelPackageCall.SetBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Sets or unsets the test step to act as a break point.

Parameters:  **enable** (*boolean*) – True if test step is a break point, else False

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelPackageCall.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the current test case language.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelPackageCall.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetPackageParameter(*paramName*, *paramValue*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelPackageCall.SetPackageParameter "Link to this definition")  
Assigns a value to a package parameter. If there is no parameter with the given name yet, an additional entry is added.

Parameters:  - **paramName** (*str*) – Name of the parameter

- **paramValue** (*str*) – Value to assign to the parameter (can be an expression)

SetPackageParameters(*paramDict*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelPackageCall.SetPackageParameters "Link to this definition")  
Replaces all package parameters by the given paramDict.

Parameters:  **paramDict** (*dict[str,* *str]*) – Dictionary of \<parameter name, expression\> items

SetPackageReturn(*varInternal*, *varExternal*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelPackageCall.SetPackageReturn "Link to this definition")  
Assigns a variable name of the calling package to a return variable name of the referenced package.

Parameters:  - **varInternal** (*str*) – Return variable name of the referenced package

- **varExternal** (*str*) – Variable name of the calling package to assign the return variable name to.

SetPackageReturns(*returnDict*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelPackageCall.SetPackageReturns "Link to this definition")  
Replaces package returns by the given returnDict.

Parameters:  **returnDict** (*dict[str,* *str]*) – Dictionary of \<return variable name of the referenced package, variable name of the calling package\> items

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelPackageCall.SetTags "Link to this definition")  
Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelPackageCall.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelPackageCall.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

UnsetPackageReturn(*varInternal*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelPackageCall.UnsetPackageReturn "Link to this definition")  
Removes an assignment of a variable name of the calling package to a return variable name of the referenced package.

Parameters:  **varInternal** (*str*) – Return variable name of the referenced package

Call this method if you want to use API-objects in multiple contexts, e.g. if you want to insert a specific test step in multiple blocks.

Returns:  A copy of this object

DisableReporting(*disable=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackageCall.DisableReporting "Link to this definition")  
Disables or enables the reporting of this test step.

Parameters:  **disable** (*boolean*) – If True the result of this test step will not be reported (optional)

DisableReportingFor(*results*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackageCall.DisableReportingFor "Link to this definition")  
Sets results for which reporting of the test step is to be disabled.

Parameters:  **results** (*list[str]*) – List of results for which the test step will not be reported. Valid results are: u’NONE’, u’SUCCESS’, u’INCONCLUSIVE’, u’FAILED’, u’ERROR’.

GetAbsolutePath()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackageCall.GetAbsolutePath "Link to this definition")  
Returns the absolute file path of the referenced package.

Returns:  Absolute file path of the package to be called. None if there is no path to a referenced package.

Return type:  str

GetActionColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackageCall.GetActionColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “action” column.

Returns:  Action column text

Return type:  str

GetComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackageCall.GetComment "Link to this definition")  
Returns the comment of the test step in the current test case language.

Returns:  Comment text as shown in the comment tab

Return type:  str

GetCommentColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackageCall.GetCommentColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column.

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetError()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackageCall.GetError "Link to this definition")  
Returns a list of errors. Note that the error messages depend on the program language ecu.test is set to. Because of that we do not recommend to check against exact error messages, unless you are certain about the respective program language.

Returns:  List of errors

Return type:  list[str]

GetLineNo()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackageCall.GetLineNo "Link to this definition")  
Returns the line number of the test step inside the test case.

Returns:  Line number of the test step

Return type:  int

GetPackageParameter(*paramName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackageCall.GetPackageParameter "Link to this definition")  
Retrieves the expression assigned to a package parameter.

Parameters:  **paramName** (*str*) – Name of the parameter

Returns:  Expression assigned to the parameter

Return type:  str

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If paramName does not exist.

GetPackageParameters()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackageCall.GetPackageParameters "Link to this definition")  
Retrieves all package parameters with its expressions.

Returns:  Dictionary of \<parameter name, expression\> items

Return type:  dict[str, str]

GetPackageReturn(*varInternal*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackageCall.GetPackageReturn "Link to this definition")  
Retrieves the variable name assigned to a package return variable name of the referenced package.

Parameters:  **varInternal** (*str*) – Name of the return variable of the referenced package

Returns:  Assigned variable of the calling package. Empty string if there is not any variable assigned.

Return type:  str

GetPackageReturns()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackageCall.GetPackageReturns "Link to this definition")  
Retrieves all return variable assignments.

Returns:  Dictionary of \<return variable name of the referenced package, variable name of the calling package\> items

Return type:  dict[str, str]

GetParameterColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackageCall.GetParameterColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “parameter” column.

Returns:  Parameter column text

Return type:  str

GetParent()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackageCall.GetParent "Link to this definition")  
Returns the parent test step.

Returns:  The parent test step or None if it is a top level test step.

Return type:  [`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

GetPath()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackageCall.GetPath "Link to this definition")  
Returns the path of the package referenced in the package mapping item used for this package call. For local packages and packages in referenced library workspaces this path has ‘\<namespace.packages\>’ notation. For generic package calls this path is ‘PACKAGE’. Any other calls are regarded to be external - the absolute package path is returned.

Returns:  Target path of the package to be called. None if there is no path to a referenced package.

Return type:  str

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If there is no local package mapping in the package

GetReferencedPackage()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackageCall.GetReferencedPackage "Link to this definition")  
Returns the referenced package. If the path contains global constants, their current values are used.

Returns:  The referenced package. None if there is no path to a referenced package.

Return type:  [`Package`](PackageApi.md#ApiClient.Package "ApiClient.Package")

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If the referenced package does not exist.

GetReferencedPackageMappingName()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackageCall.GetReferencedPackageMappingName "Link to this definition")  
Returns the reference name of the package mapping item used by this test step. For the mapping items used by the called package, see [`GetMappingNames()`](AnalysisJobApi.md#ApiClient.AnalysisJobRecording.GetMappingNames "ApiClient.AnalysisJobRecording.GetMappingNames").

Returns:  Reference name of the used mapping item.

Return type:  str

GetReportDisablingResults()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackageCall.GetReportDisablingResults "Link to this definition")  
Returns all results for which reporting of the test step is disabled.

Returns:  List of results for which the test step will not be reported

Return type:  list[str]

GetTags()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackageCall.GetTags "Link to this definition")  
Returns the tags set for this step.

Returns:  A (sorted) list of tags

Return type:  list[str]

GetTestManagementId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackageCall.GetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test management id of the test step.

Returns:  Test step id.

Return type:  str

GetTestStepId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackageCall.GetTestStepId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test step id.

Returns:  test step id

Return type:  str
