IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.TsRttPackageCall.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsReportingDisabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsRttPackageCall.IsReportingDisabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns whether reporting of this test step is disabled.

Returns:  True if reporting is disabled

Return type:  boolean

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.TsRttPackageCall.IsVisible "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is visible. This depends on the test step itself or a parent test step being disabled.

Returns:  True if test step is visible, else False

Return type:  boolean

RemoveTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsRttPackageCall.RemoveTag "Link to this definition")  
Remove a specific tag from this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be removed

SetBreakpoint(*enable*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsRttPackageCall.SetBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Sets or unsets the test step to act as a break point.

Parameters:  **enable** (*boolean*) – True if test step is a break point, else False

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsRttPackageCall.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the current test case language.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsRttPackageCall.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetMappingTarget(*name*, *target*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsRttPackageCall.SetMappingTarget "Link to this definition")  
For the referenced package, sets the target path of the parameterized mapping item with the given name. There is no check whether a mapping item with the given name exists within the referenced package. If a check is required, the referenced package can be examined separately using the PackageApi.

Parameters:  - **name** (*str*) – Name of the mapping item in the referenced package.

- **target** (*str*) – Non-empty target path of the mapping item

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If an empty target path or None was given

SetPackageParameter(*paramName*, *paramValue*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsRttPackageCall.SetPackageParameter "Link to this definition")  
Assigns a value to a package parameter. If there is no parameter with the given name yet, an additional entry is added.

Parameters:  - **paramName** (*str*) – Name of the parameter

- **paramValue** (*str*) – Value to assign to the parameter (can be an expression)

SetPackageParameters(*paramDict*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsRttPackageCall.SetPackageParameters "Link to this definition")  
Replaces all package parameters by the given paramDict.

Parameters:  **paramDict** (*dict[str,* *str]*) – Dictionary of \<parameter name, expression\> items

SetPackageReturn(*varInternal*, *varExternal*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsRttPackageCall.SetPackageReturn "Link to this definition")  
Assigns a variable name of the calling package to a return variable name of the referenced package.

Parameters:  - **varInternal** (*str*) – Return variable name of the referenced package

- **varExternal** (*str*) – Variable name of the calling package to assign the return variable name to.

SetPackageReturns(*returnDict*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsRttPackageCall.SetPackageReturns "Link to this definition")  
Replaces package returns by the given returnDict.

Parameters:  **returnDict** (*dict[str,* *str]*) – Dictionary of \<return variable name of the referenced package, variable name of the calling package\> items

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsRttPackageCall.SetTags "Link to this definition")  
Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsRttPackageCall.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsRttPackageCall.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

UnsetPackageReturn(*varInternal*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsRttPackageCall.UnsetPackageReturn "Link to this definition")  
Removes an assignment of a variable name of the calling package to a return variable name of the referenced package.

Parameters:  **varInternal** (*str*) – Return variable name of the referenced package

## TsPackage[¶](#tspackage "Link to this heading")

*class* TsPackage[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage "Link to this definition")  
Base class

[`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

Subclasses

- [`TsParallelPackage`](#ApiClient.TsParallelPackage "ApiClient.TsParallelPackage")

- [`TsParallelRttPackage`](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage "ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage")

- [`TsRttPackage`](#ApiClient.TsRttPackage "ApiClient.TsRttPackage")

AddTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.AddTag "Link to this definition")  
Add a specific tag to this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be set

Clone()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.Clone "Link to this definition")  
Call this method if you want to use API-objects in multiple contexts, e.g. if you want to insert a specific test step in multiple blocks.

Returns:  A copy of this object

Return type:  [`TsPackage`](#ApiClient.TsPackage "ApiClient.TsPackage")

DeleteTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.DeleteTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Deletes a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

DisableReporting(*disable=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.DisableReporting "Link to this definition")  
Disables or enables the reporting this test step.

Parameters:  **disable** (*boolean*) – If True the result of this test step will not be reported (optional)

DisableReportingFor(*results*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.DisableReportingFor "Link to this definition")  
Sets for which results reporting of the test step is disabled.

Parameters:  **results** (*list[str]*) – List of results for which the test step will not be reported. Valid results are: u’NONE’, u’SUCCESS’, u’INCONCLUSIVE’, u’FAILED’, u’ERROR’

GetAbsolutePath()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.GetAbsolutePath "Link to this definition")  
Returns the absolute file path of the referenced package from a package call test step.

Returns:  Absolute file path of the package to be called.

Return type:  str

GetActionColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.GetActionColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “action” column.

Returns:  Action column text

Return type:  str

GetComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.GetComment "Link to this definition")  
Returns the comment of the test step in the current test case language.

Returns:  Comment text as shown in the comment tab

Return type:  str

GetCommentColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.GetCommentColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column.

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetError()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.GetError "Link to this definition")  
Returns a list of errors. Note that the error messages depend on the program language ecu.test is set to. Because of that we do not recommend to check against exact error messages, unless you are certain about the respective program language.

Returns:  List of errors

Return type:  list[str]

GetLineNo()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.GetLineNo "Link to this definition")  
Returns the line number of the test step inside the test case.

Returns:  Line number of the test step

Return type:  int

GetMappingNames()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.GetMappingNames "Link to this definition")  
Returns the names of all mapping items mapped in the test step. Unmapped generic mappings of the called package are NOT returned.

Returns:  List of mapping names

Return type:  list[str]

GetMappingTarget(*name*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.GetMappingTarget "Link to this definition")  
Returns the target path of the mapping. This only works on mapping names mapped previously. (e.g. by calling SetMappingTarget) If there is no mapping of the given name, an ApiError is raised.

Parameters:  **name** (*str*) – Name of the mapping

Returns:  Target path of the mapping

Return type:  str

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If there is no mapping under the given name

GetPackageParameter(*paramName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.GetPackageParameter "Link to this definition")  
Retrieves the expression assigned to a package parameter.

Parameters:  **paramName** (*string*) – Name of the parameter

Returns:  Expression assigned to the parameter

Return type:  string

GetPackageParameters()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.GetPackageParameters "Link to this definition")  
Retrieves all package parameters with its expressions.

Returns:  Dictionary with expressions assigned to the parameters

Return type:  dict[string, string]

GetPackageReturn(*varInternal*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.GetPackageReturn "Link to this definition")  
Retrieves the variable name assigned to a package return value.

Parameters:  **varInternal** (*string*) – Name of the return variable in the called package

Returns:  Assigned variable of the calling package. Empty string if there is not any variable assigned.

Return type:  string

GetPackageReturns()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.GetPackageReturns "Link to this definition")  
Retrieves the return value assignments.

Returns:  Assigned variables of the calling package

Return type:  dict[string, string]

GetParameterColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.GetParameterColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “parameter” column.

Returns:  Parameter column text

Return type:  str

GetParent()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.GetParent "Link to this definition")  
Returns the parent test step.

Returns:  The parent test step or None if it is a top level test step.

Return type:  [`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

GetReferenceExpression()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.GetReferenceExpression "Link to this definition")  
Returns the expression that is used to determine which package should be called.

Returns:  The expression as a string as displayed in the test step dialog.

Return type:  str

GetReferencedPackage()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.GetReferencedPackage "Link to this definition")  
Returns the referenced package. If the path contains global constants, their current values are used.

Returns:  the referenced Package

Return type:  [`Package`](PackageApi.md#ApiClient.Package "ApiClient.Package")

GetReportDisablingResults()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.GetReportDisablingResults "Link to this definition")  
Returns for which results reporting of the test step is disabled.

Returns:  List of results for which the test step will not be reported

Return type:  list[str]

GetTags()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.GetTags "Link to this definition")  
Returns the tags set for this step.

Returns:  A (sorted) list of tags

Return type:  list[str]

GetTestManagementId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.GetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test management id of the test step.

Returns:  Test step id.

Return type:  str

GetTestStepId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.GetTestStepId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test step id.

Returns:  test step id

Return type:  str

GetTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.GetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the requested text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.GetType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the type (class name) of the test step, e.g.

> - “TsPreconditionBlock”
>
> - “TsWait”
>
> - “TsIfThenElse”
>
> - “TsSwitchCase”
>
> - “TsCaseNode”

Returns:  Type (class name) of the test step

Return type:  str

GetValueColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.GetValueColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “value” column in your current test case language.

Returns:  Value column text

Return type:  str

IsBreakpoint()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.IsBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is a break point.

Returns:  True if test step is a break point, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsContainer()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.IsContainer "Link to this definition")  
Returns True, if the test step supports calling GetChildren as well as manipulating the structure of its children. (e. g. via inserting or deleting sub test steps).

Returns:  True if it can contain test steps, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.IsEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns the state of the test step.

Returns:  True if test step is enabled, otherwise False

Return type:  bool

IsInPostcondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.IsInPostcondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a postcondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a postcondition, else Flase

Return type:  bool

IsInPrecondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.IsInPrecondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a precondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a precondition, else False

Return type:  bool

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsReportingDisabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.IsReportingDisabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns whether reporting of this test step is disabled.

Returns:  True if reporting is disabled

Return type:  boolean

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.IsVisible "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is visible. This depends on the test step itself or a parent test step being disabled.

Returns:  True if test step is visible, else False

Return type:  boolean

RemoveTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.RemoveTag "Link to this definition")  
Remove a specific tag from this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be removed

SetBreakpoint(*enable*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.SetBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Sets or unsets the test step to act as a break point.

Parameters:  **enable** (*boolean*) – True if test step is a break point, else False

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the current test case language.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetMappingTarget(*name*, *target*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.SetMappingTarget "Link to this definition")  
Sets the target path of the mapping. There is no check whether a mapping of the given name exists within the called package. If a check is required, the called package can be examined separately using the PackageApi.

Parameters:  - **name** (*str*) – Name of the mapping in the called package.

- **target** (*str*) – Target path of the mapping or None

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If an empty targetname or None was given

SetPackageParameter(*paramName*, *paramValue*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.SetPackageParameter "Link to this definition")  
Assigns a value to a package parameter.

Parameters:  - **paramName** (*string*) – Name of the parameter

- **paramValue** (*string*) – Value to assign to the parameter (can be an expression)

SetPackageParameters(*paramDict*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.SetPackageParameters "Link to this definition")  
Assigns values to package parameters.

Parameters:  **paramDict** (*dict[str,* *str]*) – Dictionary of parameter name -> parameter value (expression) mappings

SetPackageReturn(*varInternal*, *varExternal*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.SetPackageReturn "Link to this definition")  
Assigns a package return value to a variable.

Parameters:  - **varInternal** (*string*) – Return variable of the called package

- **varExternal** (*string*) – Variable of the calling package to assign the return value to

SetPackageReturns(*returnDict*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.SetPackageReturns "Link to this definition")  
Assigns package return values to variables.

Parameters:  **returnDict** (*dict[str,* *str]*) – Dictionary of return variable -> variable of the calling package mappings

SetPath(*path*, *packageLibraryAlias=None*, *libraryNamespace=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.SetPath "Link to this definition")  
Sets the path of the referenced package in a package call test step.

Parameters:  - **path** (*string*) – Relative path of the package to be called.

- **packageLibraryAlias** (*string*) – Package library alias, if the package is part of a library

- **libraryNamespace** (*string*) – Namespace of a library workspace (requires feature flag)

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.SetTags "Link to this definition")  
Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

UnsetPackageReturn(*varInternal*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.UnsetPackageReturn "Link to this definition")  
Removes a assignment of a package return value to a variable.

Parameters:  **varInternal** (*string*) – Return variable of the called package

GetPath()[¶](#ApiClient.TsPackage.GetPath "Link to this definition")  
Returns the file system path of the referenced package in a package call test step.

If this method returns a relative path, its base is the folder where the calling package is located, just like the path is shown in the package call test step’s dialog.

Returns:  File name with relative path of the package to be called.

Return type:  str

Deprecated since version 2022.2.0: Use [`GetAbsolutePath()`](#ApiClient.TsPackage.GetAbsolutePath "ApiClient.TsPackage.GetAbsolutePath") instead.

SetPackageReturn(*varInternal*, *varExternal*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelPackage.SetPackageReturn "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  - **varInternal** (*string*) – Return variable of the called package

- **varExternal** (*string*) – Variable of the calling package to assign the return value to

SetPackageReturns(*returnDict*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelPackage.SetPackageReturns "Link to this definition")  
Assigns package return values to variables.

Parameters:  **returnDict** (*dict[str,* *str]*) – Dictionary of return variable -> variable of the calling package mappings

SetPath(*path*, *packageLibraryAlias=None*, *libraryNamespace=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelPackage.SetPath "Link to this definition")  
Sets the path of the referenced package in a package call test step.

Parameters:  - **path** (*string*) – Relative path of the package to be called.

- **packageLibraryAlias** (*string*) – Package library alias, if the package is part of a library

- **libraryNamespace** (*string*) – Namespace of a library workspace (requires feature flag)

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelPackage.SetTags "Link to this definition")  
Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelPackage.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelPackage.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

UnsetPackageReturn(*varInternal*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelPackage.UnsetPackageReturn "Link to this definition")  
Removes a assignment of a package return value to a variable.

Parameters:  **varInternal** (*string*) – Return variable of the called package

GetPath()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelPackage.GetPath "Link to this definition")  
Returns the file system path of the referenced package in a package call test step.

If this method returns a relative path, its base is the folder where the calling package is located, just like the path is shown in the package call test step’s dialog.

Returns:  File name with relative path of the package to be called.

Return type:  str

Deprecated since version 2022.2.0: Use [`GetAbsolutePath()`](#ApiClient.TsParallelPackage.GetAbsolutePath "ApiClient.TsParallelPackage.GetAbsolutePath") instead.

## TsParallelRttPackage[¶](#tsparallelrttpackage "Link to this heading")

*class* TsParallelRttPackage[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage "Link to this definition")  
Base classes

- [`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

- [`TsPackage`](#ApiClient.TsPackage "ApiClient.TsPackage")

- [`TsParallelPackage`](#ApiClient.TsParallelPackage "ApiClient.TsParallelPackage")

AddTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.AddTag "Link to this definition")  
Add a specific tag to this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be set

Clone()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.Clone "Link to this definition")  
Call this method if you want to use API-objects in multiple contexts, e.g. if you want to insert a specific test step in multiple blocks.

Returns:  A copy of this object

Return type:  [`TsParallelRttPackage`](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage "ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage")

DeleteTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.DeleteTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Deletes a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

DisableReporting(*disable=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.DisableReporting "Link to this definition")  
Disables or enables the reporting this test step.

Parameters:  **disable** (*boolean*) – If True the result of this test step will not be reported (optional)

DisableReportingFor(*results*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.DisableReportingFor "Link to this definition")  
Sets for which results reporting of the test step is disabled.

Parameters:  **results** (*list[str]*) – List of results for which the test step will not be reported. Valid results are: u’NONE’, u’SUCCESS’, u’INCONCLUSIVE’, u’FAILED’, u’ERROR’

GetAbsolutePath()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.GetAbsolutePath "Link to this definition")  
Returns the absolute file path of the referenced package from a package call test step.

Returns:  Absolute file path of the package to be called.

Return type:  str

GetActionColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.GetActionColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “action” column.

Returns:  Action column text

Return type:  str

GetComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.GetComment "Link to this definition")  
Returns the comment of the test step in the current test case language.

Returns:  Comment text as shown in the comment tab

Return type:  str

GetCommentColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.GetCommentColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column.

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetError()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.GetError "Link to this definition")  
Returns a list of errors. Note that the error messages depend on the program language ecu.test is set to. Because of that we do not recommend to check against exact error messages, unless you are certain about the respective program language.

Returns:  List of errors

Return type:  list[str]

GetLineNo()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.GetLineNo "Link to this definition")  
Returns the line number of the test step inside the test case.

Returns:  Line number of the test step

Return type:  int

GetPackageParameter(*paramName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.GetPackageParameter "Link to this definition")  
Retrieves the expression assigned to a package parameter.

Parameters:  **paramName** (*string*) – Name of the parameter

Returns:  Expression assigned to the parameter

Return type:  string

GetPackageParameters()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.GetPackageParameters "Link to this definition")  
Retrieves all package parameters with its expressions.

Returns:  Dictionary with expressions assigned to the parameters

Return type:  dict[string, string]

GetPackageReturn(*varInternal*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.GetPackageReturn "Link to this definition")  
Retrieves the variable name assigned to a package return value.

Parameters:  **varInternal** (*string*) – Name of the return variable in the called package

Returns:  Assigned variable of the calling package. Empty string if there is not any variable assigned.

Return type:  string

GetPackageReturns()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.GetPackageReturns "Link to this definition")  
Retrieves the return value assignments.

Returns:  Assigned variables of the calling package

Return type:  dict[string, string]

GetParameterColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.GetParameterColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “parameter” column.

Returns:  Parameter column text

Return type:  str

GetParent()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.GetParent "Link to this definition")  
Returns the parent test step.

Returns:  The parent test step or None if it is a top level test step.

Return type:  [`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

GetReferenceExpression()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.GetReferenceExpression "Link to this definition")  
Returns the expression that is used to determine which package should be called.

Returns:  The expression as a string as displayed in the test step dialog.

Return type:  str

GetReferencedPackage()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.GetReferencedPackage "Link to this definition")  
Returns the referenced package. If the path contains global constants, their current values are used.

Returns:  the referenced Package

Return type:  [`Package`](PackageApi.md#ApiClient.Package "ApiClient.Package")

GetReportDisablingResults()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.GetReportDisablingResults "Link to this definition")  
Returns for which results reporting of the test step is disabled.

Returns:  List of results for which the test step will not be reported

Return type:  list[str]

GetTags()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.GetTags "Link to this definition")  
Returns the tags set for this step.

Returns:  A (sorted) list of tags

Return type:  list[str]

GetTestManagementId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.GetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test management id of the test step.

Returns:  Test step id.

Return type:  str

GetTestStepId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.GetTestStepId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test step id.

Returns:  test step id

Return type:  str

GetTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.GetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the requested text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.GetType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the type (class name) of the test step, e.g.

> - “TsPreconditionBlock”
>
> - “TsWait”
>
> - “TsIfThenElse”
>
> - “TsSwitchCase”
>
> - “TsCaseNode”

Returns:  Type (class name) of the test step

Return type:  str

GetValueColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.GetValueColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “value” column in your current test case language.

Returns:  Value column text

Return type:  str

IsBreakpoint()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.IsBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is a break point.

Returns:  True if test step is a break point, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsContainer()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.IsContainer "Link to this definition")  
Returns True, if the test step supports calling GetChildren as well as manipulating the structure of its children. (e. g. via inserting or deleting sub test steps).

Returns:  True if it can contain test steps, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.IsEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns the state of the test step.

Returns:  True if test step is enabled, otherwise False

Return type:  bool

IsInPostcondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.IsInPostcondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a postcondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a postcondition, else Flase

Return type:  bool

IsInPrecondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.IsInPrecondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a precondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a precondition, else False

Return type:  bool

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsReportingDisabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.IsReportingDisabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns whether reporting of this test step is disabled.

Returns:  True if reporting is disabled

Return type:  boolean

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.IsVisible "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is visible. This depends on the test step itself or a parent test step being disabled.

Returns:  True if test step is visible, else False

Return type:  boolean

RemoveTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.RemoveTag "Link to this definition")  
Remove a specific tag from this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be removed

SetBreakpoint(*enable*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsParallelRttPackage.SetBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Sets or unsets the test step to act as a break point.

Parameters:  **enable** (*boolean*) – True if test step is a break point, else False

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

GetMappingTarget(*name*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsRttPackage.GetMappingTarget "Link to this definition")

Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsRttPackage.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

UnsetPackageReturn(*varInternal*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsRttPackage.UnsetPackageReturn "Link to this definition")  
Removes a assignment of a package return value to a variable.

Parameters:  **varInternal** (*string*) – Return variable of the called package

GetPath()[¶](#ApiClient.TsRttPackage.GetPath "Link to this definition")  
Returns the file system path of the referenced package in a package call test step.

If this method returns a relative path, its base is the folder where the calling package is located, just like the path is shown in the package call test step’s dialog.

Returns:  File name with relative path of the package to be called.

Return type:  str

Deprecated since version 2022.2.0: Use [`GetAbsolutePath()`](#ApiClient.TsRttPackage.GetAbsolutePath "ApiClient.TsRttPackage.GetAbsolutePath") instead.

GetComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCheckSimulationStatus.GetComment "Link to this definition")

GetCommentColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCheckSimulationStatus.GetCommentColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column.

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetError()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCheckSimulationStatus.GetError "Link to this definition")  
Returns a list of errors. Note that the error messages depend on the program language ecu.test is set to. Because of that we do not recommend to check against exact error messages, unless you are certain about the respective program language.

Returns:  List of errors

GetExpectedStatus()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCheckSimulationStatus.GetExpectedStatus "Link to this definition")

- completed

- aborted

- failed

GetLineNo()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCheckSimulationStatus.GetLineNo "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test steps line number within its test case.

GetModelKey()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCheckSimulationStatus.GetModelKey "Link to this definition")  
Returns the model system identifier from which the element is loaded.

Returns:  The model system identifier

Return type:  str

GetParameterColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCheckSimulationStatus.GetParameterColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “parameter” column.

Returns:  Parameter column text

Return type:  str

GetParent()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCheckSimulationStatus.GetParent "Link to this definition")

Returns the test management id of the test step.

Returns:  Test step id.

GetTestStepId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCheckSimulationStatus.GetTestStepId "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the requested text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Returns:  Comment column text

GetType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCheckSimulationStatus.GetType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the type (class name) of the test step, e.g.

> - “TsPreconditionBlock”
>
> - “TsWait”
>
> - “TsIfThenElse”
>
> - “TsSwitchCase”
>
> - “TsCaseNode”

Returns:  Type (class name) of the test step

Return type:  str

GetValueColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCheckSimulationStatus.GetValueColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “value” column in your current test case language.

Returns:  Value column text

Return type:  str

IsBreakpoint()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCheckSimulationStatus.IsBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is a break point.

Returns:  True if test step is a break point, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsContainer()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCheckSimulationStatus.IsContainer "Link to this definition")  
Returns True, if the test step supports calling GetChildren as well as manipulating the structure of its children. (e. g. via inserting or deleting sub test steps).

Returns:  True if it can contain test steps, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCheckSimulationStatus.IsEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns the state of the test step.

Returns:  True if test step is enabled, otherwise False

Return type:  bool

IsInPostcondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCheckSimulationStatus.IsInPostcondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a postcondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a postcondition, else Flase

Return type:  bool

IsInPrecondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCheckSimulationStatus.IsInPrecondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a precondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a precondition, else False

Return type:  bool

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCheckSimulationStatus.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCheckSimulationStatus.IsVisible "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is visible. This depends on the test step itself or a parent test step being disabled.

Returns:  True if test step is visible, else False

Return type:  boolean

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsWait.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the current test case language.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

SetDelay(*delay*, *timeUnit*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsWait.SetDelay "Link to this definition")  
Sets the delay and its unit. The test execution is stopped for the specified time span.

Parameters:  - **delay** (*str*) – Expression as period of time to be delayed

- **timeUnit** (*str*) – Unit of time (d, h, min, s, ms)

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsWait.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetRange(*minValue*, *maxValue*, *stepSize*, *includeMinValue=True*, *includeMaxValue=False*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsWait.SetRange "Link to this definition")  
Special method to define a range as value for the argument.

Parameters:  - **minValue** (*str*) – Expression of the lower limit

- **maxValue** (*str*) – Expression of the upper limit

- **stepSize** (*str*) – Expression of the step size

- **includeMinValue** (*boolean*) – If True (default) the minimum value is a candidate for the random value at runtime. If False it is not a possible candidate to pick from.

- **includeMaxValue** (*boolean*) – If True the maximum value is a candidate for the random value at runtime; if False (default) it is not.

SetSaveInVariableName(*variableName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsWait.SetSaveInVariableName "Link to this definition")  
Sets the name of the variable used for storing data by the return. The variable will be created automatically if it does not already exist in the package where the return is placed in.

Parameters:  **variableName** (*str*) – The variable’s name. Must not be None or an empty string.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If variableName is None or an empty string

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsWait.SetTags "Link to this definition")  
Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

SetUnit(*timeUnit*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsWait.SetUnit "Link to this definition")  
Sets the time unit of the delay or value range expression

Parameters:  **timeUnit** (*str*) – Unit of time (d, h, min, s, ms)

## TsCalculation[¶](#tscalculation "Link to this heading")

*class* TsCalculation[¶](#ApiClient.TsCalculation "Link to this definition")  
Base class

[`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

Returned by

- [`TestStepApi.CreateTsCalculation`](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsCalculation "ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsCalculation")

AddTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCalculation.AddTag "Link to this definition")  
Add a specific tag to this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be set

Clone()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCalculation.Clone "Link to this definition")  
Call this method if you want to use API-objects in multiple contexts, e.g. if you want to insert a specific test step in multiple blocks.

Returns:  A copy of this object

Return type:  [`TsCalculation`](#ApiClient.TsCalculation "ApiClient.TsCalculation")

DeactivateExpectation()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCalculation.DeactivateExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the expectation so that the result will not be evaluated.

DeactivateFailedComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCalculation.DeactivateFailedComment "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the expectation for the failed comment so that the result will not be evaluated.

DeactivateSaveIn()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCalculation.DeactivateSaveIn "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the test step’s save in property, so the value will not be stored in a package variable.

DeactivateSuccessComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCalculation.DeactivateSuccessComment "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the expectation for the success comment so that the result will not be evaluated.

DeactivateTimeOption()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCalculation.DeactivateTimeOption "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates any time option set on the test step. This is equivalent to selecting the option “none” in the test step’s time options menu.

DeleteTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCalculation.DeleteTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Deletes a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Returns:  Action column text

GetActiveTimeOptionType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCalculation.GetActiveTimeOptionType "Link to this definition")

Returns:  Type of active time option (“Timeless”, “Finally”, “TrueForWithin”, “Generally”, “SyncOnly”, “PollingCycleMultiplier”)

Return type:  string

GetComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCalculation.GetComment "Link to this definition")  
Returns the comment of the test step in the current test case language.

Returns:  List of errors

Return type:  list[str]

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCalculation.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetExpectation(*expectation*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCalculation.SetExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Sets the expectation in the evaluation of the test step. The expectation will be activated if it was not enabled previously.

Parameters:  **expectation** ([`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")) – The expectation

SetExpectationExpression(*expectation*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCalculation.SetExpectationExpression "Link to this definition")  
Shortcut to set an expectation for an unspecific type in the evaluation of the test step. The expectation will be activated if it was not enabled previously.

Parameters:  **expectation** (*string*) – The expectation

SetExpression(*expression='0'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCalculation.SetExpression "Link to this definition")  
Sets the expression of the calculation test step.

Parameters:  **expression** (*str*) – Expression of the calculation test step

SetFailedComment(*failedComment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCalculation.SetFailedComment "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  **failedComment** (*string*) – The expression for the failed comment

SetInstanceName(*name*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCalculation.SetInstanceName "Link to this definition")  
Sets the instance name of the test step. By default (if no instance name has been set explicitely) the instance name is equal to GetName(). :param name: The instance name to be set :type name: string

SetSaveInVariableName(*variableName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCalculation.SetSaveInVariableName "Link to this definition")  
Sets the name of the variable used for storing data by the test step. The variable will be created automatically if it does not already exist in the package where the test step is placed in. This method must not be called, if the test step has not been added to a package previously.

Parameters:  **variableName** (*string*) – The variable’s name. Must not be None or an empty string.

Raises:  
**ApiError** –

- If SaveIn was called before the test step was added to a package.

- If variableName is None or an empty string

SetSuccessComment(*successComment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCalculation.SetSuccessComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets the expression for the success comment of the step. The expression will be activated if it was not enabled previously.

Parameters:  **successComment** (*string*) – The expression for the success comment

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCalculation.SetTags "Link to this definition")  
Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCalculation.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTimeOptionOnlySynchronization(*timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCalculation.SetTimeOptionOnlySynchronization "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “only synchronization”.

Parameters:  - **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout in ms to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – The polling cycle in ms or s or min or h or d. Might be left out.

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h, or d)

SetTimeOptionPollingCycleMultiplier(*pollingCycleMultiplier*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCalculation.SetTimeOptionPollingCycleMultiplier "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “polling cycle multiplier”. This option must only be used when inserting the test step into a Multi-Check!

Parameters:  **pollingCycleMultiplier** (*string*) – The polling cycle multiplier to be used.

SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeast(*minimumDuration*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCalculation.SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeast "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “true for at least”.

Parameters:  - **minimumDuration** (*string*) – The minimum duration to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h, or d)

SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeastWithin(*minimumDuration*, *timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCalculation.SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeastWithin "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “true for at least … within …”.

Parameters:  - **minimumDuration** (*string*) – The minimum duration in ms to be used

- **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h, or d)

SetTimeOptionWaitUntilTrue(*timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCalculation.SetTimeOptionWaitUntilTrue "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “wait until true”.

Parameters:  - **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used.

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h, or d).

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCalculation.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

GetFormula()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCalculation.GetFormula "Link to this definition")  
Returns the formula of the calculation test step.

Returns:  Formula of the calculation test step

Return type:  str

Deprecated since version 2023.1: Please use `GetExpression` instead.

SetFormula(*formula='0'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCalculation.SetFormula "Link to this definition")  
Sets the formula of the calculation test step.

Parameters:  **formula** (*str*) – formula of the calculation test step

Deprecated since version 2023.1: Please use `SetExpression` instead.

## TsInboxFetch[¶](#tsinboxfetch "Link to this heading")

*class* TsInboxFetch[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch "Link to this definition")  
Base class

[`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

Returned by

- [`TestStepApi.CreateTsInboxFetch`](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsInboxFetch "ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsInboxFetch")

AddTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.AddTag "Link to this definition")  
Add a specific tag to this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be set

Clone()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.Clone "Link to this definition")  
Call this method if you want to use API-objects in multiple contexts, e.g. if you want to insert a specific test step in multiple blocks.

Returns:  A copy of this object

Return type:  [`TsInboxFetch`](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch "ApiClient.TsInboxFetch")

DeactivateExpectation()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.DeactivateExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the expectation so that the result will not be evaluated.

DeactivateFailedComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.DeactivateFailedComment "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the expectation for the failed comment so that the result will not be evaluated.

DeactivateSaveIn()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.DeactivateSaveIn "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the save in variable option.

DeactivateSuccessComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.DeactivateSuccessComment "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the expectation for the success comment so that the result will not be evaluated.

DeactivateTimeOption()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.DeactivateTimeOption "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates any time option set on the test step. This is equivalent to selecting the option “none” in the test step’s time options menu.

DeleteTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.DeleteTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Deletes a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

GetActionColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.GetActionColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “action” column.

Returns:  Action column text

Return type:  str

GetActiveTimeOptionType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.GetActiveTimeOptionType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the type of the currently active time option.

Returns:  Type of active time option (“Timeless”, “Finally”, “TrueForWithin”, “Generally”, “SyncOnly”, “PollingCycleMultiplier”)

Return type:  string

GetComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.GetComment "Link to this definition")  
Returns the comment of the test step in the current test case language.

Returns:  Comment text as shown in the comment tab

Return type:  str

GetCommentColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.GetCommentColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column.

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetError()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.GetError "Link to this definition")  
Returns a list of errors. Note that the error messages depend on the program language ecu.test is set to. Because of that we do not recommend to check against exact error messages, unless you are certain about the respective program language.

Returns:  List of errors

Return type:  list[str]

GetExpectation()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.GetExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Returns the expectation expression from the evaluation of the test step, or None, if no expectation was defined.

Returns:  The expectation

Return type:  [`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")

GetExpectationExpression()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.GetExpectationExpression "Link to this definition")  
Returns the expectation expression from the evaluation of the test step, or None, if no expectation was defined.

Returns:  The expectation

Return type:  string

GetFailedComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.GetFailedComment "Link to this definition")  
Returns the failed comment of the step.

Returns:  The failed comment

Return type:  string

GetFetchTimeoutMode()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.GetFetchTimeoutMode "Link to this definition")  
- DEFAULT: Uses the timeout time of the inbox variable.

- UNLIMITED: Timeout is disabled.

- USER_DEFINED: The timeout time can be user defined with the method  
  ‘SetUserDefinedFetchTimeout’.

Returns:  The timeout mode. One of [u’DEFAULT’, u’UNLIMITED’, u’USER_DEFINED’]

Return type:  str

GetInboxName()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.GetInboxName "Link to this definition")  
Returns the inbox variable name.

Returns:  Name of the inbox variable

Return type:  str

GetLineNo()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.GetLineNo "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test steps line number within its test case.

Returns:  Line number

Return type:  int

GetMinimumDuration()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.GetMinimumDuration "Link to this definition")  
Returns the minimum duration of the test step’s time option, if a corresponding option has been set.

Returns:  The minimum duration, else None

Return type:  string

GetMinimumDurationUnit()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.GetMinimumDurationUnit "Link to this definition")  
Returns the unit of the minimum duration of the test step’s time option, if a corresponding option has been set.

Returns:  The unit of the minimum duration, else None

Return type:  string

GetParameterColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.GetParameterColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “parameter” column.

Returns:  Parameter column text

Return type:  str

GetParent()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.GetParent "Link to this definition")  
Returns the parent test step.

Returns:  The parent test step or None if it is a top level test step.

Return type:  [`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

GetPollingCycle()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.GetPollingCycle "Link to this definition")  
Returns the polling cycle of the test step’s time option, if a corresponding option has been set.

Returns:  The polling cycle, else None

Return type:  string

GetPollingCycleUnit()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.GetPollingCycleUnit "Link to this definition")  
Returns the unit of the polling cycle of the test step’s time option, if a corresponding option has been set.

Returns:  The unit of the polling cycle, else None

Return type:  string

GetSaveInVariableName()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.GetSaveInVariableName "Link to this definition")  
Returns the save in variable name.

Returns:  Name of the save in variable

Return type:  str

GetSuccessComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.GetSuccessComment "Link to this definition")  
Returns the success comment of the step.

Returns:  The success comment

Return type:  string

GetTags()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.GetTags "Link to this definition")  
Returns the tags set for this step.

Returns:  A (sorted) list of tags

Return type:  list[str]

GetTestManagementId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.GetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test management id of the test step.

Returns:  Test step id.

Return type:  str

GetTestStepId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.GetTestStepId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test step id.

Returns:  test step id

Return type:  str

GetTimeout()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.GetTimeout "Link to this definition")  
Returns the timeout of the test step’s time option, if a corresponding option has been set.

Returns:  The timeout else None

Return type:  string

GetTimeoutUnit()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.GetTimeoutUnit "Link to this definition")  
Returns the unit of the timeout of the test step’s time option, if a corresponding option has been set.

Returns:  The unit of the timeout else None

Return type:  string

GetTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.GetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the requested text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.GetType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the type (class name) of the test step, e.g.

> - “TsPreconditionBlock”
>
> - “TsWait”
>
> - “TsIfThenElse”
>
> - “TsSwitchCase”
>
> - “TsCaseNode”

Returns:  Type (class name) of the test step

Return type:  str

GetUserDefinedFetchTimeout()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.GetUserDefinedFetchTimeout "Link to this definition")  
Returns the user defined fetch timeout expression.

Returns:  Fetch timeout expression

Return type:  str

GetValueColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.GetValueColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “value” column in your current test case language.

Returns:  Value column text

Return type:  str

IsBreakpoint()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.IsBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is a break point.

Returns:  True if test step is a break point, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsContainer()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.IsContainer "Link to this definition")  
Returns True, if the test step supports calling GetChildren as well as manipulating the structure of its children. (e. g. via inserting or deleting sub test steps).

Returns:  True if it can contain test steps, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.IsEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns the state of the test step.

Returns:  True if test step is enabled, otherwise False

Return type:  bool

IsInPostcondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.IsInPostcondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a postcondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a postcondition, else Flase

Return type:  bool

IsInPrecondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.IsInPrecondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a precondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a precondition, else False

Return type:  bool

IsKeepMessageEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.IsKeepMessageEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns whether the keep message mode is enabled or disabled.

Returns:  Truth value of whether the keep message mode is enabled or disabled

Return type:  boolean

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.IsVisible "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is visible. This depends on the test step itself or a parent test step being disabled.

Returns:  True if test step is visible, else False

Return type:  boolean

RemoveTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.RemoveTag "Link to this definition")  
Remove a specific tag from this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be removed

SetBreakpoint(*enable*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.SetBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Sets or unsets the test step to act as a break point.

Parameters:  **enable** (*boolean*) – True if test step is a break point, else False

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the current test case language.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetExpectation(*expectation*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.SetExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Sets the expectation in the evaluation of the test step. The expectation will be activated if it was not enabled previously.

Parameters:  **expectation** ([`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")) – The expectation

SetExpectationExpression(*expectation*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.SetExpectationExpression "Link to this definition")  
Shortcut to set an expectation for an unspecific type in the evaluation of the test step. The expectation will be activated if it was not enabled previously.

Parameters:  **expectation** (*string*) – The expectation

SetFailedComment(*failedComment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.SetFailedComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets the expression for the failed comment of the step. The expression will be activated if it was not enabled previously.

Parameters:  **failedComment** (*string*) – The expression for the failed comment

SetFetchTimeoutMode(*timeoutMode*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.SetFetchTimeoutMode "Link to this definition")  
Sets the timeout mode.

- DEFAULT: Uses the timeout time of the inbox variable.

- UNLIMITED: Timeout is disabled.

- USER_DEFINED: The timeout time can be user defined with the method  
  ‘SetUserDefinedFetchTimeout’.

Parameters:  **timeoutMode** (*str*) – The timeout mode. Must be one of [u’DEFAULT’, u’UNLIMITED’, u’USER_DEFINED’]

SetInboxName(*inboxName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.SetInboxName "Link to this definition")  
Sets the inbox variable name. The test step must be inserted into a package prior to calling this method.

Parameters:  **inboxName** (*str*) – Name of the inbox variable

SetKeepMessage(*value=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.SetKeepMessage "Link to this definition")  
Enables or disables the keep message mode.

Parameters:  **value** (*boolean*) – Truth value of whether the keep message mode is enabled or disabled

SetSaveInVariableName(*variableName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.SetSaveInVariableName "Link to this definition")  
Sets the save in variable name. The variable will be created if it doesn’t exist already.

Parameters:  **variableName** (*str*) – Name of the variable

SetSuccessComment(*successComment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.SetSuccessComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets the expression for the success comment of the step. The expression will be activated if it was not enabled previously.

Parameters:  **successComment** (*string*) – The expression for the success comment

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.SetTags "Link to this definition")  
Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTimeOptionOnlySynchronization(*timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.SetTimeOptionOnlySynchronization "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  - **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout in ms to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h, or d)

SetTimeOptionPollingCycleMultiplier(*pollingCycleMultiplier*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.SetTimeOptionPollingCycleMultiplier "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “polling cycle multiplier”. This option must only be used when inserting the test step into a Multi-Check!

Parameters:  **pollingCycleMultiplier** (*string*) – The polling cycle multiplier to be used.

SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeast(*minimumDuration*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInboxFetch.SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeast "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  - **minimumDuration** (*string*) – The minimum duration in ms to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be removed

SetBreakpoint(*enable*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsOutboxPost.SetBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Sets or unsets the test step to act as a break point.

Parameters:  **enable** (*boolean*) – True if test step is a break point, else False

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsOutboxPost.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the current test case language.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsOutboxPost.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetMessageExpression(*msgExpr*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsOutboxPost.SetMessageExpression "Link to this definition")  
Sets the message expression that will be written to the outbox.

Parameters:  **msgExpr** (*str*) – Message expression

SetOutboxName(*outboxName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsOutboxPost.SetOutboxName "Link to this definition")  
Sets the outbox variable name. The test step must be inserted into a package prior to calling this method.

Parameters:  **outboxName** (*str*) – Name of the outbox variable

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsOutboxPost.SetTags "Link to this definition")  
Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsOutboxPost.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsOutboxPost.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

*class* TsEesError[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError "Link to this definition")

[`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

- [`TestStepApi.CreateTsEesError`](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsEesError "ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsEesError")

AddEesPinVariableMappingItem(*mappingItem*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.AddEesPinVariableMappingItem "Link to this definition")  
Adds a mapping item to the test case and adds the associated pin configuration.

Parameters:  **mappingItem** ([`EesPinVariableMappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.EesPinVariableMappingItem "ApiClient.EesPinVariableMappingItem")) – Ees pin mapping item

AddTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.AddTag "Link to this definition")

Clone()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.Clone "Link to this definition")

Returns:  A copy of this object

Return type:  [`TsEesError`](#ApiClient.TsEesError "ApiClient.TsEesError")

DeleteTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.DeleteTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")
