Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

GetActionColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.GetActionColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “action” column.

Returns:  Action column text

Return type:  str

GetComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.GetComment "Link to this definition")  
Returns the comment of the test step in the current test case language.

Returns:  Comment text as shown in the comment tab

Return type:  str

GetCommentColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.GetCommentColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column.

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetDurationExpression()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.GetDurationExpression "Link to this definition")  
Returns the duration expression of the test step in milliseconds.

Returns:  Duration expression

Return type:  str

GetDutyCycleExpression()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.GetDutyCycleExpression "Link to this definition")  
Returns the duty cycle expression of the test step.

Returns:  Duty cycle expression

Return type:  str

GetEesPinVariableMappingItems()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.GetEesPinVariableMappingItems "Link to this definition")  
Returns all ees pin mapping items as list.

Returns:  List of ees pin mapping items

Return type:  list[[`EesPinVariableMappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.EesPinVariableMappingItem "ApiClient.EesPinVariableMappingItem")]

GetError()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.GetError "Link to this definition")  
Returns a list of errors. Note that the error messages depend on the program language ecu.test is set to. Because of that we do not recommend to check against exact error messages, unless you are certain about the respective program language.

Returns:  List of errors

Return type:  list[str]

GetErrorType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.GetErrorType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the type of the error.

Returns:  Type of the error. One of [u’SIMPLE’, u’RESISTOR’]

Return type:  str

GetFrequencyExpression()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.GetFrequencyExpression "Link to this definition")  
Returns the frequency expression of the test step in hertz.

Returns:  Frequency expression

Return type:  str

GetLineNo()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.GetLineNo "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test steps line number within its test case.

Returns:  Line number

Return type:  int

GetLoad(*mappingItem*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.GetLoad "Link to this definition")  
Returns the load of the pin associated with the mapping item.

Parameters:  **mappingItem** ([`EesPinVariableMappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.EesPinVariableMappingItem "ApiClient.EesPinVariableMappingItem")) – Ees pin mapping item

Returns:  Whether the pin has a load or not

Return type:  boolean

GetParameterColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.GetParameterColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “parameter” column.

Returns:  Parameter column text

Return type:  str

GetParent()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.GetParent "Link to this definition")  
Returns the parent test step.

Returns:  The parent test step or None if it is a top level test step.

Return type:  [`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

GetPinsWithLoads()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.GetPinsWithLoads "Link to this definition")  
Returns all pins as dictionary containing reference names as keys and load modes as values.

Returns:  Dictionary of reference names and load mode

Return type:  dict[string, boolean]

GetPotential()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.GetPotential "Link to this definition")  
Returns the potential of the test step.

Returns:  Potential

Return type:  str

GetResistorExpression()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.GetResistorExpression "Link to this definition")  
Returns the resistor expression in ohm.

Returns:  Resistor expression or None

Return type:  str

GetTags()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.GetTags "Link to this definition")  
Returns the tags set for this step.

Returns:  A (sorted) list of tags

Return type:  list[str]

GetTestManagementId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.GetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test management id of the test step.

Returns:  Test step id.

Return type:  str

GetTestStepId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.GetTestStepId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test step id.

Returns:  test step id

Return type:  str

GetTimeOption()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.GetTimeOption "Link to this definition")  
Returns the time option of the test step.

Returns:  Time option. One of [u’STATIC’, u’DURATION’, u’LOSE_CONTACT’]

Return type:  str

GetTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.GetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the requested text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.GetType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the type (class name) of the test step, e.g.

> - “TsPreconditionBlock”
>
> - “TsWait”
>
> - “TsIfThenElse”
>
> - “TsSwitchCase”
>
> - “TsCaseNode”

Returns:  Type (class name) of the test step

Return type:  str

GetUserPotentialExpression()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.GetUserPotentialExpression "Link to this definition")  
Returns the user potential expression of the test step.

Returns:  User potential expression or None

Return type:  str

GetValueColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.GetValueColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “value” column in your current test case language.

Returns:  Value column text

Return type:  str

IsBreakpoint()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.IsBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is a break point.

Returns:  True if test step is a break point, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsContainer()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.IsContainer "Link to this definition")  
Returns True, if the test step supports calling GetChildren as well as manipulating the structure of its children. (e. g. via inserting or deleting sub test steps).

Returns:  True if it can contain test steps, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.IsEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns the state of the test step.

Returns:  True if test step is enabled, otherwise False

Return type:  bool

IsInPostcondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.IsInPostcondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a postcondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a postcondition, else Flase

Return type:  bool

IsInPrecondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.IsInPrecondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a precondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a precondition, else False

Return type:  bool

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.IsVisible "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is visible. This depends on the test step itself or a parent test step being disabled.

Returns:  True if test step is visible, else False

Return type:  boolean

RemoveEesPinVariableMapping(*mappingItem*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.RemoveEesPinVariableMapping "Link to this definition")  
Removes a mapping item from the test case and deletes the associated pin configuration.

Parameters:  **mappingItem** ([`EesPinVariableMappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.EesPinVariableMappingItem "ApiClient.EesPinVariableMappingItem")) – Ees pin mapping item

RemoveTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.RemoveTag "Link to this definition")  
Remove a specific tag from this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be removed

SetBreakpoint(*enable*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.SetBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Sets or unsets the test step to act as a break point.

Parameters:  **enable** (*boolean*) – True if test step is a break point, else False

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the current test case language.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

SetDurationExpression(*durationExpr*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.SetDurationExpression "Link to this definition")  
Sets the duration expression of the test step in milliseconds. By setting the duration expression the time option will be set to ‘DURATION’ if it was set to ‘STATIC’ before.

Parameters:  **durationExpr** (*str*) – Duration expression

SetDutyCycleExpression(*dutyCycleExpr*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.SetDutyCycleExpression "Link to this definition")  
Sets the duty cycle expression of the test step. By setting the duty cycle expression the time option will be set to ‘LOSE_CONTACT’.

Parameters:  **dutyCycleExpr** (*str*) – Duty cycle expression

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetErrorType(*errorType*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.SetErrorType "Link to this definition")  
Sets the type of the error.

Parameters:  **errorType** (*str*) – The type of the error. Must be one of [u’SIMPLE’, u’RESISTOR’]

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If errorType is in [u’SIMPLE’, u’RESISTOR’]

SetFrequencyExpression(*freqExpr*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.SetFrequencyExpression "Link to this definition")  
Sets the frequency expression of the test step in hertz. By setting the duty cycle expression the time option will be set to ‘LOSE_CONTACT’.

Parameters:  **freqExpr** (*str*) – Frequency expression

SetLoad(*mappingItem*, *load*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.SetLoad "Link to this definition")  
Sets the load of the pin associated with the mapping item.

Parameters:  - **mappingItem** ([`EesPinVariableMappingItem`](MappingApi.md#ApiClient.EesPinVariableMappingItem "ApiClient.EesPinVariableMappingItem")) – Ees pin mapping item

- **load** (*boolean*) – Whether the pin has a load or not

SetPotential(*potential*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.SetPotential "Link to this definition")  
Sets the potential of the test step. If the potential is one of u’NONE’, u’GROUND’ or u’UBATT’, the user defined potential will be set to None.

Parameters:  **potential** (*str*) – Potential. Must be one of [u’NONE’, u’GROUND’, u’UBATT’, u’USER_DEFINED’].

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If potential is not in [u’NONE’, u’GROUND’, u’UBATT’, u’USER_DEFINED’]

SetResistorExpression(*resistorExpr*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.SetResistorExpression "Link to this definition")  
Sets the resistor expression in ohm. By setting the resistor expression the error type will be set to ‘RESISTOR’ if it was set to ‘SIMPLE’ before.

Parameters:  **resistorExpr** (*str*) – Resistor expression

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.SetTags "Link to this definition")  
Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTimeOption(*timeOption*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.SetTimeOption "Link to this definition")  
Sets the time option of the test step. When setting to ‘STATIC’, the properties duration, duty cycle and frequency will be set to None. Choosing ‘DURATION’ will only reset the properties duty cycle and frequency.

Parameters:  **timeOption** (*str*) – Time option. Must be one of [u’STATIC’, u’DURATION’, u’LOSE_CONTACT’]

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

SetUserPotentialExpression(*userPotential*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsEesError.SetUserPotentialExpression "Link to this definition")  
Sets the user potential expression of the test step. By setting the user potential expression the potential will be set to ‘USER_DEFINED’.

Parameters:  **userPotential** (*str*) – User potential expression

## TsReport[¶](#tsreport "Link to this heading")

*class* TsReport[¶](#ApiClient.TsReport "Link to this definition")  
Represents a report test step.

When executed within a test case, a report test step creates a report entry with the configured information. These are:

- Column texts for action, name, value, and comment

- A rating

- A file attachment

- A comment

- A table

The type of the table cells is string. Each cell contains a Python expression. The expressions are evaluated when the test step is executed. The cells of the table in the report will contain the resulting values.

Base class

[`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

Returned by

- [`TestStepApi.CreateTsReport`](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsReport "ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsReport")

AddTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReport.AddTag "Link to this definition")  
Add a specific tag to this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be set

ClearTableValues()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReport.ClearTableValues "Link to this definition")  
Clears all table values.

Clone()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReport.Clone "Link to this definition")  
Call this method if you want to use API-objects in multiple contexts, e.g. if you want to insert a specific test step in multiple blocks.

Returns:  A copy of this object

Return type:  [`TsReport`](#ApiClient.TsReport "ApiClient.TsReport")

DeactivateTableVariable()[¶](#ApiClient.TsReport.DeactivateTableVariable "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the table variable.

DeleteTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsReport.DeleteTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Deletes a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Returns:  List of errors

Return type:  list[str]

Returns:  Type (class name) of the test step

Return type:  str

GetValueColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsSetTraceComment.GetValueColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “value” column in your current test case language.

Returns:  Value column text

Return type:  str

HasEntry(*name*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsSetTraceComment.HasEntry "Link to this definition")  
Returns whether an entry with the given name exists in the comment data dictionary.

Parameters:  **name** (*str*) – The name of the new entry

Returns:  True, if an entry with the given name exists, otherwise False

Return type:  boolean

IsBreakpoint()[¶](#ApiClient.TsSetTraceComment.IsBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is a break point.

Returns:  True if test step is a break point, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsContainer()[¶](#ApiClient.TsSetTraceComment.IsContainer "Link to this definition")  
Returns True, if the test step supports calling GetChildren as well as manipulating the structure of its children. (e. g. via inserting or deleting sub test steps).

Returns:  True if it can contain test steps, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsSetTraceComment.IsEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns the state of the test step.

Returns:  True if test step is enabled, otherwise False

Return type:  bool

IsInPostcondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsSetTraceComment.IsInPostcondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a postcondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a postcondition, else Flase

Return type:  bool

IsInPrecondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsSetTraceComment.IsInPrecondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a precondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a precondition, else False

Return type:  bool

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.TsSetTraceComment.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.TsSetTraceComment.IsVisible "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is visible. This depends on the test step itself or a parent test step being disabled.

Returns:  True if test step is visible, else False

Return type:  boolean

RemoveEntry(*name*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsSetTraceComment.RemoveEntry "Link to this definition")  
Removes an entry from the comment data dictionary by the given name. If no entry with the given name was found, an error will be raised instead.

Parameters:  **name** (*str*) – The name of the new entry

Raises:  
ApiError

RemoveTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsSetTraceComment.RemoveTag "Link to this definition")  
Remove a specific tag from this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be removed

SetBreakpoint(*enable*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsSetTraceComment.SetBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Sets or unsets the test step to act as a break point.

Parameters:  **enable** (*boolean*) – True if test step is a break point, else False

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsSetTraceComment.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the current test case language.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsSetTraceComment.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetEntry(*name*, *value*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsSetTraceComment.SetEntry "Link to this definition")  
Sets the value of the entry with the given name. If no entry with this name exists in the comment data dictionary, a new one will be created.

Parameters:  - **name** (*str*) – The name of the entry

- **value** (*str*) – The value expression of the entry

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsSetTraceComment.SetTags "Link to this definition")  
Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsSetTraceComment.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsSetTraceComment.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

> - “TsPreconditionBlock”
>
> - “TsWait”
>
> - “TsIfThenElse”
>

>

## TsInputDialog[¶](#tsinputdialog "Link to this heading")

*class* TsInputDialog[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog "Link to this definition")  
Base classes

- [`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

- [`TsUserInterface`](#ApiClient.TsUserInterface "ApiClient.TsUserInterface")

Returned by

- [`TestStepApi.CreateTsInputDialog`](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsInputDialog "ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsInputDialog")

AddTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.AddTag "Link to this definition")  
Add a specific tag to this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be set

Clone()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.Clone "Link to this definition")  
Call this method if you want to use API-objects in multiple contexts, e.g. if you want to insert a specific test step in multiple blocks.

Returns:  A copy of this object

Return type:  [`TsInputDialog`](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog "ApiClient.TsInputDialog")

CreateCheckBox(*identExpr=None*, *defaultExpr=None*, *toolTipExpr=None*, *varName=None*, *insPos=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.CreateCheckBox "Link to this definition")  
Creates a new checkbox control.

Parameters:  - **identExpr** (*str*) – Identifier expression of the text control

- **defaultExpr** (*str*) – Value expression that specifies whether the checkbox is ticked initially

- **toolTipExpr** (*str*) – Tool tip expression

- **varName** (*str*) – Variable name in which the value will be stored

- **insPos** (*integer*) – Insert position of the control. Control will be appended if None.

CreateComboBox(*identExpr=None*, *elementExpr=None*, *preselectExpr=None*, *toolTipExpr=None*, *varName=None*, *insPos=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.CreateComboBox "Link to this definition")  
Creates a new combobox control.

Parameters:  - **identExpr** (*str*) – Identifier expression of the text control

- **elementExpr** (*str*) – Expression containing a list that specifies all possible values. E.g. u”[‘choice1’, ‘choice2’]”

- **preselectExpr** (*str*) – Preselection expression

- **toolTipExpr** (*str*) – Tool tip expression

- **varName** (*str*) – Variable name in which the value will be stored

- **insPos** (*integer*) – Insert position of the control. Control will be appended if None.

CreateFileList(*identExpr=None*, *pathExpr=None*, *filterExpr=None*, *toolTipExpr=None*, *varName=None*, *insPos=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.CreateFileList "Link to this definition")  
Creates a new file list control.

Parameters:  - **identExpr** (*str*) – Identifier expression of the text control

- **pathExpr** (*str*) – Path expression

- **filterExpr** (*str*) – Filer expression

- **toolTipExpr** (*str*) – Tool tip expression

- **varName** (*str*) – Variable name in which the value will be stored

- **insPos** (*integer*) – Insert position of the control. Control will be appended if None.

CreateRadioButton(*identExpr=None*, *defaultExpr=None*, *toolTipExpr=None*, *varName=None*, *insPos=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.CreateRadioButton "Link to this definition")  
Creates a new radio button control.

Parameters:  - **identExpr** (*str*) – Identifier expression of the text control

- **defaultExpr** (*str*) – Value expression that specifies whether the radiobutton is ticked initially

- **toolTipExpr** (*str*) – Tool tip expression

- **varName** (*str*) – Variable name in which the value will be stored

- **insPos** (*integer*) – Insert position of the control. Control will be appended if None.

CreateTextCtrl(*identExpr=None*, *defaultExpr=None*, *toolTipExpr=None*, *varName=None*, *insPos=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.CreateTextCtrl "Link to this definition")  
Creates a new text control.

Parameters:  - **identExpr** (*str*) – Indentifier expression of the text control

- **defaultExpr** (*str*) – Default value expression of the text control

- **toolTipExpr** (*str*) – Tool tip expression

- **varName** (*str*) – Variable name in which the value will be stored

- **insPos** (*integer*) – Insert position of the control. Control will be appended if None.

CreateTextCtrlMultiline(*identExpr=None*, *defaultExpr=None*, *toolTipExpr=None*, *varName=None*, *insPos=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.CreateTextCtrlMultiline "Link to this definition")  
Creates a new multiline text control.

Parameters:  - **identExpr** (*str*) – Identifier expression of the text control

- **defaultExpr** (*str*) – Default value expression of the text control. Lines that are too long will be broken down automatically. A linebreak can be forced using ‘\n’.

- **toolTipExpr** (*str*) – Tool tip expression

- **varName** (*str*) – Variable name in which the value will be stored

- **insPos** (*integer*) – Insert position of the control. Control will be appended if None.

GetPropertyKeysByIndex(*index*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.GetPropertyKeysByIndex "Link to this definition")

Returns:  test step id

GetTimeoutExpression()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.GetTimeoutExpression "Link to this definition")  
Returns the timeout exrpression that defines the maximum user input time. The timeout unit may be retrieved with `GetTimeoutUnit()`. If the user exceeds this time the dialog will be closed.

Returns:  Timeout expression

Return type:  str

GetTimeoutUnit()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.GetTimeoutUnit "Link to this definition")  
Returns the unit of the optional timeout.

Returns:  Unit of time (d, h, min, s, ms)

Return type:  str

GetToolTipExpressionByIndex(*index*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.GetToolTipExpressionByIndex "Link to this definition")  
Returns the tooltip expression of the input control specified by index.

Parameters:  **index** (*integer*) – Index of the input control

Returns:  Tooltip expression

Return type:  str

GetTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.GetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the requested text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.GetType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the type (class name) of the test step, e.g.

> - “TsPreconditionBlock”
>
> - “TsWait”
>
> - “TsIfThenElse”
>
> - “TsSwitchCase”
>
> - “TsCaseNode”

Returns:  Type (class name) of the test step

Return type:  str

GetTypeByIndex(*index*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.GetTypeByIndex "Link to this definition")  
Returns the type of the input control specified by index.

Parameters:  **index** (*integer*) – Index of the input control

Returns:  Type of the input control. One of [u’TEXTCTRL’, u’TEXTCTRLMULTI’, u’COMBOBOX’, u’CHECKBOX’, u’RADIOBUTTON’, u’FILELIST’]

Return type:  str

GetValueColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.GetValueColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “value” column in your current test case language.

Returns:  Value column text

Return type:  str

GetVariableNameByIndex(*index*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.GetVariableNameByIndex "Link to this definition")  
Returns variable name of the input control specified by index.

Parameters:  **index** (*integer*) – Index of the input control

Returns:  Variable name

Return type:  str

IsBreakpoint()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.IsBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is a break point.

Returns:  True if test step is a break point, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsContainer()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.IsContainer "Link to this definition")  
Returns True, if the test step supports calling GetChildren as well as manipulating the structure of its children. (e. g. via inserting or deleting sub test steps).

Returns:  True if it can contain test steps, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.IsEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns the state of the test step.

Returns:  True if test step is enabled, otherwise False

IsInPostcondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.IsInPostcondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a postcondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a postcondition, else Flase

Return type:  bool

IsInPrecondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.IsInPrecondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a precondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a precondition, else False

Return type:  bool

IsMaximizeEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.IsMaximizeEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns whether the window will be maximized or not.

Returns:  Whether the window will be maximized

Return type:  boolean

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.IsVisible "Link to this definition")

Returns:  True if test step is visible, else False

Return type:  boolean

RemoveInput(*index*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.RemoveInput "Link to this definition")  
Removes the input specified by index.

SetDialogTitleExpression(*titleExpression*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.SetDialogTitleExpression "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  **titleExpression** (*str*) – Dialog title expression

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetIdentifierExpressionByIndex(*index*, *identExpr*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.SetIdentifierExpressionByIndex "Link to this definition")

- **identExpr** (*str*) – Identifier expression of the input control

SetMaximize(*maximize=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.SetMaximize "Link to this definition")  
Sets whether the window will be maximized or not.

Parameters:  **maximize** (*boolean*) – Whether the window will be maximized

SetPropertyExpressionByIndex(*index*, *key*, *valueExpr*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.SetPropertyExpressionByIndex "Link to this definition")  
Sets the property expression of the input control specified by index and property key.

Parameters:  - **index** (*integer*) – Index of the input control

- **key** (*str*) – Property key. Available property keys can be queried using GetPropertyKeysByIndex.

- **valueExpr** (*str*) – Index of the input control

SetSaveInVariableName(*varName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.SetSaveInVariableName "Link to this definition")  
Sets the save in variable name.

Parameters:  **varName** (*str*) – Variable name

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.SetTags "Link to this definition")  
Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTimeoutExpression(*timeoutExpr*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.SetTimeoutExpression "Link to this definition")  
Sets the timeout expression that defines the maximum user input time. The timeout unit may be specified with `SetTimeoutUnit()` (the default unit is seconds). If the user exceeds the specified time the dialog will be closed.

Parameters:  **timeoutExpr** (*str*) – Timeout expression

SetTimeoutUnit(*timeUnit*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.SetTimeoutUnit "Link to this definition")  
Sets the time unit of the optional timeout.

SetToolTipExpressionByIndex(*index*, *toolTipExpression*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.SetToolTipExpressionByIndex "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

SetVariableNameByIndex(*index*, *varName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsInputDialog.SetVariableNameByIndex "Link to this definition")

## TsLoadEnvironment[¶](#tsloadenvironment "Link to this heading")

*class* TsLoadEnvironment[¶](#ApiClient.TsLoadEnvironment "Link to this definition")  
Base class

[`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

Returned by

- [`TestStepApi.CreateTsLoadEnvironment`](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsLoadEnvironment "ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsLoadEnvironment")

AddTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsLoadEnvironment.AddTag "Link to this definition")  
Add a specific tag to this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be set

Clone()[¶](#ApiClient.TsLoadEnvironment.Clone "Link to this definition")  
Call this method if you want to use API-objects in multiple contexts, e.g. if you want to insert a specific test step in multiple blocks.

Returns:  A copy of this object

Return type:  [`TsLoadEnvironment`](#ApiClient.TsLoadEnvironment "ApiClient.TsLoadEnvironment")

DeleteTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsLoadEnvironment.DeleteTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Deletes a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

GetActionColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsLoadEnvironment.GetActionColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “action” column.

Returns:  Action column text

Return type:  str

GetComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsLoadEnvironment.GetComment "Link to this definition")  
Returns the comment of the test step in the current test case language.

Returns:  Comment text as shown in the comment tab

Return type:  str

GetCommentColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsLoadEnvironment.GetCommentColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column.

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetContextType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsLoadEnvironment.GetContextType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the context type of the element to be loaded.

Possible return values:  
- SCENARIO

Returns:  The context type

Return type:  str

GetElementPath()[¶](#ApiClient.TsLoadEnvironment.GetElementPath "Link to this definition")  
Returns the expression of the model path for the element to be loaded.

Returns:  The model path of the element as an expression. (note the quotation marks for plain string values)

Return type:  str

GetError()[¶](#ApiClient.TsLoadEnvironment.GetError "Link to this definition")  
Returns a list of errors. Note that the error messages depend on the program language ecu.test is set to. Because of that we do not recommend to check against exact error messages, unless you are certain about the respective program language.

Returns:  List of errors

Return type:  list[str]

GetLineNo()[¶](#ApiClient.TsLoadEnvironment.GetLineNo "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test steps line number within its test case.

Returns:  Line number

Return type:  int

GetModelKey()[¶](#ApiClient.TsLoadEnvironment.GetModelKey "Link to this definition")  
Returns the model system identifier from which the element is loaded.

Returns:  The model system identifier

Return type:  str

GetParameterColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsLoadEnvironment.GetParameterColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “parameter” column.

Returns:  Parameter column text

Return type:  str

GetParent()[¶](#ApiClient.TsLoadEnvironment.GetParent "Link to this definition")

Returns:  The parent test step or None if it is a top level test step.

Return type:  [`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

Returns:  Parameter column text

GetParent()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStopSimulation.GetParent "Link to this definition")  
Returns the parent test step.

Returns:  The parent test step or None if it is a top level test step.

Return type:  [`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

GetStopAfterValue()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStopSimulation.GetStopAfterValue "Link to this definition")  
Returns the value in seconds for the ‘stop after’ time as an expression, after which the simulation is stopped automatically.

Returns:  The value in seconds for the ‘stop after’ time as an expression.

Return type:  str

GetTags()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStopSimulation.GetTags "Link to this definition")  
Returns the tags set for this step.

Returns:  A (sorted) list of tags

Return type:  list[str]

GetTestManagementId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStopSimulation.GetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test management id of the test step.

Returns:  Test step id.

Return type:  str

GetTestStepId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStopSimulation.GetTestStepId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test step id.

GetTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStopSimulation.GetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the requested text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStopSimulation.GetType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the type (class name) of the test step, e.g.

> - “TsPreconditionBlock”
>
> - “TsWait”
>
> - “TsIfThenElse”
>
> - “TsSwitchCase”
>
> - “TsCaseNode”

Returns:  Type (class name) of the test step

Return type:  str

GetValueColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStopSimulation.GetValueColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “value” column in your current test case language.

Returns:  Value column text

Return type:  str

IsBreakpoint()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStopSimulation.IsBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is a break point.

Returns:  True if test step is a break point, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsContainer()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStopSimulation.IsContainer "Link to this definition")  
Returns True, if the test step supports calling GetChildren as well as manipulating the structure of its children. (e. g. via inserting or deleting sub test steps).

Returns:  True if it can contain test steps, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStopSimulation.IsEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns the state of the test step.

Returns:  True if test step is enabled, otherwise False

Return type:  bool

IsInPostcondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStopSimulation.IsInPostcondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a postcondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a postcondition, else Flase

Return type:  bool

IsInPrecondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStopSimulation.IsInPrecondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a precondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a precondition, else False

Return type:  bool

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStopSimulation.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsResetSimQuantitesEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStopSimulation.IsResetSimQuantitesEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns whether the ‘reset simulation quantities’ function is enabled, which automatically resets all changed simulation quantities, like parameters and signals, after simulation end.

Returns:  True if ‘reset simulation quantities’ function is enabled, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsStopAfterEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStopSimulation.IsStopAfterEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns whether the ‘stop after’ function is enabled, which automatically stops the simulation after the specified time.

Returns:  True if ‘stop after’ function is enabled, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStopSimulation.IsVisible "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is visible. This depends on the test step itself or a parent test step being disabled.

Returns:  True if test step is visible, else False

Return type:  boolean

RemoveTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStopSimulation.RemoveTag "Link to this definition")  
Remove a specific tag from this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be removed

SetBreakpoint(*enable*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStopSimulation.SetBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Sets or unsets the test step to act as a break point.

Parameters:  **enable** (*boolean*) – True if test step is a break point, else False

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStopSimulation.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the current test case language.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStopSimulation.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetMode(*mode*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStopSimulation.SetMode "Link to this definition")  
Sets the mode used to stop the simulation.

Valid values:  
- IMMEDIATELY Stop immediately

- WAIT Wait for simulation end

Parameters:  **mode** (*str*) – The stop mode

SetModelKey(*modelKey*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStopSimulation.SetModelKey "Link to this definition")  
Sets the model system identifier from which the element is loaded.

Parameters:  **modelKey** (*str*) – The model system identifier

SetResetSimQuantitesEnabled(*enabled=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStopSimulation.SetResetSimQuantitesEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the ‘reset simulation quantities’ function, which automatically resets all changed simulation quantities, like parameters and signals, after simulation end.

Parameters:  **enabled** (*boolean*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the ‘reset simulation quantities’ function

SetStopAfterEnabled(*enabled=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStopSimulation.SetStopAfterEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the ‘stop after’ function, which automatically stops the simulation after the specified time.

Parameters:  **enabled** (*boolean*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the ‘stop after’ function

SetStopAfterValue(*expression*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStopSimulation.SetStopAfterValue "Link to this definition")  
Sets the value in seconds for the ‘stop after’ time as an expression, after which the simulation is stopped automatically.

Parameters:  **expression** (*str*) – The value in seconds for the ‘stop after’ time as an expression.

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStopSimulation.SetTags "Link to this definition")  
Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStopSimulation.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStopSimulation.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

## TsStartStimulus[¶](#tsstartstimulus "Link to this heading")

*class* TsStartStimulus[¶](#ApiClient.TsStartStimulus "Link to this definition")  
of the start stimulus utility.

Add a specific tag to this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be set

Clone()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStartStimulus.Clone "Link to this definition")  
Call this method if you want to use API-objects in multiple contexts, e.g. if you want to insert a specific test step in multiple blocks.

Returns:  A copy of this object

Return type:  [`TsStartStimulus`](#ApiClient.TsStartStimulus "ApiClient.TsStartStimulus")

DeactivateSaveIn()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStartStimulus.DeactivateSaveIn "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the test step’s save in property, so the value will not be stored in a package variable.

Deletes a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Returns the text value of the “comment” column.

GetLineNo()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStartStimulus.GetLineNo "Link to this definition")

GetSelectionMode()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStartStimulus.GetSelectionMode "Link to this definition")

GetSignalPattern()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStartStimulus.GetSignalPattern "Link to this definition")

> - “TsPreconditionBlock”

>

>

>

Returns:  Value column text

Return type:  str

Returns the actual state of auto stop stimulation.

Returns:  The stimulus playback is stopped automatically when it has finished

Return type:  boolean

IsBreakpoint()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStartStimulus.IsBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is a break point.

Returns True, if the test step supports calling GetChildren as well as manipulating the structure of its children. (e. g. via inserting or deleting sub test steps).

Returns:  True if it can contain test steps, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStartStimulus.IsEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns the state of the test step.

Returns:  True if test step is enabled, otherwise False

Return type:  bool

IsInPostcondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStartStimulus.IsInPostcondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a postcondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a postcondition, else Flase

Return type:  bool

IsInPrecondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStartStimulus.IsInPrecondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a precondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a precondition, else False

Return type:  bool

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStartStimulus.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsSynchronousExecution()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStartStimulus.IsSynchronousExecution "Link to this definition")  
Returns the actual state for the synchronous execution option.

Returns:  The test step waits until the stimulus playback has finished

Return type:  boolean

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStartStimulus.IsVisible "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is visible. This depends on the test step itself or a parent test step being disabled.

Returns:  True if test step is visible, else False

Return type:  boolean

LoadSignalNames()[¶](#ApiClient.TsStartStimulus.LoadSignalNames "Link to this definition")  
Returns a list of all signal names of the previously set \*.sti file. If no path is set an empty list will be returned.

Raises:  
**RuntimeError** – incompatible file format

Returns:  list of signal names

Return type:  list[str]

RemoveTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStartStimulus.RemoveTag "Link to this definition")  
Remove a specific tag from this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be removed

SetAutoStopStimulation(*state*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStartStimulus.SetAutoStopStimulation "Link to this definition")  
Sets whether the stimulus playback shall be stopped automatically when it has finished. Auto stop stimulation only works for enabled synchronous execution.

Parameters:  **state** (*boolean*) – Set auto stop stimulus playback

SetBreakpoint(*enable*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStartStimulus.SetBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Sets or unsets the test step to act as a break point.

Parameters:  **enable** (*boolean*) – True if test step is a break point, else False

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStartStimulus.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the current test case language.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStartStimulus.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetInstanceName(*instanceName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStartStimulus.SetInstanceName "Link to this definition")  
Sets the instance name of the stimulus.

Parameters:  **instanceName** (*str*) – Instance name of the stimulus

SetMappingPattern(*pattern*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStartStimulus.SetMappingPattern "Link to this definition")  
Sets the signal pattern used for automatic signal assignment.

Parameters:  **pattern** (*str*) – pattern

SetParameterAssignments(*parameterAssignments*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStartStimulus.SetParameterAssignments "Link to this definition")  
Sets the parameter assignments.

Parameters:  **parameterAssignments** (*dict[str,* *list[str]]*) – Assignment of STI parameters to values. E.g. {‘stiSignal’: [‘1+3’, ‘comment’]}

SetPathExpression(*path*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStartStimulus.SetPathExpression "Link to this definition")  
Sets the path expression to the source stimulation file.

Parameters:  **path** (*str*) – The expression for the path to the source stimulation file

SetSaveInVariableName(*variableName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStartStimulus.SetSaveInVariableName "Link to this definition")  
Sets the name of the variable used for storing data by the test step. The variable will be created automatically if it does not already exist in the package where the test step is placed in. This method must not be called, if the test step has not been added to a package previously.

Parameters:  **variableName** (*string*) – The variable’s name. Must not be None or an empty string.

Raises:  
**ApiError** –

- If SaveIn was called before the test step was added to a package.

- If variableName is None or an empty string

SetSelectionMode(*mode*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStartStimulus.SetSelectionMode "Link to this definition")  
Sets the selection mode for signal assignment.

Parameters:  **mode** (*str*) – selection mode: ‘manual’, ‘auto’ or ‘unassigned’

SetSignalPattern(*pattern*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStartStimulus.SetSignalPattern "Link to this definition")  
Sets the signal pattern used for automatic signal assignment.

Parameters:  **pattern** (*str*) – pattern

SetStimuliAssignments(*stimuliAssignment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStartStimulus.SetStimuliAssignments "Link to this definition")  
Sets the stimulus assignments. Note that the referenced mappings must exist either in the local mapping of the package or in the currently loaded global mapping.

Parameters:  **stimuliAssignment** (*dict[str,* *list[str]]*) – Assignment (1:n) of STI signals to test quantities (list of mapping references as strings). E.g. {‘stiSignal’: [‘mappingRef1’, ‘mappingRef2’]}

SetSynchronousExecution(*state*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStartStimulus.SetSynchronousExecution "Link to this definition")  
Sets the state for the synchronous execution option and. This determines whether the test step waits until the stimulus playback has finished.

Parameters:  **state** (*boolean*) – True to activate, False to deactivate synchronous execution

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStartStimulus.SetTags "Link to this definition")  
Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStartStimulus.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStartStimulus.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)
