Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStopStimulus.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsStopStimulus.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

## TsKeyword[¶](#tskeyword "Link to this heading")

*class* TsKeyword[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword "Link to this definition")  
keyword test step

Base classes

- [`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

- [`TsAXSCall`](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall "ApiClient.TsAXSCall")

Returned by

- [`TestStepApi.CreateTsKeywordFromId`](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsKeywordFromId "ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsKeywordFromId")

AddActivityArgument()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.AddActivityArgument "Link to this definition")  
Convenience-Method for activity argument creation.

Returns:  Activity argument of this test step.

Return type:  [`TsKeywordArgument`](#ApiClient.TsKeywordArgument "ApiClient.TsKeywordArgument")

AddActivityReturn()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.AddActivityReturn "Link to this definition")  
Convenience-Method for activity return creation.

Returns:  Activity return of this test step

Return type:  [`TsKeywordReturn`](#ApiClient.TsKeywordReturn "ApiClient.TsKeywordReturn")

AddArgument(*identifier*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.AddArgument "Link to this definition")  
Adds the argument with the given identifier to the keyword test step. Creates a new argument if no such argument exists.

Parameters:  **identifier** (*str*) – Identifier of argument. Has to match the identifier of an existing argument of the keyword.

Returns:  Argument of this test step whose identifier is ‘identifier’.

Return type:  [`TsKeywordArgument`](#ApiClient.TsKeywordArgument "ApiClient.TsKeywordArgument")

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If identifier is None or an empty string

AddComponentArgument()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.AddComponentArgument "Link to this definition")  
Convenience-Method for component creation.

Returns:  Component argument of this test step.

Return type:  [`TsKeywordArgument`](#ApiClient.TsKeywordArgument "ApiClient.TsKeywordArgument")

AddDesiredActivityReturn()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.AddDesiredActivityReturn "Link to this definition")  
Convenience-Method for creation of desired activity in “establish” keyword test steps.

Returns:  Return of this test step whose name is ‘identifier’

Return type:  [`TsKeywordReturn`](#ApiClient.TsKeywordReturn "ApiClient.TsKeywordReturn")

AddReturn(*identifier*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.AddReturn "Link to this definition")  
Adds the return with the given identifier to the keyword test step. Creates a new return if no such return already exists.

Keyword test steps are limited to one return value!

Parameters:  **identifier** (*str*) – Identifier of the return. Has to match the identifier of an existing return of the keyword.

Returns:  Return of this test step whose identifier is ‘identifier’

Return type:  [`TsKeywordReturn`](#ApiClient.TsKeywordReturn "ApiClient.TsKeywordReturn")

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If identifier is None or an empty string

AddTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.AddTag "Link to this definition")  
Add a specific tag to this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be set

Clone()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.Clone "Link to this definition")  
Call this method if you want to use API-objects in multiple contexts, e.g. if you want to insert a specific test step in multiple blocks.

Returns:  A copy of this object

Return type:  [`TsKeyword`](#ApiClient.TsKeyword "ApiClient.TsKeyword")

DeactivateFailedComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.DeactivateFailedComment "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the expectation for the failed comment so that the result will not be evaluated.

DeactivateSuccessComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.DeactivateSuccessComment "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the expectation for the success comment so that the result will not be evaluated.

DeactivateTimeOption()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.DeactivateTimeOption "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates any time option set on the test step. This is equivalent to selecting the option “none” in the test step’s time options menu.

DeleteTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.DeleteTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Deletes a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

GetActionColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetActionColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “action” column.

Returns:  Action column text

Return type:  str

GetActiveTimeOptionType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetActiveTimeOptionType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the type of the currently active time option.

Returns:  Type of active time option (“Timeless”, “Finally”, “TrueForWithin”, “Generally”, “SyncOnly”, “PollingCycleMultiplier”)

Return type:  string

GetArgument(*identifier*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetArgument "Link to this definition")  
Gets the argument with the given identifier of the keyword test step.

Parameters:  **identifier** (*str*) – Identifier of argument. Has to match the identifier of an existing argument of the keyword.

Returns:  Argument of this test step whose identifier matches ‘identifier’ or None if there is no argument with this identifier.

Return type:  [`TsKeywordArgument`](#ApiClient.TsKeywordArgument "ApiClient.TsKeywordArgument")

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If identifier is None or an empty string

GetArguments()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetArguments "Link to this definition")  
Returns all argument of the keyword test step.

Returns:  List of arguments of this test step.

Return type:  list[[`TsKeywordArgument`](#ApiClient.TsKeywordArgument "ApiClient.TsKeywordArgument")]

GetComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetComment "Link to this definition")  
Returns the comment of the test step in the current test case language.

Returns:  Comment text as shown in the comment tab

Return type:  str

GetCommentColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetCommentColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column.

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetError()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetError "Link to this definition")  
Returns a list of errors. Note that the error messages depend on the program language ecu.test is set to. Because of that we do not recommend to check against exact error messages, unless you are certain about the respective program language.

Returns:  List of errors

Return type:  list[str]

GetFailedComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetFailedComment "Link to this definition")  
Returns the failed comment of the step.

Returns:  The failed comment

Return type:  string

GetImplementingAnalysisLabel()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetImplementingAnalysisLabel "Link to this definition")  
Returns the analysis label used as implementation for this step.

Returns:  The requested analysis label or None if no analysis label implementation is used.

Return type:  str

GetImplementingTraceStepUuid()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetImplementingTraceStepUuid "Link to this definition")  
Returns the trace analysis (step) UUID used as implementation for this step.

Returns:  trace anylysis step UUID of the local trace analysis (step) or None if no trace analysis implementation is used.

Return type:  str

GetKeywordId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetKeywordId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the id of the referenced keyword.

Returns:  id of the keyword referenced by the test step

Return type:  int

GetLineNo()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetLineNo "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test steps line number within its test case.

Returns:  Line number

Return type:  int

GetMinimumDuration()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetMinimumDuration "Link to this definition")  
Returns the minimum duration of the test step’s time option, if a corresponding option has been set.

Returns:  The minimum duration, else None

Return type:  string

GetMinimumDurationUnit()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetMinimumDurationUnit "Link to this definition")  
Returns the unit of the minimum duration of the test step’s time option, if a corresponding option has been set.

Returns:  The unit of the minimum duration, else None

Return type:  string

GetParameterColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetParameterColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “parameter” column.

Returns:  Parameter column text

Return type:  str

GetParent()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetParent "Link to this definition")  
Returns the parent test step.

Returns:  The parent test step or None if it is a top level test step.

Return type:  [`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

GetPollingCycle()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetPollingCycle "Link to this definition")  
Returns the polling cycle of the test step’s time option, if a corresponding option has been set.

Returns:  The polling cycle, else None

Return type:  string

GetPollingCycleUnit()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetPollingCycleUnit "Link to this definition")  
Returns the unit of the polling cycle of the test step’s time option, if a corresponding option has been set.

Returns:  The unit of the polling cycle, else None

Return type:  string

GetReturn(*identifier*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetReturn "Link to this definition")  
Gets the return with the given identifier of the keyword test step.

Parameters:  **identifier** (*str*) – Identifier of the return. Has to match the identifier of an existing return of the keyword.

Returns:  Return of this test step whose identifier matches ‘identifier’ or None if there is no return with this identifier.

Return type:  [`TsKeywordReturn`](#ApiClient.TsKeywordReturn "ApiClient.TsKeywordReturn")

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If identifier is None or an empty string

GetReturns()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetReturns "Link to this definition")  
Returns all return values of the keyword test step.

Returns:  List of returns of this test step.

Return type:  list[[`TsKeywordReturn`](#ApiClient.TsKeywordReturn "ApiClient.TsKeywordReturn")]

GetSuccessComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetSuccessComment "Link to this definition")  
Returns the success comment of the step.

Returns:  The success comment

Return type:  string

GetTags()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetTags "Link to this definition")  
Returns the tags set for this step.

Returns:  A (sorted) list of tags

Return type:  list[str]

GetTestManagementId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test management id of the test step.

Returns:  Test step id.

Return type:  str

GetTestStepId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetTestStepId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test step id.

Returns:  test step id

Return type:  str

GetTimeout()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetTimeout "Link to this definition")  
Returns the timeout of the test step’s time option, if a corresponding option has been set.

Returns:  The timeout else None

Return type:  string

GetTimeoutUnit()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetTimeoutUnit "Link to this definition")  
Returns the unit of the timeout of the test step’s time option, if a corresponding option has been set.

Returns:  The unit of the timeout else None

Return type:  string

GetTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the requested text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the type (class name) of the test step, e.g.

> - “TsPreconditionBlock”
>
> - “TsWait”
>
> - “TsIfThenElse”
>
> - “TsSwitchCase”
>
> - “TsCaseNode”

Returns:  Type (class name) of the test step

Return type:  str

GetValueColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetValueColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “value” column in your current test case language.

Returns:  Value column text

Return type:  str

HasAnalysisLabelImplementation()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.HasAnalysisLabelImplementation "Link to this definition")  
Returns whether the implementation is realized by requesting an analysis label.

Returns:  True if this step is implemented requesting an analysis label, else False.

Return type:  boolean

HasTraceAnalysisImplementation()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.HasTraceAnalysisImplementation "Link to this definition")  
Returns whether the implementation is realized by a local trace analysis.

Returns:  True if this step is implemented using trace analysis, else False.

Return type:  boolean

IsBreakpoint()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.IsBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is a break point.

Returns:  True if test step is a break point, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsContainer()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.IsContainer "Link to this definition")  
Returns True, if the test step supports calling GetChildren as well as manipulating the structure of its children. (e. g. via inserting or deleting sub test steps).

Returns:  True if it can contain test steps, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.IsEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns the state of the test step.

Returns:  True if test step is enabled, otherwise False

Return type:  bool

IsEstablishTs()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.IsEstablishTs "Link to this definition")  
Returns whether this test step is an establish test step

Returns:  True if this is an establish test step, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsInPostcondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.IsInPostcondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a postcondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a postcondition, else Flase

Return type:  bool

IsInPrecondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.IsInPrecondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a precondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a precondition, else False

Return type:  bool

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.IsVisible "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is visible. This depends on the test step itself or a parent test step being disabled.

Returns:  True if test step is visible, else False

Return type:  boolean

RemoveActivityArgument()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.RemoveActivityArgument "Link to this definition")  
Convenience-Method for removing the activity argument.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If the activity argument is not part of the test step

RemoveActivityReturn()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.RemoveActivityReturn "Link to this definition")  
Convenience-Method for removing the activity return.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If the activity return is not part of the test step

RemoveArgument(*identifier*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.RemoveArgument "Link to this definition")  
Removes the argument with the given identifier from the keyword test step.

Parameters:  **identifier** (*str*) – Identifier of argument. Has to match the identifier of an existing argument of the keyword.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If there is no argument that matches identifier

RemoveComponentArgument()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.RemoveComponentArgument "Link to this definition")  
Convenience-Method for removing the component argument.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If the component argument is not part of the test step

RemoveDesiredActivityReturn()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.RemoveDesiredActivityReturn "Link to this definition")  
Convenience-Method for removing the desired activity return.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If the desired activity return is not part of the test step

RemoveReturn(*identifier*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.RemoveReturn "Link to this definition")  
Removes the return with the given identifier from the keyword test step.

Parameters:  **identifier** (*str*) – Identifier of the return. Has to match the identifier of an existing return of the keyword.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If there is no return that matches identifier

RemoveTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.RemoveTag "Link to this definition")  
Remove a specific tag from this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be removed

ResetImplementationType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.ResetImplementationType "Link to this definition")  
Resets to package implementation. The implementation will be taken by default from the global mapping file, if defined.

SetBreakpoint(*enable*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.SetBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Sets or unsets the test step to act as a break point.

Parameters:  **enable** (*boolean*) – True if test step is a break point, else False

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the current test case language.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetFailedComment(*failedComment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.SetFailedComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets the expression for the failed comment of the step. The expression will be activated if it was not enabled previously.

Parameters:  **failedComment** (*string*) – The expression for the failed comment

SetImplementingAnalysisLabel(*label*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.SetImplementingAnalysisLabel "Link to this definition")  
Sets the requested analysis label that must be implemented by an analysis package on project level.

Attention:  
If this option is set, the package must run as stimulation package in a project.

Parameters:  **label** (*str*) – The analysis label

SetImplementingTraceStepUuid(*traceStepUuid*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.SetImplementingTraceStepUuid "Link to this definition")  
Sets the implementing trace analysis (step) by its UUID.

Parameters:  **traceStepUuid** (*str*) – trace anylysis step UUID of the local trace analysis (step)

SetSuccessComment(*successComment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.SetSuccessComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets the expression for the success comment of the step. The expression will be activated if it was not enabled previously.

Parameters:  **successComment** (*string*) – The expression for the success comment

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.SetTags "Link to this definition")  
Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTimeOptionOnlySynchronization(*timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.SetTimeOptionOnlySynchronization "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “only synchronization”.

Parameters:  - **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout in ms to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – The polling cycle in ms or s or min or h or d. Might be left out.

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h, or d)

SetTimeOptionPollingCycleMultiplier(*pollingCycleMultiplier*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.SetTimeOptionPollingCycleMultiplier "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “polling cycle multiplier”. This option must only be used when inserting the test step into a Multi-Check!

Parameters:  **pollingCycleMultiplier** (*string*) – The polling cycle multiplier to be used.

SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeast(*minimumDuration*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeast "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “true for at least”.

Parameters:  - **minimumDuration** (*string*) – The minimum duration to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h, or d)

SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeastWithin(*minimumDuration*, *timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeastWithin "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “true for at least … within …”.

Parameters:  - **minimumDuration** (*string*) – The minimum duration in ms to be used

- **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h, or d)

SetTimeOptionWaitUntilTrue(*timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.SetTimeOptionWaitUntilTrue "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “wait until true”.

Parameters:  - **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used.

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h, or d).

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

ResetTraceAnalysisImplementation()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.ResetTraceAnalysisImplementation "Link to this definition")  
Disables the trace analysis implementation. The implementation will be taken by default from the global mapping file, if defined.

Deprecated since version 2021.2: Use [`ResetImplementationType()`](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.ResetImplementationType "ApiClient.TsKeyword.ResetImplementationType") instead.

## TsKeywordArgument[¶](#tskeywordargument "Link to this heading")

*class* TsKeywordArgument[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeywordArgument "Link to this definition")  
Base class

[`Argument`](#ApiClient.Argument "ApiClient.Argument")

Returned by

- [`TsKeyword.AddActivityArgument`](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.AddActivityArgument "ApiClient.TsKeyword.AddActivityArgument")

- [`TsKeyword.AddArgument`](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.AddArgument "ApiClient.TsKeyword.AddArgument")

- [`TsKeyword.AddComponentArgument`](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.AddComponentArgument "ApiClient.TsKeyword.AddComponentArgument")

- [`TsKeyword.GetArgument`](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetArgument "ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetArgument")

- [`TsKeyword.GetArguments`](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetArguments "ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetArguments")

Clone()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeywordArgument.Clone "Link to this definition")  
Call this method if you want to use API-objects in multiple contexts, e.g. if you want to insert a specific test step in multiple blocks.

Returns:  A copy of this object

Return type:  [`TsKeywordArgument`](#ApiClient.TsKeywordArgument "ApiClient.TsKeywordArgument")

GetIdentifier()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeywordArgument.GetIdentifier "Link to this definition")  
Returns the identifier of the argument.

Returns:  Identifier of argument.

Return type:  str

GetKeywordValueExpression()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeywordArgument.GetKeywordValueExpression "Link to this definition")  
Returns the value expression of the argument.

Returns:  Expression of argument.

Return type:  [`KeywordValueExpression`](ExpressionApi.md#ApiClient.KeywordValueExpression "ApiClient.KeywordValueExpression")

GetName()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeywordArgument.GetName "Link to this definition")  
Returns the name of the underlying argument, if the containing keyword catalog is loaded.

Returns:  Name of argument.

Return type:  str

GetUnit()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeywordArgument.GetUnit "Link to this definition")  
Returns the unit of the argument.

Returns:  Unit string of argument or None if no unit information is attached.

Return type:  str

GetValueExpression()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeywordArgument.GetValueExpression "Link to this definition")  
Returns the value expression of the argument.

Returns:  Expression of argument.

Return type:  str

SetKeywordValueExpression(*expression*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeywordArgument.SetKeywordValueExpression "Link to this definition")  
Sets the value expression of the argument.

Parameters:  **expression** ([`KeywordValueExpression`](ExpressionApi.md#ApiClient.KeywordValueExpression "ApiClient.KeywordValueExpression")) – Expression of argument.

SetUnit(*unit*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeywordArgument.SetUnit "Link to this definition")  
Sets the unit of the argument.

Parameters:  **unit** (*str*) – Unit string of argument. Use None to remove unit information.

SetValueExpression(*value*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeywordArgument.SetValueExpression "Link to this definition")  
Sets the value expression of the argument.

Parameters:  **value** (*str*) – Expression of argument.

SetValueRangeExpression(*minValue*, *maxValue*, *stepSize*, *includeMinValue=True*, *includeMaxValue=False*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeywordArgument.SetValueRangeExpression "Link to this definition")  
Special method to define a range as value expression for the argument.

Parameters:  - **minValue** (*str*) – Expression of the lower limit

- **maxValue** (*str*) – Expression of the upper limit

- **stepSize** (*str*) – Expression of the step size

- **includeMinValue** (*boolean*) – If True (default) the minimum value is a candidate for the random value at runtime. If False it is not a possible candidate to pick from.

- **includeMaxValue** (*boolean*) – If True the maximum value is a candidate for the random value at runtime; if False (default) it is not.

## TsKeywordReturn[¶](#tskeywordreturn "Link to this heading")

*class* TsKeywordReturn[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeywordReturn "Link to this definition")  
Base class

[`Return`](#ApiClient.Return "ApiClient.Return")

Returned by

- [`TsKeyword.AddActivityReturn`](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.AddActivityReturn "ApiClient.TsKeyword.AddActivityReturn")

- [`TsKeyword.AddDesiredActivityReturn`](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.AddDesiredActivityReturn "ApiClient.TsKeyword.AddDesiredActivityReturn")

- [`TsKeyword.AddReturn`](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.AddReturn "ApiClient.TsKeyword.AddReturn")

- [`TsKeyword.GetReturn`](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetReturn "ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetReturn")

- [`TsKeyword.GetReturns`](#ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetReturns "ApiClient.TsKeyword.GetReturns")

Clone()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeywordReturn.Clone "Link to this definition")  
Call this method if you want to use API-objects in multiple contexts, e.g. if you want to insert a specific test step in multiple blocks.

Returns:  A copy of this object

Return type:  [`TsKeywordReturn`](#ApiClient.TsKeywordReturn "ApiClient.TsKeywordReturn")

DeactivateExpectation()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeywordReturn.DeactivateExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the expectation so that the result will not be evaluated.

DeactivateSaveIn()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeywordReturn.DeactivateSaveIn "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the return’s save in property, so the value will not be stored in a package variable.

GetExpectation()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeywordReturn.GetExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Returns the expectation expression from the evaluation of the test step, or None, if no expectation was defined.

Returns:  The expectation

Return type:  [`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")

GetIdentifier()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeywordReturn.GetIdentifier "Link to this definition")  
Returns the identifier of the argument.

Returns:  Identifier of return.

Return type:  str

GetName()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeywordReturn.GetName "Link to this definition")  
Returns the name of the underlying return, if the containing keyword catalog is loaded.

Returns:  Name of return.

Return type:  str

GetSaveInVariableName()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeywordReturn.GetSaveInVariableName "Link to this definition")  
Returns the currently selected variable to save the return value.

Returns:  The variable’s name or None if return value is not saved to a variable by the keyword test step.

Return type:  str

GetUnit()[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeywordReturn.GetUnit "Link to this definition")  
Returns the unit of the return.

Returns:  Unit string of return or None if no unit information is attached.

Return type:  str

SetExpectation(*expectation*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeywordReturn.SetExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Sets the expectation in the evaluation of the test step. The expectation will be activated if it was not enabled previously.

Parameters:  **expectation** ([`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")) – The expectation

Raises:  
**ValueError** – If the expectation is not of type NumericExpectation or StringExpectation

SetSaveInVariableName(*variableName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeywordReturn.SetSaveInVariableName "Link to this definition")  
Sets the name of the variable used for storing data by the return. The variable will be created automatically if it does not already exist in the package where the return is placed in.

Parameters:  **variableName** (*str*) – The variable’s name. Must not be None or an empty string.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If variableName is None or an empty string

SetUnit(*unit*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsKeywordReturn.SetUnit "Link to this definition")  
Sets the unit of the return.

Parameters:  **unit** (*str*) – Unit string of return. Use None to remove unit information.

## TsAXSCall[¶](#tsaxscall "Link to this heading")

*class* TsAXSCall[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall "Link to this definition")  
Base class

[`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

Subclasses

- [`TsKeyword`](#ApiClient.TsKeyword "ApiClient.TsKeyword")

AddTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.AddTag "Link to this definition")  
Add a specific tag to this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be set

Clone()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.Clone "Link to this definition")  
Call this method if you want to use API-objects in multiple contexts, e.g. if you want to insert a specific test step in multiple blocks.

Returns:  A copy of this object

Return type:  [`TsAXSCall`](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall "ApiClient.TsAXSCall")

DeactivateFailedComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.DeactivateFailedComment "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the expectation for the failed comment so that the result will not be evaluated.

DeactivateSuccessComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.DeactivateSuccessComment "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the expectation for the success comment so that the result will not be evaluated.

DeactivateTimeOption()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.DeactivateTimeOption "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates any time option set on the test step. This is equivalent to selecting the option “none” in the test step’s time options menu.

DeleteTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.DeleteTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Deletes a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

GetActionColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.GetActionColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “action” column.

Returns:  Action column text

Return type:  str

GetActiveTimeOptionType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.GetActiveTimeOptionType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the type of the currently active time option.

Returns:  Type of active time option (“Timeless”, “Finally”, “TrueForWithin”, “Generally”, “SyncOnly”, “PollingCycleMultiplier”)

Return type:  string

GetArgument(*identifier*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.GetArgument "Link to this definition")  
Gets the argument with the given identifier of the keyword test step.

Parameters:  **identifier** (*str*) – Identifier of argument. Has to match the identifier of an existing argument of the keyword.

Returns:  Argument of this test step whose identifier matches ‘identifier’ or None if there is no argument with this identifier.

Return type:  [`Argument`](#ApiClient.Argument "ApiClient.Argument")

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If identifier is None or an empty string

GetComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.GetComment "Link to this definition")  
Returns the comment of the test step in the current test case language.

Returns:  Comment text as shown in the comment tab

Return type:  str

GetCommentColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.GetCommentColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column.

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetError()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.GetError "Link to this definition")  
Returns a list of errors. Note that the error messages depend on the program language ecu.test is set to. Because of that we do not recommend to check against exact error messages, unless you are certain about the respective program language.

Returns:  List of errors

Return type:  list[str]

GetFailedComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.GetFailedComment "Link to this definition")  
Returns the failed comment of the step.

Returns:  The failed comment

Return type:  string

GetLineNo()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.GetLineNo "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test steps line number within its test case.

Returns:  Line number

Return type:  int

GetMinimumDuration()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.GetMinimumDuration "Link to this definition")  
Returns the minimum duration of the test step’s time option, if a corresponding option has been set.

Returns:  The minimum duration, else None

Return type:  string

GetMinimumDurationUnit()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.GetMinimumDurationUnit "Link to this definition")  
Returns the unit of the minimum duration of the test step’s time option, if a corresponding option has been set.

Returns:  The unit of the minimum duration, else None

Return type:  string

GetParameterColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.GetParameterColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “parameter” column.

Returns:  Parameter column text

Return type:  str

GetParent()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.GetParent "Link to this definition")  
Returns the parent test step.

Returns:  The parent test step or None if it is a top level test step.

Return type:  [`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

GetPollingCycle()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.GetPollingCycle "Link to this definition")  
Returns the polling cycle of the test step’s time option, if a corresponding option has been set.

Returns:  The polling cycle, else None

Return type:  string

GetPollingCycleUnit()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.GetPollingCycleUnit "Link to this definition")  
Returns the unit of the polling cycle of the test step’s time option, if a corresponding option has been set.

Returns:  The unit of the polling cycle, else None

Return type:  string

GetReturn(*identifier*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.GetReturn "Link to this definition")  
Gets the return with the given identifier of the keyword test step.

Parameters:  **identifier** (*str*) – Identifier of the return. Has to match the identifier of an existing return of the keyword.

Returns:  Return of this test step whose identifier matches ‘identifier’ or None if there is no return with this identifier.

Return type:  [`Return`](#ApiClient.Return "ApiClient.Return")

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If identifier is None or an empty string

GetSuccessComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.GetSuccessComment "Link to this definition")  
Returns the success comment of the step.

Returns:  The success comment

Return type:  string

GetTags()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.GetTags "Link to this definition")  
Returns the tags set for this step.

Returns:  A (sorted) list of tags

Return type:  list[str]

GetTestManagementId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.GetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test management id of the test step.

Returns:  Test step id.

Return type:  str

GetTestStepId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.GetTestStepId "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test step id.

Returns:  test step id

Return type:  str

GetTimeout()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.GetTimeout "Link to this definition")  
Returns the timeout of the test step’s time option, if a corresponding option has been set.

Returns:  The timeout else None

Return type:  string

GetTimeoutUnit()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.GetTimeoutUnit "Link to this definition")  
Returns the unit of the timeout of the test step’s time option, if a corresponding option has been set.

Returns:  The unit of the timeout else None

Return type:  string

GetTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.GetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the requested text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.GetType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the type (class name) of the test step, e.g.

> - “TsPreconditionBlock”
>
> - “TsWait”
>
> - “TsIfThenElse”
>
> - “TsSwitchCase”
>
> - “TsCaseNode”

Returns:  Type (class name) of the test step

Return type:  str

GetValueColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.GetValueColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “value” column in your current test case language.

Returns:  Value column text

Return type:  str

IsBreakpoint()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.IsBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is a break point.

Returns:  True if test step is a break point, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsContainer()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.IsContainer "Link to this definition")  
Returns True, if the test step supports calling GetChildren as well as manipulating the structure of its children. (e. g. via inserting or deleting sub test steps).

Returns:  True if it can contain test steps, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.IsEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns the state of the test step.

Returns:  True if test step is enabled, otherwise False

Return type:  bool

IsInPostcondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.IsInPostcondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a postcondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a postcondition, else Flase

Return type:  bool

IsInPrecondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.IsInPrecondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a precondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a precondition, else False

Return type:  bool

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.IsVisible "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is visible. This depends on the test step itself or a parent test step being disabled.

Returns:  True if test step is visible, else False

Return type:  boolean

RemoveArgument(*identifier*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.RemoveArgument "Link to this definition")  
Removes the argument with the given identifier from the keyword test step.

Parameters:  **identifier** (*str*) – Identifier of argument. Has to match the identifier of an existing argument of the keyword.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If there is no argument that matches identifier

RemoveReturn(*identifier*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.RemoveReturn "Link to this definition")  
Removes the return with the given identifier from the keyword test step.

Parameters:  **identifier** (*str*) – Identifier of the return. Has to match the identifier of an existing return of the keyword.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If there is no return that matches identifier

RemoveTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.RemoveTag "Link to this definition")  
Remove a specific tag from this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be removed

SetBreakpoint(*enable*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.SetBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Sets or unsets the test step to act as a break point.

Parameters:  **enable** (*boolean*) – True if test step is a break point, else False

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the current test case language.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetFailedComment(*failedComment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.SetFailedComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets the expression for the failed comment of the step. The expression will be activated if it was not enabled previously.

Parameters:  **failedComment** (*string*) – The expression for the failed comment

SetSuccessComment(*successComment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.SetSuccessComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets the expression for the success comment of the step. The expression will be activated if it was not enabled previously.

Parameters:  **successComment** (*string*) – The expression for the success comment

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.SetTags "Link to this definition")  
Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTimeOptionOnlySynchronization(*timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.SetTimeOptionOnlySynchronization "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “only synchronization”.

Parameters:  - **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout in ms to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – The polling cycle in ms or s or min or h or d. Might be left out.

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h, or d)

SetTimeOptionPollingCycleMultiplier(*pollingCycleMultiplier*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.SetTimeOptionPollingCycleMultiplier "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “polling cycle multiplier”. This option must only be used when inserting the test step into a Multi-Check!

Parameters:  **pollingCycleMultiplier** (*string*) – The polling cycle multiplier to be used.

SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeast(*minimumDuration*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeast "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “true for at least”.

Parameters:  - **minimumDuration** (*string*) – The minimum duration to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h, or d)

SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeastWithin(*minimumDuration*, *timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeastWithin "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “true for at least … within …”.

Parameters:  - **minimumDuration** (*string*) – The minimum duration in ms to be used

- **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h, or d)

SetTimeOptionWaitUntilTrue(*timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.SetTimeOptionWaitUntilTrue "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “wait until true”.

Parameters:  - **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used.

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit of the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h, or d).

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

## Argument[¶](#argument "Link to this heading")

*class* Argument[¶](#ApiClient.Argument "Link to this definition")  
Returned by

- [`TsAXSCall.GetArgument`](#ApiClient.TsAXSCall.GetArgument "ApiClient.TsAXSCall.GetArgument")

Subclasses

- [`TsKeywordArgument`](#ApiClient.TsKeywordArgument "ApiClient.TsKeywordArgument")

Clone()[¶](#ApiClient.Argument.Clone "Link to this definition")  
Call this method if you want to use API-objects in multiple contexts, e.g. if you want to insert a specific test step in multiple blocks.

Returns:  A copy of this object

Return type:  [`Argument`](#ApiClient.Argument "ApiClient.Argument")

GetIdentifier()[¶](#ApiClient.Argument.GetIdentifier "Link to this definition")  
Returns the identifier of the argument.

Returns:  Identifier of argument.

Return type:  str

GetUnit()[¶](#ApiClient.Argument.GetUnit "Link to this definition")  
Returns the unit of the argument.

Returns:  Unit string of argument or None if no unit information is attached.

Return type:  str

GetValueExpression()[¶](#ApiClient.Argument.GetValueExpression "Link to this definition")  
Returns the value expression of the argument.

Returns:  Expression of argument.

Return type:  str

SetUnit(*unit*)[¶](#ApiClient.Argument.SetUnit "Link to this definition")  
Sets the unit of the argument.

Parameters:  **unit** (*str*) – Unit string of argument. Use None to remove unit information.

SetValueExpression(*value*)[¶](#ApiClient.Argument.SetValueExpression "Link to this definition")  
Sets the value expression of the argument.

Parameters:  **value** (*str*) – Expression of argument.

SetValueRangeExpression(*minValue*, *maxValue*, *stepSize*, *includeMinValue=True*, *includeMaxValue=False*)[¶](#ApiClient.Argument.SetValueRangeExpression "Link to this definition")  
Special method to define a range as value expression for the argument.

Parameters:  - **minValue** (*str*) – Expression of the lower limit

- **maxValue** (*str*) – Expression of the upper limit

- **stepSize** (*str*) – Expression of the step size

- **includeMinValue** (*boolean*) – If True (default) the minimum value is a candidate for the random value at runtime. If False it is not a possible candidate to pick from.

- **includeMaxValue** (*boolean*) – If True the maximum value is a candidate for the random value at runtime; if False (default) it is not.

IsInPostcondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCANoeTestModuleRunner.IsInPostcondition "Link to this definition")

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCANoeTestModuleRunner.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")

SetExecuteAllTestModules()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCANoeTestModuleRunner.SetExecuteAllTestModules "Link to this definition")  
Sets the option to execute all test modules of the test environment

SetTags(*tags*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCANoeTestModuleRunner.SetTags "Link to this definition")  
Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestEnvironmentExpression(*testEnvironment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCANoeTestModuleRunner.SetTestEnvironmentExpression "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  **testEnvironment** (*unicode*) – expression for the test environment

SetTimeoutExpression(*timeoutExpression*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCANoeTestModuleRunner.SetTimeoutExpression "Link to this definition")

## TsCall[¶](#tscall "Link to this heading")

*class* TsCall[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall "Link to this definition")

[`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

Returned by

- [`TestStepApi.CreateTsCall`](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsCall "ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsCall")

Subclasses

- [`TsCallDiagService`](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService "ApiClient.TsCallDiagService")

- [`TsCallIOControl`](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControl "ApiClient.TsCallIOControl")

- [`TsCallIOControlFreezeCurrentState`](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlFreezeCurrentState "ApiClient.TsCallIOControlFreezeCurrentState")

- [`TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved`](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved "ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved")

- [`TsCallIOControlResetToDefault`](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault "ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault")

- [`TsCallIOControlReturnControlToEcu`](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlReturnControlToEcu "ApiClient.TsCallIOControlReturnControlToEcu")

- [`TsCallIOControlShortTermAdjustment`](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlShortTermAdjustment "ApiClient.TsCallIOControlShortTermAdjustment")

- [`TsCallWrite`](#ApiClient.TsCallWrite "ApiClient.TsCallWrite")

AddParameter(*parameterName*, *valueExpression=None*, *repr='PHYS'*, *unit="don't care"*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.AddParameter "Link to this definition")  
Adds a parameter to the test step.

See also [`UpdateInterface()`](#ApiClient.TsCall.UpdateInterface "ApiClient.TsCall.UpdateInterface") and the various `SetParameter...` methods.

Parameters:  - **parameterName** (*str*) – name of the parameter

- **valueExpression** (*str*) – expression to use for the parameter’s value

- **repr** (*str*) – Representation. One of `~ApiClient.PHYS`, `~ApiClient.RAW`, `~ApiClient.TEXT` or `~ApiClient.BITS`

- **unit** (*str*) – Unit of the parameter

AddReturnValue(*returnName*, *saveIn=None*, *expectation=None*, *repr='PHYS'*, *unit="don't care"*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.AddReturnValue "Link to this definition")  
Adds a return value to the test step.

See also [`UpdateInterface()`](#ApiClient.TsCall.UpdateInterface "ApiClient.TsCall.UpdateInterface") and the various `SetReturnValue...` methods.

Parameters:  - **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

- **saveIn** (*str*) – name of the variable to save the return value into

- **expectation** ([`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")) – Expectation for the return value

- **repr** (*str*) – Representation. One of `~ApiClient.PHYS`, `~ApiClient.RAW`, `~ApiClient.TEXT` or `~ApiClient.BITS`

- **unit** (*str*) – Unit of the return value

AddTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.AddTag "Link to this definition")  
Add a specific tag to this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be set

Clone()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.Clone "Link to this definition")  
Call this method if you want to use API-objects in multiple contexts, e.g. if you want to insert a specific test step in multiple blocks.

Returns:  A copy of this object

Return type:  [`TsCall`](#ApiClient.TsCall "ApiClient.TsCall")

DeactivateReturnValueExpectation(*returnName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.DeactivateReturnValueExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the expectation for the specified return value.

If no return value with an expectation remains, also deactivates any time option that may be configured.

Parameters:  **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

DeactivateReturnValueSaveIn(*returnName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.DeactivateReturnValueSaveIn "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the save into a variable mechanism for the specified return value

Parameters:  **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

DeactivateTimeOption()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.DeactivateTimeOption "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates any time option set on the test step. This is equivalent to selecting the option “none” in the test step’s time options menu.

DeleteParameter(*parameterName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.DeleteParameter "Link to this definition")  
Removes a parameter from the test step.

See also [`UpdateInterface()`](#ApiClient.TsCall.UpdateInterface "ApiClient.TsCall.UpdateInterface").

Parameters:  **parameterName** (*str*) – name of the parameter

DeleteReturnValue(*returnName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.DeleteReturnValue "Link to this definition")  
Removes a return value from the test step. If no return values are left after the deletion, also deactivates any time option that may be configured.

See also [`UpdateInterface()`](#ApiClient.TsCall.UpdateInterface "ApiClient.TsCall.UpdateInterface").

Parameters:  **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

DeleteTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.DeleteTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Deletes a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

GetActionColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.GetActionColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “action” column.

Returns:  Action column text

Return type:  str

GetActiveTimeOptionType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.GetActiveTimeOptionType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the type of the currently active time option.

Returns:  Type of active time option (“Timeless”, “Finally”, “TrueForWithin”, “Generally”, “SyncOnly”, “PollingCycleMultiplier”)

Return type:  string

GetComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.GetComment "Link to this definition")  
Returns the comment of the test step in the current test case language.

Returns:  Comment text as shown in the comment tab

Return type:  str

GetCommentColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.GetCommentColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column.

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetCycleTimeExpression()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.GetCycleTimeExpression "Link to this definition")  
Gets the cycle time expression for this test step.

Returns:  cycle time expression in milliseconds

Return type:  str

GetCyclicState()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.GetCyclicState "Link to this definition")  
Gets the cyclic sending state for this test step.

Returns:  ‘on’, ‘off’, ‘unchanged’ or None

Return type:  str

GetError()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.GetError "Link to this definition")  
Returns a list of errors. Note that the error messages depend on the program language ecu.test is set to. Because of that we do not recommend to check against exact error messages, unless you are certain about the respective program language.

Returns:  List of errors

Return type:  list[str]

GetIgnoreResponse()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.GetIgnoreResponse "Link to this definition")  
Returns test step’s option for ignoring its response.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If not return values or ignoring the response is not supported the option does not make sense.

Returns:  Returns the value of the option.

Return type:  bool

GetLineNo()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.GetLineNo "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test steps line number within its test case.

Returns:  Line number

Return type:  int

GetMappingItemReferenceName()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.GetMappingItemReferenceName "Link to this definition")  
Returns the unique reference name of the mapping item used by this test step.

Returns:  Reference name of used mapping item

Return type:  str

GetMinimumDuration()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.GetMinimumDuration "Link to this definition")  
Returns the minimum duration of the test step’s time option, if a corresponding option has been set.

Returns:  The minimum duration, else None

Return type:  string

GetMinimumDurationUnit()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.GetMinimumDurationUnit "Link to this definition")  
Returns the unit of the minimum duration of the test step’s time option, if a corresponding option has been set.

Returns:  The unit of the minimum duration, else None

Return type:  string

GetPacketExpectation()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.GetPacketExpectation "Link to this definition")

Returns:  expectation

Return type:  [`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")

GetParameterColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.GetParameterColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “parameter” column.

Returns:  Parameter column text

Return type:  str

GetParameterNames()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.GetParameterNames "Link to this definition")  
Returns the names of the parameters defined in the test step.

Note

If the test step was created without a mapping item, or if the data base describing the target of the mapping item was not loaded, this list is initially empty. You can use [`AddParameter()`](#ApiClient.TsCall.AddParameter "ApiClient.TsCall.AddParameter") or [`UpdateInterface()`](#ApiClient.TsCall.UpdateInterface "ApiClient.TsCall.UpdateInterface") to populate it.

Returns:  Parameter names

Return type:  list[str]

Returns:  representation used for the parameter

Parameters:  **parameterName** (*str*) – name of the parameter

Returns:  value expression assigned to the parameter

Return type:  str

Return type:  string

GetReturnNames()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.GetReturnNames "Link to this definition")

Note

If the test step was created without a mapping item, or if the data base describing the target of the mapping item was not loaded, this list is initially empty. You can use [`AddReturnValue()`](#ApiClient.TsCall.AddReturnValue "ApiClient.TsCall.AddReturnValue") or [`UpdateInterface()`](#ApiClient.TsCall.UpdateInterface "ApiClient.TsCall.UpdateInterface") to populate it.

Returns:  Return value names

Return type:  list[str]

Return type:  list[str]

Return type:  string

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

>

Return type:  str

Removes the expectation for the packet. Only applicable if this test step is mapped to a service method/event.

Remove a specific tag from this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be removed

SetBreakpoint(*enable*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.SetBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Sets or unsets the test step to act as a break point.

Parameters:  **enable** (*boolean*) – True if test step is a break point, else False

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the current test case language.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

SetCyclic(*cyclicState*, *cycleTimeExpression=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.SetCyclic "Link to this definition")  
Changes the send cyclic settings for a test step that has call mode ‘SEND_EVENT’

Raises:  
**ApiError** – if the test step doesn’t support cyclic sending

Parameters:  - **cyclicState** (*str*) –

  possible values are:

  - ’on’ enables cyclic sending using the specified cycleTimeExpression

  - ’off’ disables cyclic sending

  - ’unchanged’ keeps cyclic sending (e.g. if just the event’s values should be changed)

  - None removes cyclic settings so the test step will send the event just once

- **cycleTimeExpression** (*str*) – in milliseconds, necessary for cyclicState ‘on’

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetIgnoreResponse(*ignoreResponse*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.SetIgnoreResponse "Link to this definition")  
Sets test step’s option for ignoring its response.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If not return values or ignoring the response is not supported the option does not make sense.

Parameters:  **ignoreResponse** (*bool*) – Sets the value of the option.

SetPacketExpectation(*expectationExpression*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.SetPacketExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Sets the expectation for the packet. Only applicable if this test step is mapped to a service method/event.

This should be a [`ExpressionExpectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.ExpressionExpectation "ApiClient.ExpressionExpectation") referencing the packet as `value`, a [`PresentExpectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.PresentExpectation "ApiClient.PresentExpectation"), or a [`NotPresentExpectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.NotPresentExpectation "ApiClient.NotPresentExpectation").

Keep in mind that the `value` object can not only be a `PacketSomeIp` but also NotPresent.

Parameters:  **expectationExpression** ([`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")) – expectation for the return value

SetParameterRepresentation(*parameterName*, *repr*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.SetParameterRepresentation "Link to this definition")  
Sets the representation for the specified parameter

Parameters:  - **parameterName** (*str*) – name of the parameter

- **repr** (*str*) – representation to use for the parameter. One of `~ApiClient.PHYS`, `~ApiClient.RAW`, `~ApiClient.TEXT` or `~ApiClient.BITS`

SetParameterUnit(*parameterName*, *unit*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.SetParameterUnit "Link to this definition")  
Sets the unit for the specified parameter

Parameters:  - **parameterName** (*str*) – name of the parameter

- **unit** (*str*) – Unit to use for the `~ApiClient.PHYS` representation for this parameter

SetParameterValue(*parameterName*, *valueExpression*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.SetParameterValue "Link to this definition")  
Assigns a new expression to use the specified parameter’s value

Parameters:  - **parameterName** (*str*) – name of the parameter

- **valueExpression** (*str*) – expression to use for the parameter’s value

SetReturnValueExpectation(*returnName*, *expectationExpression*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.SetReturnValueExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Sets the expectation for the specified return value.

Parameters:  - **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

- **expectationExpression** ([`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")) – expectation for the return value

SetReturnValueRepresentation(*returnName*, *repr*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.SetReturnValueRepresentation "Link to this definition")  
Sets the representation for the specified return value

Parameters:  - **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

- **repr** (*str*) – representation to use for the return value. One of `~ApiClient.PHYS`, `~ApiClient.RAW`, `~ApiClient.TEXT` or `~ApiClient.BITS`

SetReturnValueSaveIn(*returnName*, *saveInVariableName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.SetReturnValueSaveIn "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  - **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

- **saveInVariableName** (*str*) – variable name

SetReturnValueUnit(*returnName*, *unit*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.SetReturnValueUnit "Link to this definition")

- **unit** (*str*) – Unit to use for the `~ApiClient.PHYS` representation for this return value

Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTimeOptionOnlySynchronization(*timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.SetTimeOptionOnlySynchronization "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “only synchronization”.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If no return value has an expectation, no time option can be set.

Parameters:  - **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h or d)

SetTimeOptionPollingCycleMultiplier(*pollingCycleMultiplier*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.SetTimeOptionPollingCycleMultiplier "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “polling cycle multiplier”. This option must only be used when inserting the test step into a Multi-Check!

Parameters:  **pollingCycleMultiplier** (*string*) – The polling cycle multiplier to be used.

SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeast(*minimumDuration*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeast "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “true for at least”.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If no return value has an expectation, no time option can be set.

Parameters:  - **minimumDuration** (*string*) – The minimum duration to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h or d)

SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeastWithin(*minimumDuration*, *timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeastWithin "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “true for at least … within …”.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If no return value has an expectation, no time option can be set.

Parameters:  - **minimumDuration** (*string*) – The minimum duration to be used

- **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h or d)

SetTimeOptionWaitUntilTrue(*timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.SetTimeOptionWaitUntilTrue "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “wait until true”.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If no return value has an expectation, no time option can be set.

Parameters:  - **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h or d)

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

UpdateInterface()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCall.UpdateInterface "Link to this definition")  
Updates the list of parameters and return values according to the assigned mapping target:

- Removes any parameters and return values not available in the assigned mapping target

- Adds any missing parameters and return values defined in the assigned mapping target. Parameters are assigned a default value. Return values are not assigned any expectation.

Parameters and return values existing in both the test step and the mapping target are left as they are, which might in some cases result in an incompatible representation or unit.

Note

This only works if the test step is associated with an appropriate mappingItem (via a package, via a global mapping, or via the `~ApiClient.mappingItem` parameter of the [`CreateTsCall()`](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsCall "ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsCall") method) and the data base describing the target of the mapping item is loaded.

## TsCallDiagService[¶](#tscalldiagservice "Link to this heading")

*class* TsCallDiagService[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService "Link to this definition")  
Base classes

- [`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

- [`TsCall`](#ApiClient.TsCall "ApiClient.TsCall")

AddParameter(*parameterName*, *valueExpression=None*, *repr='PHYS'*, *unit="don't care"*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.AddParameter "Link to this definition")  
Adds a parameter to the test step.

See also [`UpdateInterface()`](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.UpdateInterface "ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.UpdateInterface") and the various `SetParameter...` methods.

Parameters:  - **parameterName** (*str*) – name of the parameter

- **valueExpression** (*str*) – expression to use for the parameter’s value

- **repr** (*str*) – Representation. One of `~ApiClient.PHYS`, `~ApiClient.RAW`, `~ApiClient.TEXT` or `~ApiClient.BITS`

- **unit** (*str*) – Unit of the parameter

AddReturnValue(*returnName*, *saveIn=None*, *expectation=None*, *repr='PHYS'*, *unit="don't care"*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.AddReturnValue "Link to this definition")  
Adds a return value to the test step.

See also [`UpdateInterface()`](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.UpdateInterface "ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.UpdateInterface") and the various `SetReturnValue...` methods.

Parameters:  - **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

- **saveIn** (*str*) – name of the variable to save the return value into

- **expectation** ([`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")) – Expectation for the return value

- **repr** (*str*) – Representation. One of `~ApiClient.PHYS`, `~ApiClient.RAW`, `~ApiClient.TEXT` or `~ApiClient.BITS`

- **unit** (*str*) – Unit of the return value

AddTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.AddTag "Link to this definition")  
Add a specific tag to this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be set

Clone()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.Clone "Link to this definition")  
Call this method if you want to use API-objects in multiple contexts, e.g. if you want to insert a specific test step in multiple blocks.

Returns:  A copy of this object

Return type:  [`TsCallDiagService`](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService "ApiClient.TsCallDiagService")

DeactivateReturnValueExpectation(*returnName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.DeactivateReturnValueExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the expectation for the specified return value.

If no return value with an expectation remains, also deactivates any time option that may be configured.

Parameters:  **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

DeactivateReturnValueSaveIn(*returnName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.DeactivateReturnValueSaveIn "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the save into a variable mechanism for the specified return value

Parameters:  **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

DeactivateSaveIn()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.DeactivateSaveIn "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the test step’s save in property, so the value will not be stored in a package variable.

DeactivateTimeOption()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.DeactivateTimeOption "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates any time option set on the test step. This is equivalent to selecting the option “none” in the test step’s time options menu.

DeleteParameter(*parameterName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.DeleteParameter "Link to this definition")  
Removes a parameter from the test step.

See also [`UpdateInterface()`](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.UpdateInterface "ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.UpdateInterface").

Parameters:  **parameterName** (*str*) – name of the parameter

DeleteReturnValue(*returnName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.DeleteReturnValue "Link to this definition")  
Removes a return value from the test step. If no return values are left after the deletion, also deactivates any time option that may be configured.

See also [`UpdateInterface()`](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.UpdateInterface "ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.UpdateInterface").

Parameters:  **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

DeleteTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.DeleteTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Deletes a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

GetActionColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.GetActionColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “action” column.

Returns:  Action column text

Return type:  str

GetActiveTimeOptionType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.GetActiveTimeOptionType "Link to this definition")  
Returns the type of the currently active time option.

Returns:  Type of active time option (“Timeless”, “Finally”, “TrueForWithin”, “Generally”, “SyncOnly”, “PollingCycleMultiplier”)

Return type:  string

GetComment()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.GetComment "Link to this definition")  
Returns the comment of the test step in the current test case language.

Returns:  Comment text as shown in the comment tab

Return type:  str

GetCommentColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.GetCommentColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “comment” column.

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetCycleTimeExpression()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.GetCycleTimeExpression "Link to this definition")  
Gets the cycle time expression for this test step.

Returns:  cycle time expression in milliseconds

Return type:  str

GetCyclicState()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.GetCyclicState "Link to this definition")  
Gets the cyclic sending state for this test step.

Returns:  ‘on’, ‘off’, ‘unchanged’ or None

Return type:  str

GetError()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.GetError "Link to this definition")  
Returns a list of errors. Note that the error messages depend on the program language ecu.test is set to. Because of that we do not recommend to check against exact error messages, unless you are certain about the respective program language.

Returns:  List of errors

Return type:  list[str]

GetIgnoreResponse()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.GetIgnoreResponse "Link to this definition")  
Returns test step’s option for ignoring its response.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If not return values or ignoring the response is not supported the option does not make sense.

Returns:  Returns the value of the option.

Return type:  bool

GetLineNo()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.GetLineNo "Link to this definition")  
Returns the test steps line number within its test case.

Returns:  Line number

Return type:  int

GetMappingItemReferenceName()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.GetMappingItemReferenceName "Link to this definition")  
Returns the unique reference name of the mapping item used by this test step.

Returns:  Reference name of used mapping item

Return type:  str

GetMinimumDuration()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.GetMinimumDuration "Link to this definition")  
Returns the minimum duration of the test step’s time option, if a corresponding option has been set.

Returns:  The minimum duration, else None

Return type:  string

GetMinimumDurationUnit()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.GetMinimumDurationUnit "Link to this definition")

Returns:  The unit of the minimum duration, else None

Return type:  string

GetNegativeResponseExpectation()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.GetNegativeResponseExpectation "Link to this definition")

Returns:  configured expectation

Return type:  str

GetNegativeResponseExpectedNrc()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.GetNegativeResponseExpectedNrc "Link to this definition")  
Returns the expected nrc as a number. Only available if a specific negative response is expected.

GetPacketExpectation()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.GetPacketExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Returns the expectation for the packet

Returns:  expectation

Return type:  [`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")

GetParameterColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.GetParameterColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “parameter” column.

Returns:  Parameter column text

Return type:  str

GetParameterNames()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.GetParameterNames "Link to this definition")  
Returns the names of the parameters defined in the test step.

Note

If the test step was created without a mapping item, or if the data base describing the target of the mapping item was not loaded, this list is initially empty. You can use [`AddParameter()`](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.AddParameter "ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.AddParameter") or [`UpdateInterface()`](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.UpdateInterface "ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.UpdateInterface") to populate it.

Returns:  Parameter names

Return type:  list[str]

GetParameterValue(*parameterName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.GetParameterValue "Link to this definition")

Return type:  str

GetReturnNames()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.GetReturnNames "Link to this definition")

Note

If the test step was created without a mapping item, or if the data base describing the target of the mapping item was not loaded, this list is initially empty. You can use [`AddReturnValue()`](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.AddReturnValue "ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.AddReturnValue") or [`UpdateInterface()`](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.UpdateInterface "ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.UpdateInterface") to populate it.

GetTestStepId()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.GetTestStepId "Link to this definition")

GetTimeout()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.GetTimeout "Link to this definition")  
Returns the timeout of the test step’s time option, if a corresponding option has been set.

Returns:  The timeout else None

GetTimeoutUnit()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallDiagService.GetTimeoutUnit "Link to this definition")

Returns:  The unit of the timeout else None

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the requested text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Returns:  Comment column text
