Parameters:  **enable** (*boolean*) – True if test step is a break point, else False

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlReturnControlToEcu.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the current test case language.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

SetCyclic(*cyclicState*, *cycleTimeExpression=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlReturnControlToEcu.SetCyclic "Link to this definition")  
Changes the send cyclic settings for a test step that has call mode ‘SEND_EVENT’

Raises:  
**ApiError** – if the test step doesn’t support cyclic sending

Parameters:  - **cyclicState** (*str*) –

  possible values are:

  - ’on’ enables cyclic sending using the specified cycleTimeExpression

  - ’off’ disables cyclic sending

  - ’unchanged’ keeps cyclic sending (e.g. if just the event’s values should be changed)

  - None removes cyclic settings so the test step will send the event just once

- **cycleTimeExpression** (*str*) – in milliseconds, necessary for cyclicState ‘on’

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlReturnControlToEcu.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetIgnoreResponse(*ignoreResponse*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlReturnControlToEcu.SetIgnoreResponse "Link to this definition")  
Sets test step’s option for ignoring its response.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If not return values or ignoring the response is not supported the option does not make sense.

Parameters:  **ignoreResponse** (*bool*) – Sets the value of the option.

SetPacketExpectation(*expectationExpression*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlReturnControlToEcu.SetPacketExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Sets the expectation for the packet. Only applicable if this test step is mapped to a service method/event.

This should be a [`ExpressionExpectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.ExpressionExpectation "ApiClient.ExpressionExpectation") referencing the packet as `value`, a [`PresentExpectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.PresentExpectation "ApiClient.PresentExpectation"), or a [`NotPresentExpectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.NotPresentExpectation "ApiClient.NotPresentExpectation").

Keep in mind that the `value` object can not only be a `PacketSomeIp` but also NotPresent.

Parameters:  **expectationExpression** ([`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")) – expectation for the return value

SetParameterRepresentation(*parameterName*, *repr*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlReturnControlToEcu.SetParameterRepresentation "Link to this definition")  
Sets the representation for the specified parameter

Parameters:  - **parameterName** (*str*) – name of the parameter

- **repr** (*str*) – representation to use for the parameter. One of `~ApiClient.PHYS`, `~ApiClient.RAW`, `~ApiClient.TEXT` or `~ApiClient.BITS`

SetParameterUnit(*parameterName*, *unit*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlReturnControlToEcu.SetParameterUnit "Link to this definition")  
Sets the unit for the specified parameter

Parameters:  - **parameterName** (*str*) – name of the parameter

- **unit** (*str*) – Unit to use for the `~ApiClient.PHYS` representation for this parameter

SetParameterValue(*parameterName*, *valueExpression*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlReturnControlToEcu.SetParameterValue "Link to this definition")  
Assigns a new expression to use the specified parameter’s value

Parameters:  - **parameterName** (*str*) – name of the parameter

- **valueExpression** (*str*) – expression to use for the parameter’s value

SetReturnValueExpectation(*returnName*, *expectationExpression*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlReturnControlToEcu.SetReturnValueExpectation "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  - **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

- **expectationExpression** ([`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")) – expectation for the return value

SetReturnValueRepresentation(*returnName*, *repr*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlReturnControlToEcu.SetReturnValueRepresentation "Link to this definition")  
Sets the representation for the specified return value

Parameters:  - **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

- **repr** (*str*) – representation to use for the return value. One of `~ApiClient.PHYS`, `~ApiClient.RAW`, `~ApiClient.TEXT` or `~ApiClient.BITS`

Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlReturnControlToEcu.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTimeOptionOnlySynchronization(*timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlReturnControlToEcu.SetTimeOptionOnlySynchronization "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “only synchronization”.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If no return value has an expectation, no time option can be set.

Parameters:  - **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h or d)

SetTimeOptionPollingCycleMultiplier(*pollingCycleMultiplier*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlReturnControlToEcu.SetTimeOptionPollingCycleMultiplier "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “polling cycle multiplier”. This option must only be used when inserting the test step into a Multi-Check!

Parameters:  **pollingCycleMultiplier** (*string*) – The polling cycle multiplier to be used.

SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeast(*minimumDuration*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlReturnControlToEcu.SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeast "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “true for at least”.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If no return value has an expectation, no time option can be set.

Parameters:  - **minimumDuration** (*string*) – The minimum duration to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h or d)

SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeastWithin(*minimumDuration*, *timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlReturnControlToEcu.SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeastWithin "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “true for at least … within …”.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If no return value has an expectation, no time option can be set.

Parameters:  - **minimumDuration** (*string*) – The minimum duration to be used

- **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h or d)

SetTimeOptionWaitUntilTrue(*timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlReturnControlToEcu.SetTimeOptionWaitUntilTrue "Link to this definition")

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If no return value has an expectation, no time option can be set.

Parameters:  - **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h or d)

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlReturnControlToEcu.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

UpdateInterface()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlReturnControlToEcu.UpdateInterface "Link to this definition")  
Updates the list of parameters and return values according to the assigned mapping target:

- Removes any parameters and return values not available in the assigned mapping target

- Adds any missing parameters and return values defined in the assigned mapping target. Parameters are assigned a default value. Return values are not assigned any expectation.

Parameters and return values existing in both the test step and the mapping target are left as they are, which might in some cases result in an incompatible representation or unit.

Note

This only works if the test step is associated with an appropriate mappingItem (via a package, via a global mapping, or via the `~ApiClient.mappingItem` parameter of the [`CreateTsCall()`](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsCall "ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsCall") method) and the data base describing the target of the mapping item is loaded.

## TsCallIOControlResetToDefault[¶](#tscalliocontrolresettodefault "Link to this heading")

*class* TsCallIOControlResetToDefault[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault "Link to this definition")  
Base classes

- [`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

- [`TsCall`](#ApiClient.TsCall "ApiClient.TsCall")

- [`TsCallIOControl`](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControl "ApiClient.TsCallIOControl")

AddParameter(*parameterName*, *valueExpression=None*, *repr='PHYS'*, *unit="don't care"*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault.AddParameter "Link to this definition")  
Adds a parameter to the test step.

See also [`UpdateInterface()`](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault.UpdateInterface "ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault.UpdateInterface") and the various `SetParameter...` methods.

Parameters:  - **parameterName** (*str*) – name of the parameter

- **valueExpression** (*str*) – expression to use for the parameter’s value

- **repr** (*str*) – Representation. One of `~ApiClient.PHYS`, `~ApiClient.RAW`, `~ApiClient.TEXT` or `~ApiClient.BITS`

- **unit** (*str*) – Unit of the parameter

AddReturnValue(*returnName*, *saveIn=None*, *expectation=None*, *repr='PHYS'*, *unit="don't care"*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault.AddReturnValue "Link to this definition")  
Adds a return value to the test step.

See also [`UpdateInterface()`](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault.UpdateInterface "ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault.UpdateInterface") and the various `SetReturnValue...` methods.

Parameters:  - **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

- **saveIn** (*str*) – name of the variable to save the return value into

- **expectation** ([`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")) – Expectation for the return value

- **repr** (*str*) – Representation. One of `~ApiClient.PHYS`, `~ApiClient.RAW`, `~ApiClient.TEXT` or `~ApiClient.BITS`

- **unit** (*str*) – Unit of the return value

AddTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault.AddTag "Link to this definition")  
Add a specific tag to this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be set

Clone()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault.Clone "Link to this definition")  
Call this method if you want to use API-objects in multiple contexts, e.g. if you want to insert a specific test step in multiple blocks.

Returns:  A copy of this object

Return type:  [`TsCallIOControlResetToDefault`](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault "ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault")

DeactivateReturnValueExpectation(*returnName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault.DeactivateReturnValueExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the expectation for the specified return value.

If no return value with an expectation remains, also deactivates any time option that may be configured.

Parameters:  **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

DeactivateReturnValueSaveIn(*returnName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault.DeactivateReturnValueSaveIn "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the save into a variable mechanism for the specified return value

Parameters:  **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

DeactivateTimeOption()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault.DeactivateTimeOption "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates any time option set on the test step. This is equivalent to selecting the option “none” in the test step’s time options menu.

DeleteParameter(*parameterName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault.DeleteParameter "Link to this definition")  
Removes a parameter from the test step.

See also [`UpdateInterface()`](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault.UpdateInterface "ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault.UpdateInterface").

Parameters:  **parameterName** (*str*) – name of the parameter

DeleteReturnValue(*returnName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault.DeleteReturnValue "Link to this definition")  
Removes a return value from the test step. If no return values are left after the deletion, also deactivates any time option that may be configured.

See also [`UpdateInterface()`](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault.UpdateInterface "ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault.UpdateInterface").

Parameters:  **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

DeleteTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault.DeleteTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be removed

Parameters:  **enable** (*boolean*) – True if test step is a break point, else False

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the current test case language.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

SetCyclic(*cyclicState*, *cycleTimeExpression=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault.SetCyclic "Link to this definition")  
Changes the send cyclic settings for a test step that has call mode ‘SEND_EVENT’

Raises:  
**ApiError** – if the test step doesn’t support cyclic sending

Parameters:  - **cyclicState** (*str*) –

  possible values are:

  - ’on’ enables cyclic sending using the specified cycleTimeExpression

  - ’off’ disables cyclic sending

  - ’unchanged’ keeps cyclic sending (e.g. if just the event’s values should be changed)

  - None removes cyclic settings so the test step will send the event just once

- **cycleTimeExpression** (*str*) – in milliseconds, necessary for cyclicState ‘on’

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetIgnoreResponse(*ignoreResponse*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault.SetIgnoreResponse "Link to this definition")  
Sets test step’s option for ignoring its response.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If not return values or ignoring the response is not supported the option does not make sense.

Parameters:  **ignoreResponse** (*bool*) – Sets the value of the option.

SetPacketExpectation(*expectationExpression*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault.SetPacketExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Sets the expectation for the packet. Only applicable if this test step is mapped to a service method/event.

This should be a [`ExpressionExpectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.ExpressionExpectation "ApiClient.ExpressionExpectation") referencing the packet as `value`, a [`PresentExpectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.PresentExpectation "ApiClient.PresentExpectation"), or a [`NotPresentExpectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.NotPresentExpectation "ApiClient.NotPresentExpectation").

Keep in mind that the `value` object can not only be a `PacketSomeIp` but also NotPresent.

Parameters:  **expectationExpression** ([`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")) – expectation for the return value

SetParameterRepresentation(*parameterName*, *repr*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault.SetParameterRepresentation "Link to this definition")  
Sets the representation for the specified parameter

Parameters:  - **parameterName** (*str*) – name of the parameter

- **repr** (*str*) – representation to use for the parameter. One of `~ApiClient.PHYS`, `~ApiClient.RAW`, `~ApiClient.TEXT` or `~ApiClient.BITS`

SetParameterUnit(*parameterName*, *unit*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault.SetParameterUnit "Link to this definition")  
Sets the unit for the specified parameter

Parameters:  - **parameterName** (*str*) – name of the parameter

- **unit** (*str*) – Unit to use for the `~ApiClient.PHYS` representation for this parameter

SetParameterValue(*parameterName*, *valueExpression*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault.SetParameterValue "Link to this definition")

SetTimeOptionOnlySynchronization(*timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault.SetTimeOptionOnlySynchronization "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “only synchronization”.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If no return value has an expectation, no time option can be set.

Parameters:  - **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h or d)

SetTimeOptionPollingCycleMultiplier(*pollingCycleMultiplier*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault.SetTimeOptionPollingCycleMultiplier "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “polling cycle multiplier”. This option must only be used when inserting the test step into a Multi-Check!

Parameters:  **pollingCycleMultiplier** (*string*) – The polling cycle multiplier to be used.

SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeast(*minimumDuration*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault.SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeast "Link to this definition")

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If no return value has an expectation, no time option can be set.

Parameters:  - **minimumDuration** (*string*) – The minimum duration to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h or d)

SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeastWithin(*minimumDuration*, *timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault.SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeastWithin "Link to this definition")

**ApiError** – If no return value has an expectation, no time option can be set.

- **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h or d)

SetTimeOptionWaitUntilTrue(*timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault.SetTimeOptionWaitUntilTrue "Link to this definition")

**ApiError** – If no return value has an expectation, no time option can be set.

UpdateInterface()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlResetToDefault.UpdateInterface "Link to this definition")  
Updates the list of parameters and return values according to the assigned mapping target:

- Removes any parameters and return values not available in the assigned mapping target

- Adds any missing parameters and return values defined in the assigned mapping target. Parameters are assigned a default value. Return values are not assigned any expectation.

Parameters and return values existing in both the test step and the mapping target are left as they are, which might in some cases result in an incompatible representation or unit.

Note

This only works if the test step is associated with an appropriate mappingItem (via a package, via a global mapping, or via the `~ApiClient.mappingItem` parameter of the [`CreateTsCall()`](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsCall "ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsCall") method) and the data base describing the target of the mapping item is loaded.

*class* TsCallIOControlFreezeCurrentState[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlFreezeCurrentState "Link to this definition")

- [`TsCallIOControl`](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControl "ApiClient.TsCallIOControl")

AddParameter(*parameterName*, *valueExpression=None*, *repr='PHYS'*, *unit="don't care"*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlFreezeCurrentState.AddParameter "Link to this definition")

See also [`UpdateInterface()`](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlFreezeCurrentState.UpdateInterface "ApiClient.TsCallIOControlFreezeCurrentState.UpdateInterface") and the various `SetParameter...` methods.

Parameters:  - **parameterName** (*str*) – name of the parameter

- **valueExpression** (*str*) – expression to use for the parameter’s value

- **repr** (*str*) – Representation. One of `~ApiClient.PHYS`, `~ApiClient.RAW`, `~ApiClient.TEXT` or `~ApiClient.BITS`

- **unit** (*str*) – Unit of the parameter

AddReturnValue(*returnName*, *saveIn=None*, *expectation=None*, *repr='PHYS'*, *unit="don't care"*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlFreezeCurrentState.AddReturnValue "Link to this definition")

See also [`UpdateInterface()`](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlFreezeCurrentState.UpdateInterface "ApiClient.TsCallIOControlFreezeCurrentState.UpdateInterface") and the various `SetReturnValue...` methods.

Parameters:  - **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

- **saveIn** (*str*) – name of the variable to save the return value into

- **expectation** ([`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")) – Expectation for the return value

- **repr** (*str*) – Representation. One of `~ApiClient.PHYS`, `~ApiClient.RAW`, `~ApiClient.TEXT` or `~ApiClient.BITS`

- **unit** (*str*) – Unit of the return value

DeactivateTimeOption()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlFreezeCurrentState.DeactivateTimeOption "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates any time option set on the test step. This is equivalent to selecting the option “none” in the test step’s time options menu.

DeleteReturnValue(*returnName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlFreezeCurrentState.DeleteReturnValue "Link to this definition")

You can use [`AddReturnValue()`](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlFreezeCurrentState.AddReturnValue "ApiClient.TsCallIOControlFreezeCurrentState.AddReturnValue") or [`UpdateInterface()`](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlFreezeCurrentState.UpdateInterface "ApiClient.TsCallIOControlFreezeCurrentState.UpdateInterface") to populate it.

Parameters:  **enable** (*boolean*) – True if test step is a break point, else False

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlFreezeCurrentState.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the current test case language.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

SetCyclic(*cyclicState*, *cycleTimeExpression=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlFreezeCurrentState.SetCyclic "Link to this definition")  
Changes the send cyclic settings for a test step that has call mode ‘SEND_EVENT’

Raises:  
**ApiError** – if the test step doesn’t support cyclic sending

Parameters:  - **cyclicState** (*str*) –

  possible values are:

  - ’on’ enables cyclic sending using the specified cycleTimeExpression

  - ’off’ disables cyclic sending

  - ’unchanged’ keeps cyclic sending (e.g. if just the event’s values should be changed)

  - None removes cyclic settings so the test step will send the event just once

- **cycleTimeExpression** (*str*) – in milliseconds, necessary for cyclicState ‘on’

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlFreezeCurrentState.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetIgnoreResponse(*ignoreResponse*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlFreezeCurrentState.SetIgnoreResponse "Link to this definition")  
Sets test step’s option for ignoring its response.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If not return values or ignoring the response is not supported the option does not make sense.

Parameters:  **ignoreResponse** (*bool*) – Sets the value of the option.

SetPacketExpectation(*expectationExpression*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlFreezeCurrentState.SetPacketExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Sets the expectation for the packet. Only applicable if this test step is mapped to a service method/event.

This should be a [`ExpressionExpectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.ExpressionExpectation "ApiClient.ExpressionExpectation") referencing the packet as `value`, a [`PresentExpectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.PresentExpectation "ApiClient.PresentExpectation"), or a [`NotPresentExpectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.NotPresentExpectation "ApiClient.NotPresentExpectation").

Keep in mind that the `value` object can not only be a `PacketSomeIp` but also NotPresent.

Parameters:  **expectationExpression** ([`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")) – expectation for the return value

SetParameterRepresentation(*parameterName*, *repr*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlFreezeCurrentState.SetParameterRepresentation "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  - **parameterName** (*str*) – name of the parameter

- **repr** (*str*) – representation to use for the parameter. One of `~ApiClient.PHYS`, `~ApiClient.RAW`, `~ApiClient.TEXT` or `~ApiClient.BITS`

SetParameterUnit(*parameterName*, *unit*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlFreezeCurrentState.SetParameterUnit "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  - **parameterName** (*str*) – name of the parameter

- **unit** (*str*) – Unit to use for the `~ApiClient.PHYS` representation for this parameter

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTimeOptionOnlySynchronization(*timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlFreezeCurrentState.SetTimeOptionOnlySynchronization "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “only synchronization”.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If no return value has an expectation, no time option can be set.

Parameters:  - **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h or d)

SetTimeOptionPollingCycleMultiplier(*pollingCycleMultiplier*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlFreezeCurrentState.SetTimeOptionPollingCycleMultiplier "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “polling cycle multiplier”. This option must only be used when inserting the test step into a Multi-Check!

Parameters:  **pollingCycleMultiplier** (*string*) – The polling cycle multiplier to be used.

SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeast(*minimumDuration*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlFreezeCurrentState.SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeast "Link to this definition")

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If no return value has an expectation, no time option can be set.

Parameters:  - **minimumDuration** (*string*) – The minimum duration to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h or d)

SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeastWithin(*minimumDuration*, *timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlFreezeCurrentState.SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeastWithin "Link to this definition")

- **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h or d)

UpdateInterface()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlFreezeCurrentState.UpdateInterface "Link to this definition")  
Updates the list of parameters and return values according to the assigned mapping target:

- Removes any parameters and return values not available in the assigned mapping target

- Adds any missing parameters and return values defined in the assigned mapping target. Parameters are assigned a default value. Return values are not assigned any expectation.

Parameters and return values existing in both the test step and the mapping target are left as they are, which might in some cases result in an incompatible representation or unit.

Note

This only works if the test step is associated with an appropriate mappingItem (via a package, via a global mapping, or via the `~ApiClient.mappingItem` parameter of the [`CreateTsCall()`](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsCall "ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsCall") method) and the data base describing the target of the mapping item is loaded.

AddParameter(*parameterName*, *valueExpression=None*, *repr='PHYS'*, *unit="don't care"*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlShortTermAdjustment.AddParameter "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  - **parameterName** (*str*) – name of the parameter

- **unit** (*str*) – Unit of the parameter

Parameters:  - **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

- **saveIn** (*str*) – name of the variable to save the return value into

- **expectation** ([`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")) – Expectation for the return value

- **repr** (*str*) – Representation. One of `~ApiClient.PHYS`, `~ApiClient.RAW`, `~ApiClient.TEXT` or `~ApiClient.BITS`

- **unit** (*str*) – Unit of the return value

DeactivateTimeOption()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlShortTermAdjustment.DeactivateTimeOption "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates any time option set on the test step. This is equivalent to selecting the option “none” in the test step’s time options menu.

DeleteReturnValue(*returnName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlShortTermAdjustment.DeleteReturnValue "Link to this definition")

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlShortTermAdjustment.IsOk "Link to this definition")

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlShortTermAdjustment.IsVisible "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be removed

Parameters:  **enable** (*boolean*) – True if test step is a break point, else False

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlShortTermAdjustment.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the current test case language.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

SetCyclic(*cyclicState*, *cycleTimeExpression=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlShortTermAdjustment.SetCyclic "Link to this definition")  
Changes the send cyclic settings for a test step that has call mode ‘SEND_EVENT’

Raises:  
**ApiError** – if the test step doesn’t support cyclic sending

Parameters:  - **cyclicState** (*str*) –

  possible values are:

  - ’on’ enables cyclic sending using the specified cycleTimeExpression

  - ’off’ disables cyclic sending

  - ’unchanged’ keeps cyclic sending (e.g. if just the event’s values should be changed)

  - None removes cyclic settings so the test step will send the event just once

- **cycleTimeExpression** (*str*) – in milliseconds, necessary for cyclicState ‘on’

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlShortTermAdjustment.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetIgnoreResponse(*ignoreResponse*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlShortTermAdjustment.SetIgnoreResponse "Link to this definition")  
Sets test step’s option for ignoring its response.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If not return values or ignoring the response is not supported the option does not make sense.

Parameters:  **ignoreResponse** (*bool*) – Sets the value of the option.

SetPacketExpectation(*expectationExpression*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlShortTermAdjustment.SetPacketExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Sets the expectation for the packet. Only applicable if this test step is mapped to a service method/event.

This should be a [`ExpressionExpectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.ExpressionExpectation "ApiClient.ExpressionExpectation") referencing the packet as `value`, a [`PresentExpectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.PresentExpectation "ApiClient.PresentExpectation"), or a [`NotPresentExpectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.NotPresentExpectation "ApiClient.NotPresentExpectation").

Keep in mind that the `value` object can not only be a `PacketSomeIp` but also NotPresent.

Parameters:  **expectationExpression** ([`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")) – expectation for the return value

Parameters:  - **parameterName** (*str*) – name of the parameter

- **repr** (*str*) – representation to use for the parameter. One of `~ApiClient.PHYS`, `~ApiClient.RAW`, `~ApiClient.TEXT` or `~ApiClient.BITS`

SetParameterUnit(*parameterName*, *unit*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlShortTermAdjustment.SetParameterUnit "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  - **parameterName** (*str*) – name of the parameter

- **unit** (*str*) – Unit to use for the `~ApiClient.PHYS` representation for this parameter

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTimeOptionOnlySynchronization(*timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlShortTermAdjustment.SetTimeOptionOnlySynchronization "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “only synchronization”.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If no return value has an expectation, no time option can be set.

Parameters:  - **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h or d)

SetTimeOptionPollingCycleMultiplier(*pollingCycleMultiplier*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlShortTermAdjustment.SetTimeOptionPollingCycleMultiplier "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “polling cycle multiplier”. This option must only be used when inserting the test step into a Multi-Check!

Parameters:  **pollingCycleMultiplier** (*string*) – The polling cycle multiplier to be used.

SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeast(*minimumDuration*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlShortTermAdjustment.SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeast "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “true for at least”.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If no return value has an expectation, no time option can be set.

Parameters:  - **minimumDuration** (*string*) – The minimum duration to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h or d)

SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeastWithin(*minimumDuration*, *timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlShortTermAdjustment.SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeastWithin "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “true for at least … within …”.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If no return value has an expectation, no time option can be set.

Parameters:  - **minimumDuration** (*string*) – The minimum duration to be used

- **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h or d)

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlShortTermAdjustment.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")

UpdateInterface()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlShortTermAdjustment.UpdateInterface "Link to this definition")  
Updates the list of parameters and return values according to the assigned mapping target:

- Removes any parameters and return values not available in the assigned mapping target

- Adds any missing parameters and return values defined in the assigned mapping target. Parameters are assigned a default value. Return values are not assigned any expectation.

Parameters and return values existing in both the test step and the mapping target are left as they are, which might in some cases result in an incompatible representation or unit.

Note

This only works if the test step is associated with an appropriate mappingItem (via a package, via a global mapping, or via the `~ApiClient.mappingItem` parameter of the [`CreateTsCall()`](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsCall "ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsCall") method) and the data base describing the target of the mapping item is loaded.

## TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved[¶](#tscalliocontrolisosaereserved "Link to this heading")

*class* TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved "Link to this definition")  
Base classes

- [`TestStep`](#ApiClient.TestStep "ApiClient.TestStep")

- [`TsCall`](#ApiClient.TsCall "ApiClient.TsCall")

- [`TsCallIOControl`](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControl "ApiClient.TsCallIOControl")

AddParameter(*parameterName*, *valueExpression=None*, *repr='PHYS'*, *unit="don't care"*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.AddParameter "Link to this definition")  
Adds a parameter to the test step.

See also [`UpdateInterface()`](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.UpdateInterface "ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.UpdateInterface") and the various `SetParameter...` methods.

Parameters:  - **parameterName** (*str*) – name of the parameter

- **valueExpression** (*str*) – expression to use for the parameter’s value

- **repr** (*str*) – Representation. One of `~ApiClient.PHYS`, `~ApiClient.RAW`, `~ApiClient.TEXT` or `~ApiClient.BITS`

- **unit** (*str*) – Unit of the parameter

AddReturnValue(*returnName*, *saveIn=None*, *expectation=None*, *repr='PHYS'*, *unit="don't care"*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.AddReturnValue "Link to this definition")  
Adds a return value to the test step.

See also [`UpdateInterface()`](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.UpdateInterface "ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.UpdateInterface") and the various `SetReturnValue...` methods.

Parameters:  - **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

- **saveIn** (*str*) – name of the variable to save the return value into

- **expectation** ([`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")) – Expectation for the return value

- **repr** (*str*) – Representation. One of `~ApiClient.PHYS`, `~ApiClient.RAW`, `~ApiClient.TEXT` or `~ApiClient.BITS`

- **unit** (*str*) – Unit of the return value

AddTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.AddTag "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be set

Call this method if you want to use API-objects in multiple contexts, e.g. if you want to insert a specific test step in multiple blocks.

Returns:  A copy of this object

Return type:  [`TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved`](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved "ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved")

DeactivateReturnValueExpectation(*returnName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.DeactivateReturnValueExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the expectation for the specified return value.

If no return value with an expectation remains, also deactivates any time option that may be configured.

Parameters:  **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

DeactivateReturnValueSaveIn(*returnName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.DeactivateReturnValueSaveIn "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the save into a variable mechanism for the specified return value

Parameters:  **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

DeactivateTimeOption()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.DeactivateTimeOption "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates any time option set on the test step. This is equivalent to selecting the option “none” in the test step’s time options menu.

DeleteParameter(*parameterName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.DeleteParameter "Link to this definition")  
Removes a parameter from the test step.

See also [`UpdateInterface()`](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.UpdateInterface "ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.UpdateInterface").

Parameters:  **parameterName** (*str*) – name of the parameter

DeleteReturnValue(*returnName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.DeleteReturnValue "Link to this definition")  
Removes a return value from the test step. If no return values are left after the deletion, also deactivates any time option that may be configured.

See also [`UpdateInterface()`](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.UpdateInterface "ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.UpdateInterface").

Parameters:  **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

DeleteTranslatedCommentText(*language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.DeleteTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

GetTimeout()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.GetTimeout "Link to this definition")

Returns:  The timeout else None

Return type:  string

GetTimeoutUnit()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.GetTimeoutUnit "Link to this definition")

Returns:  The unit of the timeout else None

Return type:  string

Parameters:  **language** (*str*) – Language of the requested text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

Returns:  Comment column text

Return type:  str

GetType()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.GetType "Link to this definition")

> - “TsPreconditionBlock”
>
> - “TsWait”
>
> - “TsIfThenElse”
>
> - “TsSwitchCase”
>
> - “TsCaseNode”

Returns:  Type (class name) of the test step

Return type:  str

GetValueColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.GetValueColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “value” column in your current test case language.

Returns:  Value column text

Return type:  str

IsBreakpoint()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.IsBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is a break point.

Returns:  True if test step is a break point, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsContainer()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.IsContainer "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether this test step can contain test steps

Returns:  True if it can contain test steps, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.IsEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns the state of the test step.

Returns:  True if test step is enabled, otherwise False

Return type:  bool

IsInPostcondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.IsInPostcondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a postcondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a postcondition, else Flase

Return type:  bool

IsInPrecondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.IsInPrecondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a precondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a precondition, else False

Return type:  bool

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.IsVisible "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is visible. This depends on the test step itself or a parent test step being disabled.

Returns:  True if test step is visible, else False

Return type:  boolean

RemovePacketExpectation()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.RemovePacketExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Removes the expectation for the packet. Only applicable if this test step is mapped to a service method/event.

RemoveTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.RemoveTag "Link to this definition")  
Remove a specific tag from this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be removed

SetBreakpoint(*enable*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.SetBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Sets or unsets the test step to act as a break point.

Parameters:  **enable** (*boolean*) – True if test step is a break point, else False

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the current test case language.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

SetCyclic(*cyclicState*, *cycleTimeExpression=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.SetCyclic "Link to this definition")  
Changes the send cyclic settings for a test step that has call mode ‘SEND_EVENT’

Raises:  
**ApiError** – if the test step doesn’t support cyclic sending

Parameters:  - **cyclicState** (*str*) –

  possible values are:

  - ’on’ enables cyclic sending using the specified cycleTimeExpression

  - ’off’ disables cyclic sending

  - ’unchanged’ keeps cyclic sending (e.g. if just the event’s values should be changed)

  - None removes cyclic settings so the test step will send the event just once

- **cycleTimeExpression** (*str*) – in milliseconds, necessary for cyclicState ‘on’

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetIgnoreResponse(*ignoreResponse*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.SetIgnoreResponse "Link to this definition")  
Sets test step’s option for ignoring its response.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If not return values or ignoring the response is not supported the option does not make sense.

Parameters:  **ignoreResponse** (*bool*) – Sets the value of the option.

SetPacketExpectation(*expectationExpression*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.SetPacketExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Sets the expectation for the packet. Only applicable if this test step is mapped to a service method/event.

This should be a [`ExpressionExpectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.ExpressionExpectation "ApiClient.ExpressionExpectation") referencing the packet as `value`, a [`PresentExpectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.PresentExpectation "ApiClient.PresentExpectation"), or a [`NotPresentExpectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.NotPresentExpectation "ApiClient.NotPresentExpectation").

Keep in mind that the `value` object can not only be a `PacketSomeIp` but also NotPresent.

Parameters:  **expectationExpression** ([`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")) – expectation for the return value

SetParameterRepresentation(*parameterName*, *repr*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.SetParameterRepresentation "Link to this definition")  
Sets the representation for the specified parameter

Parameters:  - **parameterName** (*str*) – name of the parameter

- **repr** (*str*) – representation to use for the parameter. One of `~ApiClient.PHYS`, `~ApiClient.RAW`, `~ApiClient.TEXT` or `~ApiClient.BITS`

SetParameterUnit(*parameterName*, *unit*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.SetParameterUnit "Link to this definition")  
Sets the unit for the specified parameter

Parameters:  - **parameterName** (*str*) – name of the parameter

- **unit** (*str*) – Unit to use for the `~ApiClient.PHYS` representation for this parameter

SetParameterValue(*parameterName*, *valueExpression*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.SetParameterValue "Link to this definition")  
Assigns a new expression to use the specified parameter’s value

Parameters:  - **parameterName** (*str*) – name of the parameter

- **valueExpression** (*str*) – expression to use for the parameter’s value

SetReturnValueExpectation(*returnName*, *expectationExpression*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.SetReturnValueExpectation "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  - **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

- **expectationExpression** ([`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")) – expectation for the return value

SetReturnValueRepresentation(*returnName*, *repr*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.SetReturnValueRepresentation "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  - **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

- **repr** (*str*) – representation to use for the return value. One of `~ApiClient.PHYS`, `~ApiClient.RAW`, `~ApiClient.TEXT` or `~ApiClient.BITS`

Parameters:  - **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

- **unit** (*str*) – Unit to use for the `~ApiClient.PHYS` representation for this return value

Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTimeOptionOnlySynchronization(*timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.SetTimeOptionOnlySynchronization "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “only synchronization”.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If no return value has an expectation, no time option can be set.

Parameters:  - **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h or d)

SetTimeOptionPollingCycleMultiplier(*pollingCycleMultiplier*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.SetTimeOptionPollingCycleMultiplier "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “polling cycle multiplier”. This option must only be used when inserting the test step into a Multi-Check!

Parameters:  **pollingCycleMultiplier** (*string*) – The polling cycle multiplier to be used.

SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeast(*minimumDuration*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeast "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “true for at least”.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If no return value has an expectation, no time option can be set.

Parameters:  - **minimumDuration** (*string*) – The minimum duration to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h or d)

SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeastWithin(*minimumDuration*, *timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeastWithin "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “true for at least … within …”.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If no return value has an expectation, no time option can be set.

Parameters:  - **minimumDuration** (*string*) – The minimum duration to be used

- **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h or d)

SetTimeOptionWaitUntilTrue(*timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.SetTimeOptionWaitUntilTrue "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “wait until true”.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If no return value has an expectation, no time option can be set.

Parameters:  - **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h or d)

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

UpdateInterface()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControlISOSAEReserved.UpdateInterface "Link to this definition")  
Updates the list of parameters and return values according to the assigned mapping target:

- Removes any parameters and return values not available in the assigned mapping target

- Adds any missing parameters and return values defined in the assigned mapping target. Parameters are assigned a default value. Return values are not assigned any expectation.

Parameters and return values existing in both the test step and the mapping target are left as they are, which might in some cases result in an incompatible representation or unit.

Note

This only works if the test step is associated with an appropriate mappingItem (via a package, via a global mapping, or via the `~ApiClient.mappingItem` parameter of the [`CreateTsCall()`](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsCall "ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsCall") method) and the data base describing the target of the mapping item is loaded.

AddParameter(*parameterName*, *valueExpression=None*, *repr='PHYS'*, *unit="don't care"*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.AddParameter "Link to this definition")

See also [`UpdateInterface()`](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.UpdateInterface "ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.UpdateInterface") and the various `SetParameter...` methods.

Parameters:  - **parameterName** (*str*) – name of the parameter

- **valueExpression** (*str*) – expression to use for the parameter’s value

- **repr** (*str*) – Representation. One of `~ApiClient.PHYS`, `~ApiClient.RAW`, `~ApiClient.TEXT` or `~ApiClient.BITS`

- **unit** (*str*) – Unit of the parameter

AddReturnValue(*returnName*, *saveIn=None*, *expectation=None*, *repr='PHYS'*, *unit="don't care"*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.AddReturnValue "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  - **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

- **saveIn** (*str*) – name of the variable to save the return value into

- **expectation** ([`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")) – Expectation for the return value

- **repr** (*str*) – Representation. One of `~ApiClient.PHYS`, `~ApiClient.RAW`, `~ApiClient.TEXT` or `~ApiClient.BITS`

- **unit** (*str*) – Unit of the return value

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be set

Call this method if you want to use API-objects in multiple contexts, e.g. if you want to insert a specific test step in multiple blocks.

Returns:  A copy of this object

Return type:  [`TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu`](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu "ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu")

DeactivateReturnValueExpectation(*returnName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.DeactivateReturnValueExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates the expectation for the specified return value.

If no return value with an expectation remains, also deactivates any time option that may be configured.

Parameters:  **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

DeactivateReturnValueSaveIn(*returnName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.DeactivateReturnValueSaveIn "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

DeactivateTimeOption()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.DeactivateTimeOption "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates any time option set on the test step. This is equivalent to selecting the option “none” in the test step’s time options menu.

DeleteParameter(*parameterName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.DeleteParameter "Link to this definition")  
Removes a parameter from the test step.

See also [`UpdateInterface()`](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.UpdateInterface "ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.UpdateInterface").

Parameters:  **parameterName** (*str*) – name of the parameter

DeleteReturnValue(*returnName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.DeleteReturnValue "Link to this definition")  
Removes a return value from the test step. If no return values are left after the deletion, also deactivates any time option that may be configured.

See also [`UpdateInterface()`](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.UpdateInterface "ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.UpdateInterface").

Parameters:  **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

> - “TsPreconditionBlock”
>
> - “TsWait”
>
> - “TsIfThenElse”
>
> - “TsSwitchCase”
>
> - “TsCaseNode”

Returns:  Type (class name) of the test step

Return type:  str

GetValueColumnText()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.GetValueColumnText "Link to this definition")  
Returns the text value of the “value” column in your current test case language.

Returns:  Value column text

Return type:  str

IsBreakpoint()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.IsBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is a break point.

Returns:  True if test step is a break point, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsContainer()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.IsContainer "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether this test step can contain test steps

Returns:  True if it can contain test steps, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsEnabled()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.IsEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Returns the state of the test step.

Returns:  True if test step is enabled, otherwise False

Return type:  bool

IsInPostcondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.IsInPostcondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a postcondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a postcondition, else Flase

Return type:  bool

IsInPrecondition()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.IsInPrecondition "Link to this definition")  
Returns True if the test step is located in a precondition

Returns:  True if the test step is located in a precondition, else False

Return type:  bool

IsOk()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.IsOk "Link to this definition")  
Returns the internal state of correctness of the test step.

Returns:  True if no problems were found, else False

Return type:  boolean

IsVisible()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.IsVisible "Link to this definition")  
Checks whether the test step is visible. This depends on the test step itself or a parent test step being disabled.

Returns:  True if test step is visible, else False

Return type:  boolean

RemovePacketExpectation()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.RemovePacketExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Removes the expectation for the packet. Only applicable if this test step is mapped to a service method/event.

RemoveTag(*tag*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.RemoveTag "Link to this definition")  
Remove a specific tag from this step.

Parameters:  **tag** (*str*) – The tag to be removed

SetBreakpoint(*enable*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.SetBreakpoint "Link to this definition")  
Sets or unsets the test step to act as a break point.

Parameters:  **enable** (*boolean*) – True if test step is a break point, else False

SetComment(*comment*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.SetComment "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the current test case language.

Parameters:  **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed in the comment tab

SetCyclic(*cyclicState*, *cycleTimeExpression=None*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.SetCyclic "Link to this definition")  
Changes the send cyclic settings for a test step that has call mode ‘SEND_EVENT’

Raises:  
**ApiError** – if the test step doesn’t support cyclic sending

Parameters:  - **cyclicState** (*str*) –

  possible values are:

  - ’on’ enables cyclic sending using the specified cycleTimeExpression

  - ’off’ disables cyclic sending

  - ’unchanged’ keeps cyclic sending (e.g. if just the event’s values should be changed)

  - None removes cyclic settings so the test step will send the event just once

- **cycleTimeExpression** (*str*) – in milliseconds, necessary for cyclicState ‘on’

SetEnabled(*state=True*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.SetEnabled "Link to this definition")  
Enable or disable the test step.

Parameters:  **state** (*bool*) – True (Default) to enable, False to disable the test step.

SetIgnoreResponse(*ignoreResponse*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.SetIgnoreResponse "Link to this definition")  
Sets test step’s option for ignoring its response.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If not return values or ignoring the response is not supported the option does not make sense.

Parameters:  **ignoreResponse** (*bool*) – Sets the value of the option.

SetPacketExpectation(*expectationExpression*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.SetPacketExpectation "Link to this definition")  
Sets the expectation for the packet. Only applicable if this test step is mapped to a service method/event.

This should be a [`ExpressionExpectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.ExpressionExpectation "ApiClient.ExpressionExpectation") referencing the packet as `value`, a [`PresentExpectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.PresentExpectation "ApiClient.PresentExpectation"), or a [`NotPresentExpectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.NotPresentExpectation "ApiClient.NotPresentExpectation").

Keep in mind that the `value` object can not only be a `PacketSomeIp` but also NotPresent.

Parameters:  **expectationExpression** ([`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")) – expectation for the return value

SetParameterRepresentation(*parameterName*, *repr*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.SetParameterRepresentation "Link to this definition")  
Sets the representation for the specified parameter

Parameters:  - **parameterName** (*str*) – name of the parameter

- **repr** (*str*) – representation to use for the parameter. One of `~ApiClient.PHYS`, `~ApiClient.RAW`, `~ApiClient.TEXT` or `~ApiClient.BITS`

SetParameterUnit(*parameterName*, *unit*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.SetParameterUnit "Link to this definition")  
Sets the unit for the specified parameter

Parameters:  - **parameterName** (*str*) – name of the parameter

- **unit** (*str*) – Unit to use for the `~ApiClient.PHYS` representation for this parameter

SetParameterValue(*parameterName*, *valueExpression*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.SetParameterValue "Link to this definition")  
Assigns a new expression to use the specified parameter’s value

Parameters:  - **parameterName** (*str*) – name of the parameter

- **valueExpression** (*str*) – expression to use for the parameter’s value

Parameters:  - **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

- **expectationExpression** ([`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")) – expectation for the return value

Sets the representation for the specified return value

Parameters:  - **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

- **repr** (*str*) – representation to use for the return value. One of `~ApiClient.PHYS`, `~ApiClient.RAW`, `~ApiClient.TEXT` or `~ApiClient.BITS`

Set the list of tags for this step. The list of tags will be sorted and stored.

Parameters:  **tags** (*list[str]*) – The list of tags

SetTestManagementId(*testManagementId*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.SetTestManagementId "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test management id of the test step.

Parameters:  **testManagementId** (*str*) – Test management id of the test step

SetTimeOptionOnlySynchronization(*timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.SetTimeOptionOnlySynchronization "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “only synchronization”.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If no return value has an expectation, no time option can be set.

Parameters:  - **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h or d)

SetTimeOptionPollingCycleMultiplier(*pollingCycleMultiplier*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.SetTimeOptionPollingCycleMultiplier "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “polling cycle multiplier”. This option must only be used when inserting the test step into a Multi-Check!

Parameters:  **pollingCycleMultiplier** (*string*) – The polling cycle multiplier to be used.

SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeast(*minimumDuration*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeast "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “true for at least”.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If no return value has an expectation, no time option can be set.

Parameters:  - **minimumDuration** (*string*) – The minimum duration to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h or d)

SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeastWithin(*minimumDuration*, *timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.SetTimeOptionTrueForAtLeastWithin "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “true for at least … within …”.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If no return value has an expectation, no time option can be set.

Parameters:  - **minimumDuration** (*string*) – The minimum duration to be used

- **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h or d)

SetTimeOptionWaitUntilTrue(*timeout*, *pollingCycle=None*, *timeoutUnit='ms'*, *pollingCycleUnit='ms'*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.SetTimeOptionWaitUntilTrue "Link to this definition")  
Sets the test step’s time option to “wait until true”.

Raises:  
**ApiError** – If no return value has an expectation, no time option can be set.

Parameters:  - **timeout** (*string*) – The timeout to be used

- **pollingCycle** (*string*) – Optional polling cycle to be used

- **timeoutUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the timeout (ms, s, min, h or d)

- **pollingCycleUnit** (*string*) – Optional unit for the polling cycle (ms, s, min, h or d)

SetTranslatedCommentText(*comment*, *language*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.SetTranslatedCommentText "Link to this definition")  
Sets a comment for the test step in the given language.

Parameters:  - **comment** (*str*) – Text to be displayed

- **language** (*str*) – Language of the text (‘en_US’, ‘de_DE’, ‘zh_CN’)

UpdateInterface()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReturnControlToEcu.UpdateInterface "Link to this definition")  
Updates the list of parameters and return values according to the assigned mapping target:

- Removes any parameters and return values not available in the assigned mapping target

- Adds any missing parameters and return values defined in the assigned mapping target. Parameters are assigned a default value. Return values are not assigned any expectation.

Parameters and return values existing in both the test step and the mapping target are left as they are, which might in some cases result in an incompatible representation or unit.

Note

This only works if the test step is associated with an appropriate mappingItem (via a package, via a global mapping, or via the `~ApiClient.mappingItem` parameter of the [`CreateTsCall()`](#ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsCall "ApiClient.TestStepApi.CreateTsCall") method) and the data base describing the target of the mapping item is loaded.

- [`TsCallIOControl`](#ApiClient.TsCallIOControl "ApiClient.TsCallIOControl")

AddParameter(*parameterName*, *valueExpression=None*, *repr='PHYS'*, *unit="don't care"*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReportCurrentState.AddParameter "Link to this definition")  
Adds a parameter to the test step.

See also [`UpdateInterface()`](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReportCurrentState.UpdateInterface "ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReportCurrentState.UpdateInterface") and the various `SetParameter...` methods.

Parameters:  - **parameterName** (*str*) – name of the parameter

- **valueExpression** (*str*) – expression to use for the parameter’s value

- **repr** (*str*) – Representation. One of `~ApiClient.PHYS`, `~ApiClient.RAW`, `~ApiClient.TEXT` or `~ApiClient.BITS`

- **unit** (*str*) – Unit of the parameter

See also [`UpdateInterface()`](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReportCurrentState.UpdateInterface "ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReportCurrentState.UpdateInterface") and the various `SetReturnValue...` methods.

Parameters:  - **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

- **saveIn** (*str*) – name of the variable to save the return value into

- **expectation** ([`Expectation`](ExpectationApi.md#ApiClient.Expectation "ApiClient.Expectation")) – Expectation for the return value

- **repr** (*str*) – Representation. One of `~ApiClient.PHYS`, `~ApiClient.RAW`, `~ApiClient.TEXT` or `~ApiClient.BITS`

- **unit** (*str*) – Unit of the return value

Call this method if you want to use API-objects in multiple contexts, e.g. if you want to insert a specific test step in multiple blocks.

Returns:  A copy of this object

Return type:  [`TsCallKwpIOControlReportCurrentState`](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReportCurrentState "ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReportCurrentState")

Deactivates the expectation for the specified return value.

If no return value with an expectation remains, also deactivates any time option that may be configured.

Parameters:  **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

DeactivateReturnValueSaveIn(*returnName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReportCurrentState.DeactivateReturnValueSaveIn "Link to this definition")

Parameters:  **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value

DeactivateTimeOption()[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReportCurrentState.DeactivateTimeOption "Link to this definition")  
Deactivates any time option set on the test step. This is equivalent to selecting the option “none” in the test step’s time options menu.

DeleteParameter(*parameterName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReportCurrentState.DeleteParameter "Link to this definition")  
Removes a parameter from the test step.

See also [`UpdateInterface()`](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReportCurrentState.UpdateInterface "ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReportCurrentState.UpdateInterface").

Parameters:  **parameterName** (*str*) – name of the parameter

DeleteReturnValue(*returnName*)[¶](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReportCurrentState.DeleteReturnValue "Link to this definition")  
Removes a return value from the test step. If no return values are left after the deletion, also deactivates any time option that may be configured.

See also [`UpdateInterface()`](#ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReportCurrentState.UpdateInterface "ApiClient.TsCallKwpIOControlReportCurrentState.UpdateInterface").

Parameters:  **returnName** (*str*) – name of the return value
